name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: in just a few hours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]In just a few hours, we’re facing our first mid-month fundraising deadline of the new quarter.

There is no doubt that our nation is more divided right now than ever. What we need is true bipartisan progress — working across the aisle to ward off extremism and reach common ground.

In 2016, I ran for Congress because the people of NJ-5 deserve an advocate, someone who will take the fight straight to the special interests and partisans on both sides. But this fight for bipartisan progress is not finished.

So please, will you make a contribution of $ or any amount you can afford to help fund my re-election campaign before our mid-month deadline? Here’s a link to use:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2307?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2307?amount=]

Thank you for being on my team,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-footer-2020?amount=$25&refcode=footer2020] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. subject: we are drowning in debt over here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; http://nextgenpac

| We go to college to learn. To build our futures. We shouldn’t have to drown in debt our whole damn lives just to be able to receive an education.

Last month, the Supreme Court denied millions of Americans nationwide student debt relief. ONCE AGAIN... extremist Republicans have shown they do not give a shit about us. The student debt crisis has been going on for too long, and we can’t sit back anymore while extremists keep playing their political games.

[Young people have had enough. President Biden had our back with loan forgiveness, but it’s too bad that Republicans care more about partisanship than about us. Heading into 2024, young people are fired up and ready to create a government that **respects, reflects, and represents us.**

The average borrower in the U.S. owes $28,950 in student loans on average. **That's right – $28,950.** Why should it take thousands of dollars of debt for young people to have a damn education?

[**The GOP is SO out of touch with young people, and we need to get rid of them ASAP. subject: Help us ensure a smooth transition...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Chip in to support the next WSRP Chair!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

| | Friend,

---
Public polls show that President Donald J. Trump is leading in every statewide primary and caucus.

---
We’re getting close to being able to effectively WRAP UP the primary and turn our focus to the REAL battle of firing Crooked Joe and winning back the White House.

---

body:
They’ve hit rock bottom
| **_Can the Supreme Court sink any lower?!_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/scotus-petition/?source=VPP_20230717_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=9201%2E878179%2Ec7buS3) [**We can’t just sit back while far-right Supreme Court Justices make a mockery of the highest court in the land. Please, sign our urgent petition to condemn the Supreme Court! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/scotus-petition/?source=VPP_20230717_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=9201%2E878179%2Ec7buS3) | [**_10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED_ : SIGN OUR URGENT PETITION TO CONDEMN THE FAR-RIGHT SUPREME COURT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/scotus-petition/?source=VPP_20230717_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=9201%2E878179%2Ec7buS3)
---
The Supreme Court has gone __too far__ :

**_They’ve overturned affirmative action, rolled back reproductive rights, and broken ethics codes countless times!_**
[**We have to do everything in our power to pull the Supreme Court back from the brink of MAGA madness! Please, sign our urgent petition now to show the far-right Supreme Court how out of touch they really are! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/scotus-petition/?source=VPP_20230717_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=9201%2E878179%2Ec7buS3)

---
Thank you,

_VPP_

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9201%2E878179%2Ec7buS3). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9201%2E878179%2Ec7buS3).**

| Friend, Colorado needs your help. For over a decade, we have been under relentless attack by the radical left and our party has been playing defense for far too long.
Now, as we kick of the 2024 Election season, the Colorado GOP is under new management!
The America First leadership of the Colorado GOP is going on offense against the radical left and the RINOs within our own party. We are intent on making up lost ground in the 2023 Municipal Races and the 2024 Presidential Election.
Colorado is back on the political stage and we intend to keep it that way!
With the new programs that we are rolling out state-wide at the Colorado GOP, we will be able to protect the people of Congressional District 3 from the likes of Adam Frisch, and with your help, we can elect a Republican to Congressional District 8 and make Yadira Caraveo a one-term Congresswoman.
In order to make this happen, we need your financial support.
---
| As we enter a new era for Colorado Republicans, we will fight to put an end to the inflation, the big spending, the massive amounts of foreign aid to Ukraine that are bankrupting our country and we will continue to fight for our Second Amendment.
Your support of the Colorado GOP with a generous donation today will move us one step closer to Saving America and bringing back a prosperous America for each and every American citizen.
Please donate today! Thanks to our efforts, our team was able to activate a 5x match opportunity exclusively for you. This is your chance to contribute and make it count, so please donate to the Colorado GOP now!
🚨 5X MATCH ACTIVATED BELOW 🚨

body:
On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That’s up to us
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3fhfl8ev5fiq6irc8sbvm73h10p5iojpq2anep8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5nc9pbfc5mc3h71dplcdpn9d9nmupj9djnmgoe3djgclj3aothc9q6fddhetgefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3cp5l6dg74dj66libbc77m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm1p73clhm2pb4c8iv0)
On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That's up to us

| | | | _" I do solemnly swear that I will faithfully execute the Office of President of the United States, and will to the best of my ability, preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States."_
Friend,

On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That's up to us, the American people.

We need to elect a President we can be proud of, someone we can trust to do the job with integrity and lead our country in the right direction.

If you wanted a blueprint to ruin America, you'd keep doing exactly what Joe Biden has allowed the radical Left to do for the last few years.

Tim Scott wants to protect America, bring faith back to our country, and provide opportunities for every American.

**We need Tim Scott as our next president!_[If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zs52sc2jq3i302fnedrl4dk5965kbmfujfadlnvg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdim6ob5chh2bs "If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?")_**

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5446d3vv7t7apd4q9qh0jelnm2d7j09ko2en1qg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdim6ob5chh2bs "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT")
---

On Tim's first day in office, he will:
* Restart the Keystone Pipeline
* Secure the Border
* Stand up to China
* Restore Parental Rights

You can count on him to **FIRE** Attorney General Merrick Garland, **FIRE** FBI Director Christopher Wray, replace the political appointees in the Department of Justice, and restore confidence and integrity in our government.

**Simply put, Tim Scott will preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztcdrqlej8q4oknso1jrk2v1lc8crfld1cletgrg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdim6ob5chh2bs "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT")
---

He has already done a great job as a conservative U.S. Senator from South Carolina since 2013. **But to really know Tim, who he is, and what he believes, you have to see where he came from.**

Tim grew up in a single-parent household. His mom worked long days and nights to keep a roof over their heads. While Tim didn't have much growing up, his family instilled in him a strong faith in God, faith in America, and faith in the future.

Tim believes that America is the land of opportunity. He believes that America can do for anyone what she has done for him. He's going to fight to ensure every person has the opportunity to live the American Dream.

America's future will be bright under President Tim Scott. But that future won't become reality unless we help Tim win!

**_[Can you please make a contribution of any amount to support Tim Scott's campaign?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0ui9fjb45d2ekvu8qmo106drom0c5tgphjnja88_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdim6ob5chh2bs "Can you please make a contribution of any amount to support Tim Scott’s campaign?")_**

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhf21h1u577bhplrbaiu4rv8mb8n8ti10i1he6l8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdim6ob5chh2bs "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT")
---

Thank You,

Tim Scott for America

---
* * *
---
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsonond90jlpdukdk3jiqotuh0bt3sqlfgfaqui0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdim6ob5chh2bs "JOIN ME NOW")
---

_If you 're able-bodied, you work.
If you take out a loan, you pay it back.
And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail.

America needs more victors and less victims._

These aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as President, I will defend them.

**_[If you agree, will you join my team?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr5vvbkb18ao9u6l77kuuppvr1vat3m8rd0fera0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdim6ob5chh2bs "If you agree, will you join my team?")_**

---
| | | [STAND WITH ME](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z89i6an2f92dfvlplbna0n46bgu449vhq0jkj0mg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdim6ob5chh2bs "STAND WITH ME")
---

Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness, and victimhood over victory. **We CANNOT let them destroy our values and destroy our country.**

I believe that with faith and American values, our country's future can be brighter than ever before. But this fight isn't going to be easy.

**_[I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America's future?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9jlqg1blcd1usgdf66cojvhikdnja24c7rtsrmo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdim6ob5chh2bs "I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America’s future?")_**

Thank You & God Bless
- Tim Scott

---
| | | [STAND WITH ME](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zudts0qhjumt83stvhbjhnrqb4m7emgh4siegt38_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdim6ob5chh2bs "STAND WITH ME")
---

---

| PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
---
7620 Rivers Ave, Ste. 370 #312
North Charleston, SC 29406
[Privacy Policy](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf6jfpkp16uqkl7soddn9q8bv911motg6ku0mn38_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdim6ob5chh2bs)

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Conservative FWD, [please use this preferences page](https://e.conservativefwd.com/prefs/9z2zeo2kju7jprujpfg8nfcui3e5pnctgsa9p34qfoo).
625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Tim Sheehy is the key to winning back the Senate majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I need you to get involved in this race STAT | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=e2c9ea0b98b24b528aad72304c4d42df&_t=KeZTB7T7tAk0qI-aXhlafpcgVtl4EdU3m6ioX685qaGHd8OPczhDHOXjxk-_ZsYTHzXztXwgWSTHThMqK-zLaaB3w88A8578CQPnZ4EhKqc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=e2c9ea0b98b24b528aad72304c4d42df&_t=KeZTB7T7tAk0qI-aXhlafpcgVtl4EdU3m6ioX685qaGHd8OPczhDHOXjxk-_ZsYTHzXztXwgWSTHThMqK-zLaaB3w88A8578CQPnZ4EhKqc%3D)
---

**I have a critical mission for you, Peter.**

On the eve of its 30th anniversary, the Department of Defense National Guard State Partnership Program has matured into thriving security cooperation relationships with 100 nations. "The utility of the SPP is something you can't put a price on," said Army Gen. Daniel Hokanson, 29th Chief of the National Guard Bureau. "The Department of Defense, and the State Department, and -- particularly -- the geographic combatant commanders see the value it provides."

clean_body: On the eve of its 30th anniversary, the Department of Defense Nat | Defending America at Home and Abroad | | | | | On the eve of its 30th anniversary, the Department of Defense National Guard State Partnership Program has matured into thriving security cooperation relationships with 100 nations. "The utility of the SPP is something you can't put a price on," said Army Gen. Daniel Hokanson, 29th Chief of the National Guard Bureau. "The Department of Defense, and the State Department, and -- particularly -- the geographic combatant commanders see the value it provides." | | | | More Stories | | | | State Partnership Program Turns 30: A Crucial Arrow in Ukraine’s Quiver | | State Partnership Program Turns 30: The DOD National Guard State Partnership Program Looks to the Future | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Special Elections Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: $7 for 7 special elections »
body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| | **$7.** That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We have _seven_ special elections on the horizon in critical states like Wisconsin, New Hampshire, and Tennessee – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. But when enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete against the GOP money machine. **Reason #3:** Losing means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states – so $7 can help defeat extremists who are determined to tear down abortion rights and ballot access. [So what do you say? Will you donate $7 today to help elect state Democrats nationwide?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4kzJRZ9QtjtGlUpLn0eclg0Og30sKoSoXMSF5vXoGNJcoj-uWIY9uyIuih2tN4Ntisd9rsDVRehiaffzJg4Ls-Ez23V4NB1KahTtreVecEETGIfaXBPwXoqJMykeAARbGIn8YCk639B7sCfDVJfJ2T9CffxEKCZu3fZXg1J0yIbWP8CA5nmSQEAAWSfIOUlUGDscsvCPN_5kjEAdR5UvzUkyIx2jm8MANoU-oElPxhRO8DPfd_WdtmB_s3VxhwZp5j9GTJNUvjVDyJf-GIfpmzzTchjRdlCS5DZoe1esCu89GjZMNRtvuRLjtKgJ3J2o2B9pLJ6OIa3Bq0fDTGrlKmZa8TUGnBLyjhfttgDb2xsiVsokCI_ZXV6quhRhrdIeZkHfswoECv3awvf-iimnTTHr5Mg-MyNrFZiwCAjpdcgFvz5RjiB99fg-wFCVMnH9F08P4tw_1s_5M8_AUXW3DoAXuKkmKeFF5sk2KkuEulCxFSGFTglRzhyfiXu9vh6T3Bo5mRJKeNsUwdIpuUbEsoE/3xz/aBYu5c1yRhCKm8GkToo5RQ/h0/hMyK37Qfmx5PPS3OvKx1wZ9usHKvMvUP0OkITUwk9b8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Mike Pence
subject: Reclaiming America's moral backbone
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://trk.readactnews._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0JER19QRU5DRV9QTjFfUkVWX0FFLVJBTk8wNzE4MjAyMyJ9/eV_i-H2VJun0TX7SjPLw4A)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,When I'm faced with a big decision, just like you, I turn to the Lord and seek His counsel.And for several months, I spent a lot of time praying with my family and my wife Karen.And now, I'm humbled to tell you...** ****I'm running to become the next Republican nominee for President of the United States.**[**Will you stand with me?**](http://trk.readactnews._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0JER19QRU5DRV9QTjFfUkVWX0FFLVJBTk8wNzE4MjAyMyJ9/g-IzYG3uWZN7Lpu2aWP_8g) The reason I'm running is clear -- we've got a two-fold crisis on our hands in America:
---
1. A very small group of radicals is trying to force all of us to go along with their insane, immoral, and America-destroying agenda.2\. The vast majority of us who disagree with their godless agenda are silenced.
---
And the result is an upside-down world where you can _feel_ the evil around us:
---
| |
* Liberals screaming for their right to abort children
* Everyday schoolteachers pushing sex lessons on 2nd graders
* Our boys being encouraged to 'become girls'
* And our nation being turned into a godless place you no longer recognize.

---
| | **I think you agree -- America can't be great again _without God_.****No other candidate will tell you that.** I'm not sure any other candidate _understands_ that.But you understand.
---
| | [](http://trk.readactnews._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0JER19QRU5DRV9QTjFfUkVWX0FFLVJBTk8wNzE4MjAyMyJ9/0sNVpvcB86AULvQCa4xETQ)
---
| [**That's why I'm praying you'll join _TEAM PENCE_ today by making a contribution of $47 or more.**](http://trk.readactnews._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0JER19QRU5DRV9QTjFfUkVWX0FFLVJBTk8wNzE4MjAyMyJ9/ywFzdd9UsLSam4jN6L2f8Q)
---
[**Join Team Pence**](http://trk.readactnews._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0JER19QRU5DRV9QTjFfUkVWX0FFLVJBTk8wNzE4MjAyMyJ9/EwXDgqqhcyEsSqlQZIJZIg)
---
| | A robust economy, strong military, honest justice, unfettered freedom -- none of that is possible until we reclaim our moral backbone.And though the hour is late for America, I know it's not _too_ late. Just look at what happened when we least expected it...The Lord used three Trump-Pence appointed Supreme Court Justices to light a spark of hope with the reversal of _Roe v. Wade_ and the affirmation of a Constitutional right to prayer in the _Kennedy v. Bremerton School District_.**Now you and I must take that spark and ignite a blaze of Christian Renewal in America.** Because if not you, if not me, then who?[**Please follow this link to join _TEAM PENCE_ by making a contribution of $47 or more today.**](http://trk.readactnews._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0JER19QRU5DRV9QTjFfUkVWX0FFLVJBTk8wNzE4MjAyMyJ9/H036erXztDZ8o5DVdzvtYg)Together we're going to keep HIS name in this race.Because if we do nothing and allow the deceivers to silence us... we're helping them erase God from our nation.I know we'll get the slings and arrows for our beliefs from Democrats and even some big-government, faithless Republicans.But I'm up to the challenge. [**Are you?**](http://trk.readactnews._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0JER19QRU5DRV9QTjFfUkVWX0FFLVJBTk8wNzE4MjAyMyJ9/MnCyBswH8ZvxIoP99yEE0w) Thank you in advance for fighting alongside me to save the soul of America.
---
| | Sincerely, Mike Pence
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0JER19QRU5DRV9QTjFfUkVWX0FFLVJBTk8wNzE4MjAyMyJ9/IHFvTND06Tyy49m0VDrXHw)
---
| | P.S. God has put you and I together at this place and time and given us the tools to counter the deceiving, godless Left. [**Please join _Team Pence_ by making your sacrificial gift of $47 or more today**.](http://trk.readactnews._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0JER19QRU5DRV9QTjFfUkVWX0FFLVJBTk8wNzE4MjAyMyJ9/qKZmNFJeSUV4MkXXGCAPRg) You and I know America can never be great without God! Thank you, Mike.
---

Dear Fellow American, A movement is underway led by leftwing environmentalist activists to decimate America's fossil fuel industries and undermine America's energy independence under the guise of fighting climate change. These activists are shutting down America's gas pipelines, eliminating drilling permits, and dismantling our nuclear power plants. **As a result, Americans are being crushed by high energy prices and our energy infrastructure is deteriorating and becoming more vulnerable to blackouts and "brownouts." ** The leftwing attacks on our domestic energy industries, and their attempts to push the United States toward unreliable energy sources - such as wind and solar - are making our nation weaker and more dependent on our biggest adversaries, like Russia and China. **[This is why PragerU is conducting a survey.](http://trk.libertyledger.)** Your answers to this survey will help PragerU understand where everyday Americans stand on these important issues and the most effective strategies to educate Americans.

name: Don Huffines
subject: Property Rights are Fundamental to Liberty
body:
A Review of the Texas Legislature’s Property Tax Deal
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-x/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## HLF Session Review: Property Taxes
## _" Texas taxpayers were lied to and screwed out of PERMANENT property tax relief."_
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, July 17, 2023 -- Since the Texas Legislature started its regular session in January with a $32 billion budget and approximately $38 billion in potential new revenue over the next two years, Texas taxpayers felt like they had a historic opportunity to set Texas on the path to eliminating the school property tax.However, despite Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick's statement that "Texas homeowners must receive tax relief before we commit to any new spending," at the end of the regular legislative session in May, the Legislature had appropriated $56.5 billion for new spending but had not come up with a plan to provide property tax relief for Texans.Finally, after the Legislature came back for a second called session, the House and Senate agreed on a tax relief package totaling $12.7 billion. While the amount of money dedicated to property tax relief in this agreement is significant--the second largest effort in Texas history--and the numerous ways of delivering tax relief appear impressive,**[there are several shortcomings in this measure approved by the Texas Legislature:](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-j/)**_**1.** Treats the Symptoms without Curing the Disease_ _**2. **Ignores the Fact that the Homestead Exemption is a Three-Time Failed Policy_ _**3.** Turns Texas into New Jersey_ _**4.** Fails to Provide Long-Term Property Tax Relief_If Texas leaders are going to get serious about eliminating our school maintenance and operations property tax (M&O), the Texas Legislature to take **[three steps that lock the state into a path to accomplish this within eight years:](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-t/)**_**1.** Freeze school M&O property taxes for school districts and require voters to approve revenue increases for cities, counties, and special districts_ _**2.** Limit the growth of state spending to 4% per biennium and use 90%of the resulting budget surplus to buy down property taxes_ _**3.** Put these changes into the Texas Constitution to protect Texans from fickle policymakers._ [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-h/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-k/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-u/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-b/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-n/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-f/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-z/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-zdljrtd-l-v)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-p/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-zdljrtd-17329976-yuddtktydi-e) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-zdljrtd-yuddtktydi-s/)

Dear Fellow American, A movement is underway led by leftwing environmentalist activists to decimate America's fossil fuel industries and undermine America's energy independence under the guise of fighting climate change. These activists are shutting down America's gas pipelines, eliminating drilling permits, and dismantling our nuclear power plants. **As a result, Americans are being crushed by high energy prices and our energy infrastructure is deteriorating and becoming more vulnerable to blackouts and "brownouts." ** The leftwing attacks on our domestic energy industries, and their attempts to push the United States toward unreliable energy sources - such as wind and solar - are making our nation weaker and more dependent on our biggest adversaries, like Russia and China. **[This is why PragerU is conducting a survey.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)** Your answers to this survey will help PragerU understand where everyday Americans stand on these important issues and the most effective strategies to educate Americans.

name: ConservativeFWD
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
I need your thoughts quickly.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z13ouo6ifkgpsmgvdskvkdcbmv3itcv4ttokppug_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgeaoj4cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u1om4ppke4rm4or3mup38dj5mgoe2djmm5r62o3geuqb7cpjc3gj1olje2pb5dpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfdr1cpojed9k6upb2phim2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)

| *Sponsored Message* | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zm5sdld2peo2vu5qeg8tqvcda6s9dhffmh0v74jg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgeaoj4cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zc54buj5jvasluc2893uk060ipagr45stopmlqso_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgeaoj4cjh2bs)**
## Do you believe politicians who encourage young people to embrace socialism are doing a disservice to the country?
[YES](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zns859po1tvdphetm2682vsadkjavjf89ufo2oug_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgeaoj4cjh2bs) [NO](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8db5as71vq7bo7bs3fb2o62906kknt5jp27u288_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgeaoj4cjh2bs) Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z62hq6bsntlvchu4an3440cnek7i59a9t9j36cbg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgeaoj4cjh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Conservative FWD, [please use this preferences page](https://e.conservativefwd.com/prefs/9z2zpd99l6bis259tl34ifmefc6fbqrfv8f0b0s282g).
625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z53g0mh1t844jf9p4ja3hldp8o1vvmquftsi91g0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgeaoj4cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

# TUESday, JULY 18, 2023
---|---
**Good morning! **Today in 1921, Babe Ruth hit his 139th home run, making him the all-time HR king, a title he kept for half a century. On the same date in 1928, Ty Cobb slugged his 4,000th hit, a feat not matched until 1984.

In today's edition, we're talking about Tucker Carlson's big sponsorship deal, the discovery of the shiniest planet in space, and buried treasure in Kentucky.

Think we could improve something? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We appreciate hearing from our readers! ## Tucker Wins Seven-Figure Ad Deal
Tucker Carlson has signed [a major ad deal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtu6zAQRL-G6lbgQybpQoUbdb63TDphJa5sOnwYJG3Bfx84adPOADMH5-M8n9EHny7_MNLYtjzj2vyTZm5AWJBqlp0bNyJJqqNRaHvUxiotuutoViXdYDlatFKYRW3CajxYZa2x6nDo_Ci5VNwIy49KD7o33AqtjVysNGbTCxs4Od9y6W_Zp3alLbzyk0q_5tiF8dravTJ1YnJictr3vY81vTsmJ0rwqExOMSd6MTmtOd4xeXpn7bF-UYEVS6g5QcDkKmy-1AYRb7kAOnCEAXx6Um2RUgOfGhWqDbZcINEOkZxH-J19H2CB00m4T_q_dGV0992H4Ks2bOCXiD78MLe_FX4HAAD___jhc_k) worth more than $1 million for his Twitter show with PublicSq, an online marketplace for companies with conservative values. The deal may also include a significant investment in Carlson's new digital media company. The former Fox anchor is seeking "hundreds of millions" of dollars to launch the company, possibly in alliance with Twitter. PublicSq ads are expected to start appearing on [Carlson's show in late August.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQAL8Gd1iwJItdULzGXV57pYVhHXPBJsJ7Qff3p1x99Ugz0nzc5ptPOR33_34nx2uZfeD0ollZqQcJZoYuupUIyHTkNA4j2sGg7jancF2uqP01wAh6XaK5EmAcyS7RENouOVBglNWDGg1esLdq0IgWlgGsXXERF0Uxcan9Z0kHb7Tm7_Ki2oeyd9ltzM9TmH8CJgFTa60PxxLeUMD0VguYlBUwaRQw8Vd4UJXB13yWQ3JLzFTluZUmT67pQaf0UUbyud94z1118dlSzulEKy7qvvuUf8v894ifAAAA__-oE14R) Omeed Malik, one of PublicSq's principals, is also fundraising for Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis and Democrat Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
## States Warn CEOs On Affirmative Action
GOP attorneys general from 13 states [sent a letter to CEOs ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D9vwyAUBPBPY2-O4IHhMTB0yZauHS3-PBJabCyCYuXbV-7c7U63_HRft-Xmcsnb_dOtZHuqiws9v2hheuI4gVhgjDYRAYmRLFdolEah-PiwnsOMEgLO0YOiwCPOQRgZZiOMSXLMFhgIpjkyI5RUF82QK6XBI2idlB8ko5h7bZfvmrf-oFTe9UXtEuo6FvvofX8O4mOA6wBXt290PM_pLK3nUOhMKeW2uhM9nfa6TbTupb6pTUdtP6m2QJNkAhG8d0nPXhoWAmqMNBvutHBKjM3G_cil5KfSg2T31eXyx-j_v_IbAAD__7yRYfs)of the 100 biggest U.S. companies warning them about using race as a factor in hiring and promotions.

The letter cited the recent Supreme Court ruling banning affirmative action for college admissions and [threatened legal action](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2u4yAQQOGnwR0Rfxdw4WIbd3fbLS1ij82sMGPBJFHefpWtb32ao-_P9_KdsGA9fqcTJt5pSSvjExYVpI7S2MUM27QDGLADTNrH0YdovR7y5Fbtgk06um3T0X-5LwjReaWNTnbVesDJKGNV0FGN1jt_Cypq74O5RxPC7u_CKdiQqd3-ElbOsJc3PaHdVjqHMmXmqwv7S5hZmJkzZCzl04SZM51Q4dWFmTsnBvlKvGZhZqdGH9woD7pkYqZW4d3lARVaKvLRDpArtYtaYqTaZToS1s7y0bEeMu07tjN9CORHgqpkkhkbyKvRSQzCzEObtuuFpWD3QTh1nAn_fw38M-G_AAAA___RaHRR) if the CEOs didn't end race preferences at their companies as well.

"If you choose not to do so," the attorneys general wrote, "know that you will be held accountable -- sooner rather than later."
## Manchin to Speak at 'No Labels' Event
Sen. Joe Manchin has spooked Democrats by agreeing to be [the headline speaker](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO4yAQgOGngY4IBgdwQXGNu1x7pYXtIcwdhijMJdq3X-3WW__FL31_bustUaV2_51OjJz7mnamF67aKxMU2BXkETMioJUYjQuz88E6I0sEbxNqB4fPFq55N2DMtGVj7HWbjAFJETRY7U3Qs3WTu3gdjHMetgDeZ7eJSeNB3J-Xv50aF8z1o7_wedn7KWsszI8h7C8Bi4CFCxaq9asJWEo_seF7CFgGtsQoYJn0HOzs1JnaXqipwf0fDjUeuP-viak39SYuqnVV04Z1KHxhYwGLfMbj8aZaaTgvJn0_E32fJP-M8hkAAP__GX9imQ) at an event Monday in New Hampshire for third-party alternative "No Labels."

Manchin [has not announced](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu7CAURL8Gd1hw4QEuKF7jbtOmtFh8vZBgWAFeK38fees0I81Mc2Y-b8vNxRTz48PtaPtWFud7fOHCNOWGglhgWO2GCCgGtFyZSWkjFB-ClRNnoMEIMLitRno1Sem2SaHmSvp_Q7TAQDDNDZuEkmrUzHClNNwNaL2pO5EM19hLHb9KzD3gln7KC-voyz4kG3p_NiL-E5gJzOd5jhWPjrVd_ZWUmlYC89HeQhtm10ulu8s-xEzbE9EH2nr5xnY5fyTXY8n0DLEjDeVoSOuR6cVJr8mawDxUuz7PmFJsShPJHruL6Y3U_37oNwAA__-ftmcW) if he's running for re-election in West Virginia, and Democrats worry he'll run as a spoiler candidate for the moderate No Labels party.

The fear for Democrats is that Manchin will siphon votes from President Biden in a close race, giving an edge to the GOP candidate. Moreover, the party will almost certainly lose a Senate seat to a Republican if Manchin doesn't seek re-election.

clean_body: Tucker Carlson has signed a major ad deal worth more than $1 million for his Twitter show with PublicSq, an online marketplace for companies with conservative values. | | | | | | TUESday, JULY 18, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today in 1921, Babe Ruth hit his 139th home run, making him the all-time HR king, a title he kept for half a century. On the same date in 1928, Ty Cobb slugged his 4,000th hit, a feat not matched until 1984. In today's edition, we're talking about Tucker Carlson's big sponsorship deal, the discovery of the shiniest planet in space, and buried treasure in Kentucky. Think we could improve something? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We appreciate hearing from our readers! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying The Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Tucker Wins Seven-Figure Ad Deal Tucker Carlson has signed worth more than $1 million for his Twitter show with PublicSq, an online marketplace for companies with conservative values. The deal may also include a significant investment in Carlson's new digital media company. The former Fox anchor is seeking "hundreds of millions" of dollars to launch the company, possibly in alliance with Twitter. PublicSq ads are expected to start appearing on Omeed Malik, one of PublicSq's principals, is also fundraising for Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis and Democrat Robert F. Kennedy Jr. States Warn CEOs On Affirmative Action GOP attorneys general from 13 states the 100 biggest U.S. companies warning them about using race as a factor in hiring and promotions. The letter cited the recent Supreme Court ruling banning affirmative action for college admissions and if the CEOs didn't end race preferences at their companies as well. "If you choose not to do so," the attorneys general wrote, "know that you will be held accountable -- sooner rather than later." Manchin to Speak at 'No Labels' Event Sen. Joe Manchin has spooked Democrats by agreeing to be at an event Monday in New Hampshire for third-party alternative "No Labels." Manchin if he's running for re-election in West Virginia, and Democrats worry he'll run as a spoiler candidate for the moderate No Labels party. The fear for Democrats is that Manchin will siphon votes from President Biden in a close race, giving an edge to the GOP candidate. Moreover, the party will almost certainly lose a Senate seat to a Republican if Manchin doesn't seek re-election. Mali is a Russian ally. () ➤ Gov. Ron DeSantis is cutting campaign staff because of financial pressure from his presidential run. DeSantis is trailing Donald Trump significantly in election polls. () ➤ A federal appeals court has temporarily lifted a ban on the Biden administration talking to social media companies about content policy. A Louisiana judge had limited contact between the government and social platforms. ()➤ Meanwhile , the House Judiciary Committee expanded its own inquiry into content moderation to include Threads, Twitter's new rival. name: Committee To Elect Stephen McDow
subject: Reminder: Meet NavJosh our rising star
body:
Team McDow continuning to engage the community!
| | |
---
---
|
---
| | Greetings Friends!
The campaign is gaining steam and we are now talking to two Political Action Committees about endorsements. Team McDow is communicating with many more for potential endorsements.
Young-people in this country are experiencing an unprecedented mental health crisis.
Our Teen & Young Adult researcher was charged back in March to learn what the key issues are amongst teens and young adults and report out. Below is what Mr. NavJosh Sandhu reported.
We are now forming what the next generation of my Character Development Initiative & Policy looks like and his data is essential. This policy was originally led by Dr. Edwin Powell who ran for city council in Washington, DC. I worked on his campaign in 2014 and helped write his then signature policy. I want to pick up where he left off and make it federal law. If you have any feedback about what you would like to see in a youth character development initiative or policy, please email me at: [votestephen@mcdowforcongress.com](mailto:votestephen@mcdowforcongress.com).
More about the campaign: [www.mcdowforcongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017PF3drC7ym6Wjbt8D2albfRTaDnDFqUq_vgAUI8EhapL3clSdrDgtEiC_DbgDWe_rmFfhdekzEKqCFYu-ksF5lGx9YmYCaZxQJZZeSuxEDLyZ07ggP-9eJ0ct4Ao6r8AKWHij05uq3RNwe2F_CP62tT-dWjmO-u9&c=y00LHIK0XaRY42lfK0ukmzD-UAxR-CMSK0J6X_M1S186GfmNsR8Uww==&ch=fYIrSsaAWgM4EHqc_2YhbwM1sD3yiwrn39Oj6YrRHBn07U_UvxBnEw==).

Best,
Stephen
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# Youth's Challenges:
# Mental Health, Disillusionment & Relationships
By NavJosh Sandhu Teen & Young Adult Researcher Northwest High School Graduate (Germantown, MD) University of Maryland, Baltimore County Student
---
|
---
| Mental Health
Factors: Academic pressure, social media influence, financial stress, and societal expectations. Issues: Depression, eating disorders, self-harm, substance abuse:
Academic Pressure: High expectations from parents, competition for college admissions, and the fear of failure, leading to stress, burnout and mental health disorders.
Social Media Influence: The constant exposure to the curated online lives, cyberbullying, impractical projection of online "stars", and social comparisons can lead to low self-esteem, anxiety, and depression.
Financial Stress: Student loans, and difficulties finding stable employment can lead to anxiety and depression.
Societal Expectations: Regarding career choices, relationships, and personal achievements, and struggling to meet their expectations can result in feelings of inadequacy, little to no self-worth, and mental health challenges.
---
| | Disillusionment
Issues: Feelings of disappointment, loss of trust, or skepticism towards societal foundations, systems, and/or ideals: Political: Younger audiences perceive the political system as corrupted, lacking representation, or feel as if their voice is not heard leading to apathy or disengagement from political processes.
Economic: Job instability, income inequality, and difficulties accessing affordable housing or healthcare. The sense of economic disillusionment can lead to brief feelings that upward mobility is unattainable.
Social Justice & Equality: Issues related to racial inequality, gender discrimination, LGBTQ+ rights, and social justice justice contributes to the younger populations desire for a fairer and a more inclusive society.
Relationships
Issues: Peer Positive Friendships foster support, companionship, and a sense of belonging. Challenges like peer pressure, bullying, or social exclusion negatively affect mental health and self-esteem.
Romantic: Young adults engage in romantic relationships to bring joy and fulfillment, which may lead to sexual, physical, and mental abuse, as well as toxic dynamics.
Online: While online relationships offer connection and support, they carry risks, such as cyberbullying, online harassment, and the potential of exploitation.
---
|
---
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017PF3drC7ym6Wjbt8D2albfRTaDnDFqUq_vgAUI8EhapL3clSdrDgtODARQ7WSw-8QMXcO4apqDo55kREu1Ax-yatbShyK_VlcraGcI6_06M8cBrldEu7zzLQdDDK-gGTTUKF4uTnhhRUFJbPSQ3x70stZRGT1Xsz-KmnIZSiTOo=&c=y00LHIK0XaRY42lfK0ukmzD-UAxR-CMSK0J6X_M1S186GfmNsR8Uww==&ch=fYIrSsaAWgM4EHqc_2YhbwM1sD3yiwrn39Oj6YrRHBn07U_UvxBnEw==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017PF3drC7ym6Wjbt8D2albfRTaDnDFqUq_vgAUI8EhapL3clSdrDgtNKllPfaVHOCvxUkNGbilJysE1jm_qr49J8_TIDKis8EvSR8XSByQnljcfiHy3wW-WwssKlBZW71bM6UOTiGykgN_rh7yIswNFl9xcJdpfbr&c=y00LHIK0XaRY42lfK0ukmzD-UAxR-CMSK0J6X_M1S186GfmNsR8Uww==&ch=fYIrSsaAWgM4EHqc_2YhbwM1sD3yiwrn39Oj6YrRHBn07U_UvxBnEw==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017PF3drC7ym6Wjbt8D2albfRTaDnDFqUq_vgAUI8EhapL3clSdrDgtNKllPfaVHOC0_Jx27SANVpDDN9oxts9n7Td70JX3dWvr7kUfjfzPvrzoMarfAcxCJCDbsTmrKg8eER5rHw93-_xRlZeKUrObx5ykVFjAtGaoyBKfVpWzG5a_-df73GhUw==&c=y00LHIK0XaRY42lfK0ukmzD-UAxR-CMSK0J6X_M1S186GfmNsR8Uww==&ch=fYIrSsaAWgM4EHqc_2YhbwM1sD3yiwrn39Oj6YrRHBn07U_UvxBnEw==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017PF3drC7ym6Wjbt8D2albfRTaDnDFqUq_vgAUI8EhapL3clSdrDgtNKllPfaVHOC5U4NJGfkhf6H5ToLNfGSWqWglK4sKti1xOxj2ac2nyWwL8PwlP2GoPz-QnsiPK04RHMtgcmuiebe3RVUJ-tW4pkS0YD9iNJoqS7uEUYUadI=&c=y00LHIK0XaRY42lfK0ukmzD-UAxR-CMSK0J6X_M1S186GfmNsR8Uww==&ch=fYIrSsaAWgM4EHqc_2YhbwM1sD3yiwrn39Oj6YrRHBn07U_UvxBnEw==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017PF3drC7ym6Wjbt8D2albfRTaDnDFqUq_vgAUI8EhapL3clSdrDgtODARQ7WSw-8SoyCdXyvhYChB8mUEzCpwwn3QxNKYdpdYaIc_0TGUKx-d5sSrsznghzrPMeO55KYZTMuOoY9yTBPyGuGVCWzQsqUl5__DnYY1HoqrA8A04g=&c=y00LHIK0XaRY42lfK0ukmzD-UAxR-CMSK0J6X_M1S186GfmNsR8Uww==&ch=fYIrSsaAWgM4EHqc_2YhbwM1sD3yiwrn39Oj6YrRHBn07U_UvxBnEw==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017PF3drC7ym6Wjbt8D2albfRTaDnDFqUq_vgAUI8EhapL3clSdrDgtNKllPfaVHOCuO3wnj5ui8uw8ZS-Rb8pSV_xrfMscpOcKycYvFecTe-FIUReTLdxDGKX7tfnXYY_JrsumjrUjb0I6nSdc1krqgxFx-fiYfNkU7JJwI0AnoXXmw8FjiYwhIb0u-KNbwPd&c=y00LHIK0XaRY42lfK0ukmzD-UAxR-CMSK0J6X_M1S186GfmNsR8Uww==&ch=fYIrSsaAWgM4EHqc_2YhbwM1sD3yiwrn39Oj6YrRHBn07U_UvxBnEw==)

name: Bob MacGuffie
subject: Jim Himes Recommends Sexually Explicit Books for Kids' Summer Reading
body:
Campaign Update
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---
July 18, 2023 Jim Himes must be feeling the heat of the Parents' Rights movement in CT-4 - as well he should. But instead of siding with, or at least empathizing with parents' righteous concern with the spread of sexually explicit books throughout the school classrooms and school libraries, his latest 'update e-mail' distributed throughout the District, calls concerned parents - "extremists." And instead, he is actually promoting these specific books in his suggested "summer reading list." In howling about parents driving an infringement of "free speech," he reveals his own perverse concept of free speech. You just can't make it up. See his reading recommendations [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nJvkDt4HBOvMfo8wGr5GyXlYtgSeQsMyI89u1u0RmPbFPQ42MaWBSNBHIVyA5yZUNiQCR71iDLFvCzMlGFQ6dEt2X8ticqN2j-dSjh-e_QNr5_iBGIlyJAN1UtlBQhF1fjnQeYj5T7vTdXLJVn5TJ6JNPEko1zvhBMFgy3JNUAA=&c=Vd-5zQVBKcEIFfOX90VHAqlQDXRgJyAWgQQuo2jsPOs9VqLS-icETA==&ch=GR0BsBHSoBRLI2OndJactvQYvq2as2oxLTe3XRg27JTY12iJge_-tQ==). Ever the slick wielder of the 'false premise' and 'straw-man argument,' Himes feels compelled to employ the canard that the Parents' Rights movement recommends "book-banning" and the quashing of "freedoms like speech and expression." Fellow Conservative,

**Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe.** We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, _**Joe Biden continues to do nothing.**_

I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster.

**We need to get our country back on track.**

We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. This is disturbing news for environmentalists everywhere. **Bloodthirsty trophy hunters SHOT and KILLED three young wolves near the Wyoming border. These were some of Colorado’s first wild-born wolf pups in more than 80 years! Now the surviving pack members, and decades of wolf conservation, are at extreme risk. **
Here’s the awful situation: **As soon as the Trump administration cut federal protections for gray wolves, trophy hunters went on a KILLING SPREE.** **Hundreds of wolves were murdered in a matter of days!** Colorado conservationists are working against the odds to do the right thing for wolves and the forests they call home.** But Colorado’s wolves can be LEGALLY tortured and killed as soon as they cross state lines!**
It gets worse: The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service has NEGLECTED science-backed wolf recovery for years! **That means pro-hunting states have been totally free to destroy this majestic species for “fun.”**** ****Violent shootings, choking snares, ATV chases and even explosives are still COMPLETELY legal in states like Wyoming. ****That's why we urgently need your help to save gray wolves and the planet they call home – before it’s too late! **
**We MUST stop these merciless attacks on the lives and safety of gray wolves, and protect this crucial species for generations to come.** **But we need to know where our top supporters stand, and we're still missing 26 responses from your area – including yours! We're running out of time, so please, tell us before 11:59 p.m. tonight:**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: NY Times: They Overcounted COVID Deaths
body:
A critical video for you | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/ny-times?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Last week, I said scientific discourse is finally returning. People who got it so wrong are starting to admit it. Well, it's time to talk: of all mainstream media outlets, the [New York Times says the Covid19 toll is probably an exaggeration](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=1866e0b23d&e=9828080a05) (maybe 33% high). How many have been wise and prudent voices have been cancelled for telling this truth before the mainstream media finally admits it? [Please watch my video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=f3350172f3&e=9828080a05) on this breaking news, send it to relatives and friends, and let's have the discussion. [Click the thumbnail below](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=3d19b00afe&e=9828080a05) to view it:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=fb0b26debd&e=9828080a05 "NY Times: They Overcounted COVID Deaths")
---
| It is time to have more robust conversations with compassion and boldness. What did we get wrong? What can we improve? How can we make sure the era of unprecedented government control and manipulation doesn't happen again?

[Watch the video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=1a66cec3ba&e=9828080a05), read the "[_We've Been Played_](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=8f03bd2cba&e=9828080a05)", and continue the dialogue. Our civic discourse relies on it! Remember: "Never Again!"

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---

name: Shift WA
subject: Repealing the Long-Term Care Tax
body:
Republicans will propose legislation allowing people to opt out of the Democrats' burdensome new tax during the next legislative session. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62041425:Ws00XtDrN:m:1:2610672541:28AB534301B780736F328904F8212D55:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, You might have missed the news, but the Democrats' long-term care payroll tax took effect on July 1. Thanks to Democrats, hardworking Washingtonians across our state can expect to feel the weight of an additional financial burden in their next paycheck. Fortunately, there is some hope**. Republican state senators are pushing for new legislation to protect your hard-earned money by ensuring everyone has the freedom to make their own choices regarding the tax. ** During the next legislative session, Republicans will propose legislation allowing people to opt out of the Democrats' burdensome tax. As State Senator John Braun (R-Centralia) rightly pointed out during a recent press conference, the meager benefits of the Democrats' highly flawed program do not justify the high cost imposed on individual workers. **The people of Washington can make informed decisions about their own long-term care needs - contrary to the Democrats' nanny-state agenda.** Several initiatives aiming to change or repeal the burdensome tax are also circulating. To move forward, these initiatives must collect at least 324,516 signatures from eligible voters by December 29, 2023. In the coming months, you can count on us to update you on conservative efforts to reform the long-term care tax. **We here at Shift WA are also keeping a close eye on the initiatives - and we'll let you know which are most likely to succeed.** ** ** It's our mission to empower voters like you with the information you need to help make a difference in our state. By bringing you the information you won't see highlighted in the mainstream media, we're working hard to safeguard the financial well-being of hardworking families across our state. **[But we need your help. Your support and contribution will help ensure that we can continue doing our part in repealing the long-term care tax.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62041426:Ws00XtDrN:m:1:2610672541:28AB534301B780736F328904F8212D55:r)** **[Please consider donating just $25 to our efforts today!](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62041426:Ws00XtDrN:m:1:2610672541:28AB534301B780736F328904F8212D55:r)** Thank you, The Shift WA Team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62041427:Ws00XtDrN:m:1:2610672541:28AB534301B780736F328904F8212D55:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14250486&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWs00XtDrN).
---

Peter, I would like for you to be the first to know about a major decision I have made.

**After much prayer with my family, I am announcing today, my campaign for the U.S. Senate for the Commonwealth of Virginia.**

As a Navy Special Operations Officer, I put my life on the line defending this country and led our troops into some of the most dangerous corners of the world, from Iraq to Afghanistan to Somalia.

But after a 25-year naval career, I’m taking our fight to our homeland to defend our freedom and the American Dream against radical Left politicians who want to destroy them.

You were an incredible part of our last mission, and now, we’re on a new one that I can’t wait to embark on with you.

It’s time we restore OUR Virginia and save OUR country. Fellow Conservative,

**Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe.** We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, _**Joe Biden continues to do nothing.**_

I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster.

**We need to get our country back on track.**

We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, **but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible.** He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and **[needs our help to win.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4b71decbe0a24f0a803e64672b610516&_e=KnA-N9cCdyrmNm86X9M3KVKSqqbz4JZlcK589Z_3ihds0J5W57WjPC3ESczdazgZw4X59fIHG01w0BZNBgxCJyAK3FU-e-NBXFiK-Co0mSnPo0X4oeKrLXcMXHDLq-277dwUChe9Vgjnq8O_sBxbLvCPDuPiXL3AMRC-lzACAkIsi-2pw8pOS0M43OaaifI_MvEvj3ff7NT37J8pjx6z26NwDE9hDOxmCWCojUF7LWW3rNUex_PYtgTch0iXLE5qkrcErXGIezLHELEIKJGIEyFcKSfIlYuTbTJNnCT-eysKuWt9tFJ0SoIn5re4MgAiP7z0PYwibHLW-Pci7ocHVVRrjPUncJe8GYsZCk1Mbz2jr0ASidTnMZ2Z_b4hJS5oX5BOWrivrRxLayiKr3IqEQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: We have the chance to elect the 6th Navy SEAL to the United States Congress next November and I’m asking for your help in getting the job done | | Fellow Conservative, Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe. We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, Joe Biden continues to do nothing. I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster. We need to get our country back on track. We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible. He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and As a Navy SEAL and successful businessman , Tim understands the need for strong American leadership and knows how important it is to fight for hardworking families. I am glad that he’s put himself forward to serve his state, and I am proud to endorse his campaign for U.S. Senate. I’ll be checking to see how much we’re able to raise for Tim Sheehy over the coming days. When I tell you that this request couldn’t be more urgent, I hope you’ll take my word for it. Tim’s opponent has raised $10 MILLION so far this year, meaning Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy needs all the support he can muster. Let me tell you, running for elected office is not easy. Tim Sheehy is going to be working 24/7 for the next 18 months to oust Jon Tester and flip this critical Senate seat for Republicans. The least we can do is show him that we have his back. How can you possibly pass on supporting a former Navy SEAL who has fought and bled for Old Glory? We will never be able solve the serious problems facing our country if we don’t elect serious people to serve. Quite frankly, Tim Sheehy may be our only hope for taking back the Senate. If you have friends and family who donate to conservative causes, please forward this email onto them. Thanks for your consideration, Sen. Marco Rubio United States Senator (R., FL) | | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Joe Sweeney
subject: Let's Make Our Granite State Even Stronger, Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Expand Educational Freedom, Enshrine Parental Rights, Lower Taxes For All.

| | | | |
---
| | Derek,

Granite Solutions recently conducted a survey to understand the key issues that matter to you, our fellow Granite Staters. We believe in hearing from you because you're at the heart of everything we do.

---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/1/0100018968e2682c-a34ad5cd-8f13-41a0-a24e-151df5d243ea-000000/mjWQP_-6huMNoPaHjeD8ASgR91w=331)
---
Our survey highlighted several issues of importance, with Lowering Taxes, Expanding Educational Freedom, Passing Parental Rights, and Protecting the Second Amendment leading the way. **These priorities are fundamental to ensuring the prosperity and freedom of our great state.****
**
We understand that to lower taxes for all, we must continue to uphold fiscal responsibility, promoting growth and prosperity without burdening hardworking Granite Staters. We'll continue to fight for tax fairness and defeat any attempts to impose income or sales taxes.

As for our children's education, I firmly believe that parents know their children best and should have the freedom to choose the best educational path for their children. We'll strive to expand educational freedom by supporting initiatives like Educational Freedom Accounts, tax-credit scholarships, and charter schools, while also pushing for legislation that acknowledges and safeguards the rights of parents in their children's education.

The Second Amendment of our Constitution is a right that we should never take for granted. I assure you that we will steadfastly oppose any measures that unfairly restrict this right, ensuring that responsible, lawful gun ownership is never compromised.

However, these are not the only issues we care about. We understand the importance of preventing crime, making childcare accessible via free market reforms, and protecting ratepayers. I assure you that your concerns are our concerns, and we will work diligently on these fronts as well, always seeking free market, citizen-focused solutions.

I'm excited about the work ahead and even more eager to tackle these issues head-on with you. With your support, we can continue to make New Hampshire an even better place to live, work, and thrive.

Your support means everything to us. If you can, [please consider making a donation to help us continue our work.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/2/0100018968e2682c-a34ad5cd-8f13-41a0-a24e-151df5d243ea-000000/yjW0Rxap6KcMgmAmLPjwqt20JQQ=331) Let's stand together for a stronger Granite State.

Best,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions

**_The Guardian:_ Record ocean temperatures put Earth in ‘uncharted territory’, say scientists**
_“‘Unprecedented’ warming indicates climate crisis is taking place before our eyes”_ Peter — we can’t ignore the imminent, existential threat of climate change. We’ve known for years that our planet is at a turning point. Yet too many far-right legislators in Raleigh and Washington, D.C. are still ignoring it — or even playing it off as a hoax. Now, we’re seeing yet another indicator of the damage climate change has already inflicted on us as ocean temperatures soar. This warming is a dire threat to marine ecosystems on coasts like ours, and the accelerating rise in temperatures could be a signal that even worse is yet to come. **[Roy needs to know you’re with him now. clean_body: Coasts like ours are in danger! | The Guardian: Record ocean temperatures put Earth in ‘uncharted territory’, say scientists “‘Unprecedented’ warming indicates climate crisis is taking place before our eyes” Peter — we can’t ignore the imminent, existential threat of climate change. We’ve known for years that our planet is at a turning point. Yet too many far-right legislators in Raleigh and Washington, D.C. are still ignoring it — or even playing it off as a hoax. Now, we’re seeing yet another indicator of the damage climate change has already inflicted on us as ocean temperatures soar. This warming is a dire threat to marine ecosystems on coasts like ours, and the accelerating rise in temperatures could be a signal that even worse is yet to come. One of Roy’s key priorities as governor has always been to set North Carolina on a path to a clean energy economy, which is key to protecting our planet for future generations. The facts are clear: Greenhouse gas emissions are endangering our planet’s future, and we have to transition away from fossil fuels to secure our future. Renewable energy is also critical to ensuring that our electric grid is resilient and reliable for years to come. | Thanks for your attention to this important issue, Team Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: Peter, I need your help to win one of the most important races of 2024
body:
We can take this House seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81db13fd-e893-418a-9502-907749c5b54d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c9f1d9b-174a-4697-a21e-45f7646427c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hey, it’s Al Franken. [I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Blue Amp Action and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0db121c-0b82-4dcf-937e-14e16a220195/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too! Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence. In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law. Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations. [Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te466b6b5-5355-473b-99e1-9fb1f659f45c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e5b892c-61ce-41f0-bbf9-821ef5e34cf7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them. Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know. And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation. [So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf07ff5d0-6c36-457a-9d20-95b98a64b75b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is important to me. And to our nation. Thanks, Al [P.S. I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works! DONATE HERE.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc1d5d7e-691e-443d-9a4a-d38c4015730f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | | | | Hey, it’s Al Franken. Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too! Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence. In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law. Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations. | | | | | | | | Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them. Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know. And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation. This is important to me. And to our nation. Thanks, Al | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

body:
This is the best thing you can do right now...The only way to ensure that the America First agenda is enshrined...| | | Peter, The only way to ensure that the America First agenda is enshrined into the history books is to have a Republican Senate. Republicans MUST take back the Senate in 2024 because I'll need a **[red Senate](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6cae88d6bdd144e699d2bc8ca1a92b27&_e=YwCMIgf3fTF23D7ThZj8nTR7fkUwH-pPrqBgq5ObWu_ZLyZr4nuo5ZDh5Eo-KYhibYBi0ewma2820qS5QPcbSLdsCnaobP3YNdJMovpW5JMJAkiEztZepqw5aZBarZPX_UL7RlreXu5iLrRK_kSaITVCXYy4MiANMR4_ca5wgYPHS8WQl0MvpLX9vPR_2gvw_aVfh5VVyjFNqofz-FFipDB1fPIKhgyHI2ivoJ7euX2RI1a5hGmI3ngusHdDXrqYHZ2i640wysOAUYf73x0vZCGQfxMx_PI_WhdI7DRlvdNb92ipOEinrKENhw6HRZ5y2C5fRhwMjDQtEIayXpw7p8zTYtbjc1n3KVElccZ_3RaDorl3tdWk1127BmMKK2t_3m89p3CSu52vj6lyb_VVbOLxdiD5Hj9RyosnTf0WLsBUuiACMFO75qCSl4mX0V9S)** to restore the Make America Great Again movement when I'm back in the White House. You might be watching the Left destroy our great country, day after day, and wonder what you can do to stop them right now. Well Peter, you can step up now and ensure that Republican Senate candidates take back the Senate in 2024. [**Will you chip in $5, $15, $25, or more today to help the NRSC do this?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6cae88d6bdd144e699d2bc8ca1a92b27&_e=YwCMIgf3fTF23D7ThZj8nTR7fkUwH-pPrqBgq5ObWu_ZLyZr4nuo5ZDh5Eo-KYhibYBi0ewma2820qS5QPcbSLdsCnaobP3YNdJMovpW5JMJAkiEztZepqw5aZBarZPX_UL7RlreXu5iLrRK_kSaITVCXYy4MiANMR4_ca5wgYPHS8WQl0MvpLX9vPR_2gvw_aVfh5VVyjFNqofz-FFipDB1fPIKhgyHI2ivoJ7euX2RI1a5hGmI3ngusHdDXrqYHZ2i640wysOAUYf73x0vZCGQfxMx_PI_WhdI7DRlvdMBdIXK39amLobv6FKsGUMl0UAX5I5ERVXHKaemxMy9LGlufJXUtr9Az0zboZgJheIIkFDLJIoNzcj7WHxtwEcrwJM7b3rke71eb4Aw488_mn2GTyYMMWwlbmS2DrbRQxvBM88SnUPixoYBMLzzZLkA)

name: Deadline Approaching via Allred for TX
subject: defeating Ted Cruz is too important for us to come up short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter, this race is simply too important for us to come up
short. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19000?t=1001&akid=3409%2E346206%2E1lHSBM ]Ted Cruz is beatable, but we can’t fall short in July. So
please, split a donation of $25 before midnight between my campaign and
Charles Booker to help us flip TX blue! →

FIRST, Colin Allred launched his campaign and shattered Texas fundraising
records on day one!

THEN, experts at Inside Elections and the Cook Political Report upgraded
our chances of flipping this seat, shifting Texas from a Solid Republican
seat to a BATTLEGROUND.

NOW, a brand-new poll shows Colin is just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, and
14% of voters are still undecided!

It's crystal clear: Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator,
and we've got a real chance of flipping this seat – which would all but
guarantee Democrats hold onto our critical Senate majority. But it's not
going to be easy, and Colin's counting on YOUR grassroots support to give
him the resources to fire Ted Cruz next November.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19000?t=1002&akid=3409%2E346206%2E1lHSBM ]We cannot afford to fall short, so please, before midnight, rush $25 or
more between our campaign and Charles Booker to help Colin defeat Ted
Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority! →

Let’s do this.

– Team Allred

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230718-3409-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3409_346206_1lHSBM&akid=3409%2E346206%2E1lHSBM
