Fellow Conservative,

**Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe.** We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, _**Joe Biden continues to do nothing.**_

I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster.

**We need to get our country back on track.**

We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, **but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible.** He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and **[needs our help to win.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b59114e185a24cb18693aec4a82d2304&_e=kEwmpl2aG9agA6d89tEWYOeZFjxN96NPj2fV14jpuGmQlAvcf5F0yhpJ5D84VSJGUayILqAltKSMFSbsWXdqp5NZpwAX6nkYWZvuCyQhvbVvKCIo874P9hilfdNSoMZ0QB3Z4RtNArVEbFt_U0aF-g2bYYk6OCMe44GAv4HQGkhDRgqKks9YKOrsLiVadJFoVwiSV3G2bMeVBKT9Dw6IAe8IbnFxEqrZmgB0GbrUgbHsCAsD2I8j3EW-fRJc74nPTdWoFTiI1yJOVA-OCcCAAK5zgjnoNxiOhkL3kOXcdQFmWOTsINWNk15rRVKtOplseQR9j0_xczRorL_aHDrq5HJSI4aBS7K_ZKy1j60fZpiMCu5rCv5IGfSCQOiEYRDXmX5MgAzc-rfCcT18NTcAEw%3D%3D)**

[**SUPPORT A NAVY SEAL FOR U.S. SENATE
DONATE $2
**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b59114e185a24cb18693aec4a82d2304&_e=kEwmpl2aG9agA6d89tEWYOeZFjxN96NPj2fV14jpuGmQlAvcf5F0yhpJ5D84VSJGUayILqAltKSMFSbsWXdqp5NZpwAX6nkYWZvuCyQhvbVvKCIo874P9hilfdNSoMZ0QB3Z4RtNArVEbFt_U0aF-g2bYYk6OCMe44GAv4HQGkhDRgqKks9YKOrsLiVadJFoVwiSV3G2bMeVBKT9Dw6IAe8IbnFxEqrZmgB0GbrUgbFZDmzdZ4v7OouDsYGlUI5xfh-MEhUONxBRAsDV5BebXbNTgvM2WKVmjw5cq_N2gIePLbXdg3J6R1J52y_N3SCcQ8EmQPcEK_sKgEOZxLu6drgA9LCGpQCZt4vAdVBYY9myfmmeQ1Z48aalP2YRjKkZ0RQZslZo5-HrUafXoHzP7mor17WFSw5x9GSZmMdHvVs%3D)
**As a Navy SEAL and successful businessman** , Tim understands the need for strong American leadership and knows how important it is to fight for hardworking families. I am glad that he’s put himself forward to serve his state, and **I am proud to endorse his campaign for U.S. Senate.**
**[Will you let me know that you got this email by chipping in $2, $5, or even $20 right now?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b59114e185a24cb18693aec4a82d2304&_e=kEwmpl2aG9agA6d89tEWYOeZFjxN96NPj2fV14jpuGmQlAvcf5F0yhpJ5D84VSJGUayILqAltKSMFSbsWXdqp5NZpwAX6nkYWZvuCyQhvbVvKCIo874P9hilfdNSoMZ0QB3Z4RtNArVEbFt_U0aF-g2bYYk6OCMe44GAv4HQGkhDRgqKks9YKOrsLiVadJFoVwiSV3G2bMeVBKT9Dw6IAe8IbnFxEqrZmgB0GbrUgbHsCAsD2I8j3EW-fRJc74nPSKkDThoKVOcs2BgG82ShkAGPmiHkR1kih5PBRIKYoVLamVpMd5LIZAvECDxBmpWodPG8R-oZpC1FgHp2d4TVq5qA7wE0wkGJXHlu1hqMGysBV4gzzTNBPjEZeM1gmw6MI7plCmMczSPAGTMlIXDpUg%3D%3D)** I’ll be checking to see how much we’re able to raise for Tim Sheehy over the coming days. When I tell you that this request couldn’t be more urgent, I hope you’ll take my word for it. Tim’s opponent has raised $10 MILLION so far this year, _**meaning Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy needs all the support he can muster.**_

clean_body: You genuinely couldn’t find a better candidate to take out a progressive Democrat than this guy | | Fellow Conservative, Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe. We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, Joe Biden continues to do nothing. I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster. We need to get our country back on track. We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible. He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and As a Navy SEAL and successful businessman , Tim understands the need for strong American leadership and knows how important it is to fight for hardworking families. I am glad that he’s put himself forward to serve his state, and I am proud to endorse his campaign for U.S. Senate. I’ll be checking to see how much we’re able to raise for Tim Sheehy over the coming days. When I tell you that this request couldn’t be more urgent, I hope you’ll take my word for it. Tim’s opponent has raised $10 MILLION so far this year, meaning Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy needs all the support he can muster. Let me tell you, running for elected office is not easy. Tim Sheehy is going to be working 24/7 for the next 18 months to oust Jon Tester and flip this critical Senate seat for Republicans. The least we can do is show him that we have his back. How can you possibly pass on supporting a former Navy SEAL who has fought and bled for Old Glory? We will never be able solve the serious problems facing our country if we don’t elect serious people to serve. Quite frankly, Tim Sheehy may be our only hope for taking back the Senate. If you have friends and family who donate to conservative causes, please forward this email onto them. Thanks for your consideration, Sen. name: Doug Ducey
subject: Free enterprise
disclaimer_text: paid for by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
| | |
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6fc7f7b9ca01b87a36ff93d4ab7bd0b7/43363/ba18f703d09d95a8/15fdb3fa507b0fd9c3d6b838967d376c/43363)
---
Friends,

I wanted to take a moment to touch base.

First off, I can’t tell you how grateful I am for all the support you have provided to me the past decade-plus, and especially how encouraging you’ve been about my future since the new year.

My first day out-of-office started exactly how you’d expect – with a trip to Costco :-) – and it’s continued with lots of needed downtime with friends and family, especially with Angela and the boys.

It’s also been highly productive. I’ve continued to focus on and advocate for the issues near and dear to my heart – school choice, opportunity for all, and defense of our free enterprise system. It turns out the “Arizona story” is one that a lot of people around the country want to know more about. I’m especially proud that our landmark Educational Savings Accounts - total school choice for ALL families - is now being replicated in states coast to coast. Eight states have followed this year alone, and more are on the way.

Often I’ve been asked – So, what’s next? And in answering that question, I kept coming back to the place I started...

It’s hard to believe, but it was more than 20 years ago that we launched Cold Stone Creamery. And it was that private sector, entrepreneurial experience that ultimately inspired me to run for office - first as Treasurer, and then as Governor. I felt like we could bring some real-life, business-like principles to state government. And we did. We actually left office with fewer state employees than when we came in, despite our population exploding, and providing services in a more customer-oriented, people-focused way. We passed the lowest flat tax in America, and turned a billion-dollar deficit into a multi-billion-dollar surplus.

Fact is, the free enterprise system matters to me – I believe it’s what lifts people out of poverty, provides new generations a shot at the American Dream and paves the way for opportunity for all. Free enterprise is a shot at a better life, a new career and the pursuit of happiness without the heavy hand of government standing in the way.

Lately though, free enterprise is under increased attack everywhere we turn. We see it in failing states, where bad public policy is pushing people and jobs away. In some ways, Arizona and other states have benefitted from this exodus, but to preserve the strength and prosperity of our nation, more work is needed to push back on these bad policies and to encourage the right ones.

That’s why I’m excited to announce the launch of a new effort I have been asked to lead – [**Citizens for Free Enterprise**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6fc7f7b9ca01b87a36ff93d4ab7bd0b7/43363/ba18f703d09d95a8/2c4994368c88f894c3d6b838967d376c/43363).

I will serve as CEO of this new and exciting organization, and we have already started building out an impressive team of backers. This is a start-up, and I’ve got some experience in that arena.

[Citizens for Free Enterprise](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6fc7f7b9ca01b87a36ff93d4ab7bd0b7/43363/ba18f703d09d95a8/cc763bdb9f43e414c3d6b838967d376c/43363) will be 100% focused on the promotion and preservation of our free enterprise system. This is a national effort, eventually in all 50 states, dedicated to galvanizing Americans around the principles that have lifted so many out of poverty, and made this the greatest country in the history of mankind.

Our goal will be to support policies and people that allow for free enterprise to flourish, and to engage everyday Americans, small business owners, college students and anyone dedicated to freedom and free enterprise in this effort. Our hope is to attract new people and young Americans around this important cause.

I will have more to share along the way, but I wanted you to be among the first to know about this next adventure. It’s rooted in a core principle I truly care about, and I know you do, too.

Many thanks and talk soon,
---
---
[VISIT OUR NEW WEBSITE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6fc7f7b9ca01b87a36ff93d4ab7bd0b7/43363/ba18f703d09d95a8/5362cd1f0584892cc3d6b838967d376c/43363)
---
|
---
# ABOUT CITIZENS FOR FREE ENTERPRISE
---
Citizens for Free Enterprise stands at the center of the fight for continued American prosperity. We promote free enterprise, so all Americans understand the role it has in creating a dynamic economy and people’s ability to climb the income ladder.

With the help of principled lawmakers and people like you, we can safeguard for everyone an economic system that provides equality of opportunity for all who seek a happier, more financially secure life. Citizens for Free Enterprise exists to act against threats to economic freedom and to tell the story of free enterprise’s importance in achieving the American Dream.
---
## _ We believe that free enterprise is the bedrock of a prosperous society, enabling economic growth, job creation, and the betterment of people’s lives. _
---
---
| | Paid for jointly by Citizens for Free Enterprise and Citizens for Free Enterprise Action. Citizens for Free Enterprise and Citizens for Free Enterprise Action are separate and distinct organizations. Not paid for by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
[citizensforfreeenterprise.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6fc7f7b9ca01b87a36ff93d4ab7bd0b7/43363/ba18f703d09d95a8/7208c3ba37b78cdcc3d6b838967d376c/43363)

[FORWARD TO A FRIEND](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=6fc7f7b9ca01b87a36ff93d4ab7bd0b7&c=43363&jid=ba18f703d09d95a8&d=3af44e153b81ecc4c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/fwtf/fwtf.cfm?eid=6fc7f7b9ca01b87a36ff93d4ab7bd0b7&c=43363&jid=ba18f703d09d95a8) | [UNSUBSCRIBE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=6fc7f7b9ca01b87a36ff93d4ab7bd0b7&c=43363&jid=ba18f703d09d95a8&d=45ca3a43378962d0c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?unsubscribe=1&eid=6fc7f7b9ca01b87a36ff93d4ab7bd0b7&c=43363&jid=ba18f703d09d95a8)
---

This is a national effort, eventually in all 50 states, dedicated to galvanizing Americans around the principles that have lifted so many out of poverty, and made this the greatest country in the history of mankind. Our goal will be to support policies and people that allow for free enterprise to flourish, and to engage everyday Americans, small business owners, college students and anyone dedicated to freedom and free enterprise in this effort. Our hope is to attract new people and young Americans around this important cause. I will have more to share along the way, but I wanted you to be among the first to know about this next adventure. It’s rooted in a core principle I truly care about, and I know you do, too. Many thanks and talk soon, | ABOUT CITIZENS FOR FREE ENTERPRISE Citizens for Free Enterprise stands at the center of the fight for continued American prosperity. We promote free enterprise, so all Americans understand the role it has in creating a dynamic economy and people’s ability to climb the income ladder. With the help of principled lawmakers and people like you, we can safeguard for everyone an economic system that provides equality of opportunity for all who seek a happier, more financially secure life. Citizens for Free Enterprise exists to act against threats to economic freedom and to tell the story of free enterprise’s importance in achieving the American Dream. We believe that free enterprise is the bedrock of a prosperous society, enabling economic growth, job creation, and the betterment of people’s lives. | | Paid for jointly by Citizens for Free Enterprise and Citizens for Free Enterprise Action. Citizens for Free Enterprise and Citizens for Free Enterprise Action are separate and distinct organizations. Not paid for by any candidate or candidate’s committee. |

Matt Dolan

name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6ebf5a0ba71e4d3387fbceabf27af9e3&_e=j0MaXyKCE16NDS7_sJL7iN1vw_1UQzvOugDvAVA_5NxiGjGJ7Zp3VG-d-Q_9AIyKh248Bxr0EsMWBis5SEr0mMuKFJ3Wt0PWVU_zdWHM0YfwBYt9QDPYL0wm2KAiD2sD8YfHzhHv1ZGbAdbLy_1EBFE_tD3NuZQdS4Pih1UIeT159KEFXc32AtL2i68waFmB141KbiVjh5zo_iFtiBiJO03I3XVqaTjjWYxEIQrvAAyI2pUyNawn794ajvxakenC-2HqcrHWPRi3gsM8_zjb51fYZ_qwFUf0R_41eqXfP8QLfHdEDQ_pfZkeJXUUr5Y4JeuaAqbca4vouWfUEemXGnFCsUDpquFm0OyoHcZvFwod7C0rqXE79q7qsUT4Goj9)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6ebf5a0ba71e4d3387fbceabf27af9e3&_e=j0MaXyKCE16NDS7_sJL7iN1vw_1UQzvOugDvAVA_5NxiGjGJ7Zp3VG-d-Q_9AIyKh248Bxr0EsMWBis5SEr0mMuKFJ3Wt0PWVU_zdWHM0YfwBYt9QDPYL0wm2KAiD2sD8YfHzhHv1ZGbAdbLy_1EBFE_tD3NuZQdS4Pih1UIeT159KEFXc32AtL2i68waFmB141KbiVjh5zo_iFtiBiJO7XLOggq-MEHqG4jzThatTm02XD5GJrs17TaggofoYwzvKgGN-M-aSsZBHLLyJVilD-MGSgTovJz55e4rpojssUeu2Z-y7XvUb16GTQJMPykzPrJcxsQoFVKrUInu4drTyv4JMo-JNKtsoj9LimWo97K2xE9MFo_zQW81CNi57H8)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6ebf5a0ba71e4d3387fbceabf27af9e3&_e=j0MaXyKCE16NDS7_sJL7iN1vw_1UQzvOugDvAVA_5NxiGjGJ7Zp3VG-d-Q_9AIyKh248Bxr0EsMWBis5SEr0mMuKFJ3Wt0PWVU_zdWHM0YfwBYt9QDPYL0wm2KAiD2sD8YfHzhHv1ZGbAdbLy_1EBFE_tD3NuZQdS4Pih1UIeT159KEFXc32AtL2i68waFmB141KbiVjh5zo_iFtiBiJO03g0catmKgh0NvOVx3iGd7HJEN20TpMEop31X2cO_4Sx8MEYL-Gz4a9A-d0R5_OYqBAlZ3-IMleMBKrkxu-XBemZp2Sqjo7xUpAzkmCdUY4rYWAJkwvcSHVvYDmjBl1kOLNifjbnkehuQTbijdw5f7Ny53mHLhO8BQdreIIWIuu)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6ebf5a0ba71e4d3387fbceabf27af9e3&_e=j0MaXyKCE16NDS7_sJL7iN1vw_1UQzvOugDvAVA_5NxiGjGJ7Zp3VG-d-Q_9AIyKh248Bxr0EsMWBis5SEr0mMuKFJ3Wt0PWVU_zdWHM0YfwBYt9QDPYL0wm2KAiD2sD8YfHzhHv1ZGbAdbLy_1EBFE_tD3NuZQdS4Pih1UIeT159KEFXc32AtL2i68waFmB141KbiVjh5zo_iFtiBiJO5aQ3XlA4FaRKNuo7E5ERJpn6REj842VeG8KcatzCSSCf0DxsgBrA1quVqiZSsVu6CUWRDIhmZ_6IsSilmiahWujomG6-yQS3BrZbBgCTGHS3bhb6PqJIm_0Oiwgz_Gbc7ovL4zHPzQAqSqW0thQm67kpbhotVA7LENwm8K7QLOU)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6ebf5a0ba71e4d3387fbceabf27af9e3&_e=j0MaXyKCE16NDS7_sJL7iN1vw_1UQzvOugDvAVA_5NxiGjGJ7Zp3VG-d-Q_9AIyKh248Bxr0EsMWBis5SEr0mMuKFJ3Wt0PWVU_zdWHM0YfwBYt9QDPYL0wm2KAiD2sD8YfHzhHv1ZGbAdbLy_1EBFE_tD3NuZQdS4Pih1UIeT159KEFXc32AtL2i68waFmB141KbiVjh5zo_iFtiBiJO8l_1LjIWXWmrqhPd-VyBDdgwKwMPC062MzU8mlGnJBG8Bif7NwQfa2pv8n4doSPv-t1vz4OoybA9Vc-Dk7pMeUHRIeuKKTEQ_HrfCPyfZlTwEH3lKFf-SX5TNeJ0aCeHX-_xDGhzdsB_Ulm2EYEoE2vi9bn8bOwVfM_IsldDsSQ)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6ebf5a0ba71e4d3387fbceabf27af9e3&_e=j0MaXyKCE16NDS7_sJL7iN1vw_1UQzvOugDvAVA_5NxiGjGJ7Zp3VG-d-Q_9AIyKh248Bxr0EsMWBis5SEr0mMuKFJ3Wt0PWVU_zdWHM0YfwBYt9QDPYL0wm2KAiD2sD8YfHzhHv1ZGbAdbLy_1EBFE_tD3NuZQdS4Pih1UIeT159KEFXc32AtL2i68waFmB141KbiVjh5zo_iFtiBiJO1t4AHrpOV4_PDerf3XeQvaLIXK9AXlYB-4YNnrdH_xB_O3B4ky4xN8g62WE5BZ0O3uYDIm3KqqM2NH1nbWIYPMwC0r-G_HbKAyjF1gn84euv0n7fXz5WVcOuUgI-n1iBIX1Xac5tzeY1eXm0fE-nIEvaJRPurqh_1bIX0SUHd6i)
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)
---
|
---
**TEXT HUNG TO 21412**
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6ebf5a0ba71e4d3387fbceabf27af9e3&_e=j0MaXyKCE16NDS7_sJL7iN1vw_1UQzvOugDvAVA_5NxiGjGJ7Zp3VG-d-Q_9AIyKh248Bxr0EsMWBis5SEr0mMuKFJ3Wt0PWVU_zdWHM0YfwBYt9QDPYL0wm2KAiD2sD8YfHzhHv1ZGbAdbLy_1EBFE_tD3NuZQdS4Pih1UIeT159KEFXc32AtL2i68waFmB141KbiVjh5zo_iFtiBiJOyOCpe7A5U639qNQRawgNZCDQ0_qzEo5A3bTmVng0-OmvRhnkPuHbjM5xguli2U07EFve96zONZe8rDCd25qw2HbTpniCxKvAYI5mSqTOvJcmAzXmrUJFlEkIs2xOAY_GDm-Nrv-hk7wagYJsiS0sYOq3vlLozycOCacekSe4E7R)
---
[**JOIN TEAM CAO!**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6ebf5a0ba71e4d3387fbceabf27af9e3&_e=j0MaXyKCE16NDS7_sJL7iN1vw_1UQzvOugDvAVA_5NxiGjGJ7Zp3VG-d-Q_9AIyKh248Bxr0EsMWBis5SEr0mMuKFJ3Wt0PWVU_zdWHM0YfwBYt9QDPYL0wm2KAiD2sD8YfHzhHv1ZGbAdbLy_1EBFE_tD3NuZQdS4Pih1UIeT159KEFXc32AtL2i68waFmB141KbiVjh5zo_iFtiBiJO5RT2JvVNiqGOt_P6EyNjDk8OP4Al3pCpTQ3tPVQ0QFqC_lVFl81UdOE2sdQoNODqDydDQj6P8FvaNNDG3Og_caPFXr7vGpMdTxQDsyvvJscAy5zIgzkqfzgFRf9gj_B_n9Jr2o693OnaNnFhN7KSFmNVL2LZMaOK57XHAootRls)

And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon. Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones. In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability. We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny. I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values. I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families. We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them. Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish. I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter. Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us. Thank you for your support, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp9p5r4jopcec8jq7k1d9uenr0m8e01tovrkhfpo_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp36brgufctrqi4bfafb9m03foikd4onhe04p1p8_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zijcucmj7mvgreb183rbtauicli4cujpfiej97oo_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6ajg1af554m8ga64ndaehla4608q80c5srivpuo_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm5pn3lr5esnt9778glqhibgm37rbgo9kqedjjro_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqts8bshb6239s89g92mgpira7n79kn355gbbqm0_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjtt0nh9dvmf3b5b7mcvjfvlofto0ngck9j3musg_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqn7ofps3vfmnau5hcfk66cla8aft8esdri4lkcg_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt4tucvug4bpl3n0q2o2gf27isdhfht60oopt948_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za1lugqp5hta83hcefr7pnli29rpcuepb4qvpbm8_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoobgcboua27kv0sa58ceiesffv3gf1sq45a1vso_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvhqj4ptdgtl97k155f1jdide2sp412p24383s8g_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6v46478b10ke1931ptio9tjoq0eq4g5lhtigo8o_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8ppe8cqa8849v6t67amn0u3o6acn4nt3jg9egm0_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znp8rk0u8038s16c980jnoureesil3a5mhooho98_rp22sh2s8i66o74stg68ob1c1h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

GOP Presidential

If you agree, I need you to keep reading.

Last Friday, the White House pulled one of the biggest**Swamp Tactics** in the book.

They released full documentation that EXPOSED his cabinet. It revealed there were:
---
* The State Department had **_no plans_** in place to coordinate the withdrawal
* They ignored the Kabul diplomats who warnings

| | Options ARE always better, y'all. Just like with cars, homes, and even what you're planning for dinner...I like to have options and so should America when comes to choosing their next commander-in-chief. Don't let early polls and rhetoric get you down about the upcoming presidential election. A majority of Americans are clamoring for a new direction led by common sense leaders...the problem is only 23% of voters actually vote in primaries. This is our chance to change the trajectory of our country, to stop thinking about the short-term, to invest in the future of this nation, and to point us in a more hopeful direction. **I'm sick of the in-party fighting and divisive rhetoric that's tearing our country apart. ** Join me in the fight for a future grounded in common sense that will prioritize the needs of the American people and build on our strengths as a nation. _**I'm asking you to make your FIRST donation today of as little as $1.**_

**Knock, knock, knock.**

_It’s the scariest sound you’ll hear when you live in a communist country._

_It’s the last sound my parents heard when their fathers were taken away._

_It’s the sound of always living in fear, and it’s my family’s real-life story._

We escaped from Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists, and we were given a new life in the most generous country on Earth.

**America saved my life, and I dedicated my life to paying her back.**

I graduated from the United States Naval Academy and served for 25 years in Navy Special Operations in Iraq, Afghanistan, Somalia, and Pakistan and 40 other countries around the world.

I love this country - but right now, it’s taken a dark turn.

Now, the knocks are coming from Joe Biden’s Department of Justice. Sending two dozen armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist in front of his family. Raiding gun shops and seizing records from law-abiding gun owners. Arresting his challenger in the next election.

_And he’s doing it all while real criminals are free to roam our streets._

We are losing our country. You know it. But you also know we can save it.

I’ve been all over the world. Believe me when I tell you, if America fails, there is nowhere else to go.

**It’s time to save America while we still have a chance.**

**I’m Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I’m running for the United States Senate.**

clean_body: | | | Knock, knock, knock. It’s the scariest sound you’ll hear when you live in a communist country. It’s the last sound my parents heard when their fathers were taken away. It’s the sound of always living in fear, and it’s my family’s real-life story. We escaped from Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists, and we were given a new life in the most generous country on Earth. America saved my life, and I dedicated my life to paying her back. I graduated from the United States Naval Academy and served for 25 years in Navy Special Operations in Iraq, Afghanistan, Somalia, and Pakistan and 40 other countries around the world. I love this country - but right now, it’s taken a dark turn. Now, the knocks are coming from Joe Biden’s Department of Justice. Sending two dozen armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist in front of his family. Raiding gun shops and seizing records from law-abiding gun owners. Arresting his challenger in the next election. And he’s doing it all while real criminals are free to roam our streets. We are losing our country. You know it. But you also know we can save it. I’ve been all over the world. Believe me when I tell you, if America fails, there is nowhere else to go. It’s time to save America while we still have a chance. I’m Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I’m running for the United States Senate. I still believe America can be the land of opportunity, Friend. And as someone who owes their life to the American Dream, I have an obligation to fight back against those who have trampled on it. We need REAL fighters. Not politicians, not bureaucrats, and not keyboard warriors acting tough in custom-made suits. If we’re going to preserve our freedoms, we can’t be intimidated. We must be fearless. Let’s win this. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)Former Navy Special OperationsCandidate, U.S. Senate (VA) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | | Oscar-Mike, Friends, That means I’m on the move. This is CPT Sam Brown and I was medically retired from the military after I narrowly survived a roadside bomb explosion. **But just because I can’t fight in combat anymore doesn’t mean I’ve given up fighting for our country.** After thirty surgeries and three years of recovery from my injuries, I jumped into action, starting an organization to help injured veterans get the medication they needed. [_**Every soldier knows that serving your country doesn’t end when you take off the uniform.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662849%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2Ia0%2f90Nk%2f8GDJURMX69FQ&sysid=1) Now, I’m running to serve the state of Nevada in the United States Senate against a radical, left-wing rubber stamp for Joe Biden. But I need your help to stay _Oscar-Mike_ , Friends. [_**Can you chip in anything to help me serve in Washington DC?**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662840%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hUI8JSkY8Wk6hoauyQV%2f7A&sysid=1) Thank you for your support. Duty First,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Well that didn't take long.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Susan Wild is already attacking our conservative values. |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends and Neighbors,

It’s only been a week since I announced my run for Congress, and Susan Wild is already running scared.

On Wednesday morning, I touted my company’s recent success in bringing new broadband infrastructure to rural schools in Pennsylvania. By Wednesday afternoon, she sent out an official congressional release touting her broadband infrastructure bill, which passed almost two years ago.

I pointed out that my company’s project used no federal taxpayer money, was up-and-running in less than a year, and allocated 100 percent to real broadband infrastructure. Her bill cost $400 per taxpayer, still isn’t up-and-running, and wastes 35 percent on special interests and bureaucracy.

She couldn't win the debate, so she changed the subject. By Thursday afternoon, **Susan Wild sent out a fundraising email with the subject line, “Kevin Dellicker” that distorted my views and disparaged my supporters. Three days into my candidacy and 481 days before the election, Susan Wild was already done talking about policy and went right to attacking me.**

We should expect more of the same throughout this race. _**Her negative campaigning is not going to work this time.**_

I’m a husband and father who has lived 35 years in the Lehigh Valley. I’m the founder of a successful technology company and a 28-year veteran of the United States Armed Forces. I’m not running for Congress because I need a job. I’m doing this to protect our American way of life.

[**But I can't do this without your help. Will you please join me?**](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=6b094c22f1&e=1090c5c412) Help me counter Susan Wild's message of fear with my message of freedom.

**Together we can protect our hometown values and Keep America Free.**
---
| [DONATE](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b42c3fc274&e=1090c5c412 "DONATE")
---
| If you wish to contribute by check, please mail it to Kevin Dellicker for Congress, P.O. Box 86, Germansville, PA 18053. Please write your employer and profession on the check to comply with federal campaign finance laws.

**Learn more about my campaign at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=3f3833bd03&e=1090c5c412). **

Thank you!

Sincerely,

---

All this despite their credentials, and even after their alternative viewpoints were shown to be true! **_We must STAND UP to stop the silencing of common sense perspectives on social media and beyond._**

**Every American should have the right to express their thoughts freely and openly without fear of censorship or reprisal.
** If you agree, and support REAL Common Sense Solutions that will make our country better (like true freedom of speech), **_[show your support here.](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/7491145fb0b09667924b018571c8b4b3/eJyNkMsKwjAQRf9l1n3Gx6K7UqSUqgvRtdR0wGCbhGRarKX_bnzgSsHtnTNnuDMCoawkFTUkcKUbYzPwwCAXWqCkTEmq-HPKFvN4FnvQCHnJjeo0JOPX5Q_wiGO2nHtAg0aH7HdpVhbb_LgutqUjdWXcjf88EYs-ntUmLdYwTT_F2Apa9c5tISHT4aNRLVwrOpjG8WcibZMw5KptlfQtSos-b7pTYLDvA65C7iJl7Flop6u0Rlm_f1Hi8JJOd54maA4=)_** Thanks for the support, Bill

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Casting the vision...
body:
And taking action.

Peter,

Political burnout is

**real**.

It happens whenever day in and day out, for weeks, months, or even
years, we immerse ourselves wholly and entirely in politics, trying to
do our part for the cause of liberty.

Our blinders can leave us overwhelmed, feeling hopeless, and just...
tired.

How do I know?

LOL - I know.

**Politics is a fight**, and if we're not careful, it's all too easy to
lose sight of why we joined the fight to begin with.

We begin to

**unintentionally** deconstruct our environment to the point that we
become jaded, lackluster in patience, and overwhelmed with defeat.

As a man and a congressional candidate, I am not arrogant enough to
think I can solve everyone's problems.

Instead, I try to be a

**catalyst** to facilitate opportunities for people to show up, get
involved, and work together.

Probably the most disheartening thing I've witnessed is this:

The enemies of our great nation band together, contribute, donate, and
give of themselves freely for what they believe in.

They create

**unrighteous** movements that allow them to

**attack good people**,

**burn cities to the ground**, and

**steal elections** - movements known to gaslight entire populations
into a place of apathy and defeat.

And these movements don't happen by accident - they're

**coordinated** and

**planned**.

But for some reason, the grassroots can't figure out how to create our
own movements...

Even when opportunities present themselves.

I had lunch with some friends last week at Rudy's on 105. I laid out a
plan for Montgomery County - a strategy that, if executed, I know for

**a fact** would mobilize the patriots and conservative grassroots in
ways you've never seen.

My good friend Jon looked at me and said, "

**Jameson, I love it! That's a great idea!**"

But it's what he said next made my heart sink...

"

**The problem is too many ideas and not enough people willing to get off
their butts.**"

**Ouch.**

I couldn't argue with Jon because I knew

**exactly** what he was talking about.

You see...

The left has no problem casting their vision and then acting upon it.

But more often than not, what do most conservatives do?

They

**react** to what the left is

**doing**.

No vision - just reaction.

And as Proverbs 29:18 says, "

**Where there is no vision, the people perish.**"

**So let me ask you:**

What is

**your** vision, Peter?

What kind of a country would you like to leave the next generation?

And what are you doing

**right now** to see your vision come to fruition?

I wonder if anyone else has cared enough to ask you that because it can
be a tough question.

Why?

Because questions like that require us to stop, take stock, and dig
deep.

**My vision is simple:**

**One nation under God, indivisible, with liberty and justice for all.**

**I'll break down my action plan into three stages:**

* Mobilization

* Education

* Activation

How does it work?

Let me take a moment to break each of these down.

**Mobilization:**

To mobilize patriots, we have to

**engage** them. To engage them, we have to

**hold their attention**. To hold their attention, we must first

**capture their attention**. And to capture their attention, we must

**be interesting** or

**entertaining**.

Patriotic concerts, entertaining events, and community-building patriot
trains are all interesting and entertaining.

When we make things fun, enjoyable, and engaging, they'll continue to
show up because it gives them a break in their normal, everyday grind.

It's community building 101.

**Project Defiant** is all about

**Mobilization**.

**Education:**

Once we've invested the time to mobilize patriots, there will be those
who will want to get more involved and go deeper - it's inevitable. And
because people don't know what they don't know, we can't expect them to
just "figure it out."

This is where training and education come into play.

If we want educated voters, we must teach the current and rising
generations to

**know** their rights,

**defend** their rights, and

**assert** their rights.

We cannot win by being on defense, we win by being on offense.

**The Patriot Academy** is all about

**Education**.

**Activation:**

Once we have educated patriots, we can have educated voters.

But we can also activate them to get involved in grassroots efforts and
volunteer.

But most importantly, we get them plugged in to duplicate this action
plan and take others through this same process!

**In closing...**

This plan will take

**explicit**,

**concise**, and

**intentional** action.

It will also take some time.

The fact is, the Marxists/Globalists were patient and infiltrated our
country and government a little at a time, spanning decades.

When they lost battles, they used it to motivate them to take down
America.

We must have the same resolve... but this only happens when we have
educated, active and involved citizens.

And those already educated, active and involved should encourage more to
do the same.

The real question then becomes this:

"

**Are our methods effectively encouraging citizens to get more involved
or less involved?**"

If our outlook is full of doom, gloom, and hopelessness, then who would
want to get involved?

All over social media, it appears that many of our fellow conservatives
have a doom-and-gloom outlook that makes people feel as if we've already
lost - and if we've already lost, what's the point?

This defeatist mentality is precisely the mentality our enemies want us
to have.

I want to encourage you to keep fighting, Peter.

****Liberty**** or

****death**** - whichever comes first.

Are you with me?

Please reply to this email and let me know if you see the vision and
want to be part of this movement.

**For Liberty,**

https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tJTJGdGhlamFtZXNvbmVsbGlz&sig=GEKykWbNA6QAzdKNDyhbLbF2sQ7tMa4dwdBuiMB36EJF&iat=1689710322&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=V73G9ysRh9QhGLtOGi5isbYMG133ReJYMROknnxBbZh%2B5vsI%3AcV5itoyUPIHQDR6a5FN9rE1xm%2F5Ql6i%2F&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=194A217A1A1677

| | | _"I do solemnly swear that I will faithfully execute the Office of President of the United States, and will to the best of my ability, preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States."_
Friend,

On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That’s up to us, the American people.

We need to elect a President we can be proud of, someone we can trust to do the job with integrity and lead our country in the right direction.

If you wanted a blueprint to ruin America, you'd keep doing exactly what Joe Biden has allowed the radical Left to do for the last few years.

Tim Scott wants to protect America, bring faith back to our country, and provide opportunities for every American.

**We need Tim Scott as our next president!_[If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk5LTdkZDZhZDZlNzcyODQzZjk4ZDNkZmVhZGNjMzhkY2Q0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL3ZvdGUtdGltLXNjb3R0L3N1cHBvcnQtdGltLXNjb3R0LWoyMC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE4X0FFLVNBUDEyLjExMDU2N190MTM2MzkwMS0xMjYwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDIzMDcxOF9BRS1TQVAxMi4xMTA1NjdfdDEzNjM5MDEtMTI2MCJ9/1kHe-Dce06VHgt0NK4ssXw "If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?")_**

On Tim’s first day in office, he will:
* Restart the Keystone Pipeline
* Secure the Border
* Stand up to China
* Restore Parental Rights

You can count on him to **FIRE** Attorney General Merrick Garland, **FIRE** FBI Director Christopher Wray, replace the political appointees in the Department of Justice, and restore confidence and integrity in our government.

**Simply put, Tim Scott will preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk5LTdkZDZhZDZlNzcyODQzZjk4ZDNkZmVhZGNjMzhkY2Q0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL3ZvdGUtdGltLXNjb3R0L3N1cHBvcnQtdGltLXNjb3R0LWoyMC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE4X0FFLVNBUDEyLjExMDU2N190MTM2MzkwMS0xMjYwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDIzMDcxOF9BRS1TQVAxMi4xMTA1NjdfdDEzNjM5MDEtMTI2MCJ9/0jj2dzx7X3-TkKK-ecAWcw "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT")
---

He has already done a great job as a conservative U.S. Senator from South Carolina since 2013. **But to really know Tim, who he is, and what he believes, you have to see where he came from.**

Tim grew up in a single-parent household. His mom worked long days and nights to keep a roof over their heads. While Tim didn’t have much growing up, his family instilled in him a strong faith in God, faith in America, and faith in the future.

Tim believes that America is the land of opportunity. He believes that America can do for anyone what she has done for him. He’s going to fight to ensure every person has the opportunity to live the American Dream.

America’s future will be bright under President Tim Scott. But that future won’t become reality unless we help Tim win!

Thank You,

Tim Scott for America

---

| | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper. "JOIN ME NOW")
---

_If you’re able-bodied, you work.
If you take out a loan, you pay it back.
And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail.

America needs more victors and less victims._

These aren’t just conservative values, they’re American values. And as President, I will defend them.

**_[If you agree, will you join my team?](http://trk.secureandprosper._oHW_ploh8Q "If you agree, will you join my team?")_**

---
| | | [STAND WITH ME](http://trk.secureandprosper.--J99jxnU6OA "STAND WITH ME")

Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness, and victimhood over victory. **We CANNOT let them destroy our values and destroy our country.**

I believe that with faith and American values, our country’s future can be brighter than ever before. But this fight isn’t going to be easy.

**_[I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America’s future?](http://trk.secureandprosper.-LuZ1pO5AQ "I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America’s future?")_**

Thank You & God Bless
– Tim Scott

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Public schools vs. Christians
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWgkZCXDvN

Are you ready to take the fight to save America to the next
level?

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWgkZCXDvN

Fellow
Patriot,

Are you
ready to take the fight to save America to the next level?

If so, I
have a special offer for you.

I want to
send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win!

Thousands
of patriots have already gotten their copy, and now it's your
turn. The book is yours when you make a generous gift of any
amount to Turning Point USA.

That's
right - ANY AMOUNT! Even a gift of $10 will cover the cost of
shipping.

Click
here to get yours before we run out of copies!

Get
Your Copy >>

Until
now, we have only sent this book to TPUSA supporters who make
gifts of $100 or more.

But
frankly, I think the mission is too important to be that
selective.

As far as
I'm concerned, if you care about this movement even a little --
even enough to give just $10 -- then I need you on board, and I
need to get this valuable book into your hands.

If that's
you, then grab your copy today by clicking right here.

How We
Win is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will
secure victories for American Greatness that will last for
generations to come.

You see,
after ELEVEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA...

...
ELEVEN YEARS criss-crossing the country...

...
ELEVEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on
college campuses...

... I
have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where
conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to
come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to
happen.

We must
become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right...
a movement that's done pulling punches and will FIGHT for the
moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the
greatest in the history of the world.

How We
Win is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how
we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for
generations to come.

But to do
it, we need to rally an army of informed, motivated, and equipped
patriots who are ready to take action -- which is why I want to
arm you with this book today.

Get
Your Copy >>

And
remember -- when you make a generous gift to TPUSA today, you can
rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book.
You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth
organization in America.

Turning
Point USA is inspiring the next generation to love America again
so we can defeat the radical Left and WIN the American Culture
War. With over 600,000 patriotic high school and college students
on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about
saving America...we're DOING IT!

But we
can't do it alone. We need your support to continue our mission.
That's why I'm offering you this special gift when you make a
donation of any amount to Turning Point USA.

Just
click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's
gone! Even a gift of just $10 will help us ship the book to you
and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of
patriots all across America.

Get
Your Copy >>

Please,
don't miss out on this opportunity to join our team and become a
part of the movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's
right.

Claim
your copy of How We Win today and help us secure victories for
American Greatness!

For
America,

Charlie
Kirk
Founder &
CEO
Turning
Point USA

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

name: Ann Scott
subject: My husband, Rick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, America may know Rick Scott as a Governor and a Senator, but I know him as a husband, a father, and a grandfather.

I’ve been with him from the beginning, from high school to our first small business – a donut shop.

I never could’ve imagined where that little donut shop would take us, but since then, it’s been an incredible journey.

Rick is one of the strongest people I know. He NEVER backs down from what’s right - even if it means upsetting those in power.

He’s made some enemies fighting to rescue America, but that doesn’t scare us, because we know we have patriots like you standing by our side.

**Right now, I’m calling on our patriot team to act. Rick is running for re-election next year, and in his last race, he won by less than 1% of the vote.**

If we’re going to hold onto this seat, we need YOU to step up!

[**Please, join me today to stand with Rick Scott and DEFEND Florida!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=c422d81f52554026b82ea8bc28b2985a&_e=QXRM9Kc-oWfkinjdsAsm83fil3gPO28ENZPl2bmA6LNwp2ilqu17gpEcKKkIwXvyMCyn-UM5SWRkd3F-3AQlNLqnTARzTNSkIMOk2S9XcT8Chfd0YXDLXkQB-CcdwCFrT6_vDjakKNQJgukdbIk-sAPqj1lTVtPwQ-JcA2jqWQWCEvNWJ0thjFT27cPQKS2pY8sGR2N28L1mEatKIUWpStgE77_QoEqUlr8-bAUy3enWeMZmrMuR-IBTYnbhBhLVUkl3hMqSDv655iE0NeBVcW-AC1LlXcufBnO3b8zCJqTwOarhznkp15mEQefAP116qauY6C58WaXnvPBxEFNH6_OtLKIvEXEmt5jUNW1mWI7zlwMn-O5_iZN9hg93mvhq)

clean_body: | | | Peter, America may know Rick Scott as a Governor and a Senator, but I know him as a husband, a father, and a grandfather. I’ve been with him from the beginning, from high school to our first small business – a donut shop. I never could’ve imagined where that little donut shop would take us, but since then, it’s been an incredible journey. Rick is one of the strongest people I know. He NEVER backs down from what’s right - even if it means upsetting those in power. He’s made some enemies fighting to rescue America, but that doesn’t scare us, because we know we have patriots like you standing by our side. Right now, I’m calling on our patriot team to act. Rick is running for re-election next year, and in his last race, he won by less than 1% of the vote. If we’re going to hold onto this seat, we need YOU to step up! | | Thank you, Ann Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Daniel Cameron
subject: Andy Beshear has dropped the ball and let down every Kentuckian
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cameron For Kentucky[
body:
| | | [](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/7b8154cc898d3d10/081d3f62749b8bf9c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
| | Friends, This November, Kentucky has a big choice to make. Choice one is someone with a proven track record of working with law enforcement to uphold the law and keep our citizens safe. Choice two is a candidate who bows down to the defund the police movement and the radical left. The choice is clear. Andy Beshear’s policies have left Kentucky worse off than before he became Governor. And it’s not even close. _**[Kentucky deserves better.](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/7b8154cc898d3d10/5ba52d86300be348c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_ Law Enforcement leaders from all across Kentucky are backing my campaign because they know I am the right leader with the right plan to protect our Commonwealth.
---
[**JOIN OVER 150 LAW ENFORCEMENT LEADERS**](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/7b8154cc898d3d10/57b49b830a0145cfc3d6b838967d376c/40933)

[](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/7b8154cc898d3d10/f218dad9c1350168c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
Last week, I released my 12-point Public Safety Plan, which shows my commitment to support the police and reduce crime across the state. You can read the full plan _**[here](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/7b8154cc898d3d10/7c8a53cdcd8ad1c7c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_. When I called for the addition of a Kentucky State Police Post in Louisville to support our law enforcement partners and combat the drastic rise in violent crime, Andy Beshear called it a joke. Public Safety and the safety of all Kentuckians is never a joke. [_**Kentucky deserves better.**_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/7b8154cc898d3d10/8605df32d67802e6c3d6b838967d376c/40933) The choice is clear this November. Kentucky deserves better than Andy Beshear. For Kentucky,
Daniel Cameron

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: What I shared on MSNBC over the weekend…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Hey Peter — did you catch me on MSNBC over the weekend?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35133?refcode=em20230718-3414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3414%2E614464%2Eyhgaq7)
**[WATCH + CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35133?refcode=em20230718-3414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3414%2E614464%2Eyhgaq7)**
For too long, politicians like Josh Hawley have been taking money from the wrong people and letting their corporate mega-donors strip our communities for parts.
I saw it myself when I came home to my old neighborhood between deployments in Iraq and Afghanistan. The place where my family’s first home stood became an empty lot. Our neighborhood corner store was boarded up.
But instead of working to improve the lives of everyday Missourians, politicians like Hawley have used their power to control us — in the bedroom, in the workplace, and in the doctor’s office. And we’re sick and tired of it.
**So now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to fundamentally change who calls the shots in our country** — to take back power from the corrupt politicians and corporate elites dominating our politics and give it back to real, working Missourians. And I’m committed to doing it without a cent from corporate PACs, fossil fuel + Big Pharma execs, or anyone else responsible for stripping our communities for parts.
**[Watch my whole interview on MSNBC, then please consider adding your first donation of $10 or anything at all toward my grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35133?refcode=em20230718-3414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3414%2E614464%2Eyhgaq7)**

subject: Wall Street Journal: Affirmative Action Bred Hypocrisy and Victimhood
body:
The Supreme Court’s decision gives conservatives an opportunity to reaffirm their commitment to merit| | | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ffb64081ce5240348f0be3307c99d6a2&_e=7H9XUBV6YiYA1K4X1IN81_AfZiVEZwCT1vpfUsBuezTY6pZad0aNOidwTR0OqChLgRR46FFRPLeoeHYd66jZt14wpcKO7nJmVDSsqg6BXz5cJhAHZJKwC3wwIjutQ_0lKPvFxCMxu5dydBhd-TmXCa2DPAZ6r_sfJwi3rkK4NIJT4zJxAU4mg1pxW-9FA2Sex7MNj1KqWg3SrtzUxMoMnw%3D%3D)
---
_**Affirmative Action Bred Hypocrisy and Victimhood**_ By Bobby Jindal
---
_The Supreme Court’s decision gives conservatives an opportunity to reaffirm their commitment to merit._
---
In the wake of the Supreme Court’s decision striking down affirmative action in college admissions, liberals have vowed to find workarounds. Conservatives must continue to make the case for merit as the logical organizing principle for America.

The elevation of victimhood over achievement has led many to misrepresent their racial and gender identities in pursuit of advantages in professional and academic positions. Students at selective colleges are identifying as non-heterosexual at rates several times higher than historic or national averages, though University of London political scientist Eric Kaufmann noted that there hasn’t been a corresponding increase in sexual behavior tied to those identities. I’ve heard of parents at elite private high schools using genetic testing services hoping to identify any ethnic heritage that would boost their children’s college applications and of young professionals falsely identifying as bisexual for a career boost. [_**FINISH READING ON WSJ.COM**_](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ffb64081ce5240348f0be3307c99d6a2&_e=7H9XUBV6YiYA1K4X1IN81ydonR-hHpn9y9ImUHj-39EY1YrnavQulCOm15Bi9xhTjOM5w9c7E26G4z3y3Q4_YG2j8XFcK0ZbTjXdJum9RvJyrWPBQ2S2_sIPb9H2USE5dSaBRqvjEMRa0nNHIEmXEz1hFRirFa_hO-DX7GxA942WluL0rd40XYZavSY5f6pCpDPz0G-cIMezqsjL49cvd-jWDyTIx2yNTkTfSKIx2_JbIS5ercl9KvQl58OONOCJFY0eIA5pty5BEX_r145vqY_njoHn2ZCfzvGu3SYW1Ax4Doi3cBPtdFcY3gl-3wqPJjAUm0bQbmoK_SfXB8LF9w%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: An extraordinary NEGOP+ member opportunity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Meet the first woman in U.S. history to successfully lead a presidential campaign | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12614543?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4f7a0bac6e&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| In just one month, NEGOP+ members will have the opportunity to hear from a woman who made history while working on Donald J. Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign.

**We are excited to organize this event for NEGOP+ members, as Nebraskans have a significant role to play as engaged voters in the Presidential primary election less than a year away!**

[**NEGOP+ Booster Club membership includes**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=118a2cbedc&e=25844e23a8) a Booster Club Membership Card, a NEGOP+ Club Pin, free and discounted entry fees to NEGOP events, and a specialty Booster Club Item. This is a great time to kick-off your NEGOP+ membership with the opportunity to spend an evening with Kellyanne Conway!

**Event Details**
**Date:** August 18th
**Time:** 6:30 pm CT
**Location:** Divots Conference Center, 4200 West Norfolk Ave, Norfolk, NE 68701

**About Kellyanne Conway**
---
| |
---
Kellyanne Conway served as Campaign Manager of the come-from-behind victory of Trump-Pence 2016, making her the first woman in U.S. history to successfully helm a presidential campaign.

For nearly four years, Kellyanne served as Assistant to the President and Senior Counselor to the President at the White House, working on a range of issues affecting domestic and global policy.
---
| She is the Founder and former President of The Polling Company, Inc./WomanTrend a privately-held, woman-owned corporation she operated from 1995-2016.

She is one of the most quoted and noted pollsters on the national scene, having provided commentary on thousands of television shows on ABC, CBS, NBC, PBS, CNN, CNBC, MSNBC, HBO, Comedy Central, MTV, Fox News Channel, on the paid speaking circuit and for numerous radio shows and print stories. Throughout her multiple decades in market research, Kellyanne has provided primary research and advice for clients in all 50 states and has directed hundreds of demographic and attitudinal survey projects for statewide and congressional political races, trade associations, and Fortune 100 companies. Kellyanne is a “fully-recovered” attorney, licensed to practice law in four jurisdictions (Maryland, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and the District of Columbia). She holds a law degree, with honors, from George Washington University Law Center and completed her undergraduate studies at Trinity College and Oxford University.

Kellyanne has served on numerous boards and advisory councils. Her new business, KAConsulting, provides clients strategic advice, polling, and media training to corporate, political and nonprofit clients. Kellyanne is a Fox News Contributor. Her memoir, Here's The Deal, published in May of 2022, was a #1 New York Times bestseller. She is mom to four amazing teenagers.

**[Join NEGOP+ Today](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=70a73ca38d&e=25844e23a8)**
If you're not already a member, here's your perfect chance to become part of this impactful gathering of active Conservatives. Join the membership to ensure your place at this **Do Not Miss Event** , and stand alongside us as we strive to strengthen the Republican Party's influence in Nebraska!

---
| [BECOME A NEGOP+ MEMBER TODAY »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=435f7f5cf1&e=25844e23a8 "BECOME A NEGOP+ MEMBER TODAY »")
---
| We greatly appreciate your continued support and eagerly look forward to your participation as we work together to uphold our shared values.
---
| Best Regards,

Eric Underwood
Chairman
Republican Party of Nebraska
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=567dc3fd8b&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| | [PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Nebraska Republican Party1610 N StLincoln, NE 68508-1871
[Add us to your address book](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&e=25844e23a8&c=f569d4eb07) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&e=25844e23a8&c=f569d4eb07).

name: Special Elections Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: $7 for 7 special elections >>
body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| | **$7.** That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We have _seven_ special elections on the horizon in critical states like Wisconsin, New Hampshire, and Tennessee – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. But when enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete against the GOP money machine. **Reason #3:** Losing means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states – so $7 can help defeat extremists who are determined to tear down abortion rights and ballot access. [So what do you say? Friend,
Tonight, I will be going live with Sean Hannity in Iowa for a voter town hall – home of the FIRST CAUCUS of the Republican primary.
Most politicians usually hide from voters...
_...Lucky for you, I’m not a politician – so this might be my favorite part of the job._
Millions of Republican primary voters will be tuning in tonight as I take questions from voters and outline our plans to SAVE AMERICA from the incompetent crook currently occupying the White House.
**But there’s one other group that will be tuning in... _the special interest “Republican” mega-donors (RINOs, as we like to call them) who’ve pledged to spend over $370 MILLION against us will surely be watching to see just how strong our movement is._**
Tonight is our chance to show that we are TRULY UNBREAKABLE – and that a handful of treacherous RINOs are no match for the greatest political movement in history!
With MILLIONS of eyes on us, _this_ is the moment we PROVE that the RINOs’ multimillion-dollar attacks completely BACKFIRED!
**Please make a contribution before we go LIVE so that I can report that our grassroots movement is STRONGER than EVER before.**

## Two BROKE Preachers Going To Church...
---
At [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.88.1.523b1f4a0ded31aac73b87ff2f3adddd) OKC & Tulsa, we are in a series each WKND over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.89.1.18d5c69c2f81442c0e85f9d11fb4f17a): _verse by verse_. This past WKND, we opened up **Acts 3** which is a story of two broke preachers (Peter & John) going to church and on their way encountering a man who lame from birth asking for money. I took a different approach to this classic biblical story and I think you will be intrigued by the angel of this sermon. Watch [Acts Pt.12](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.90.1.1f824c87d7fedb3973031ceed56bea62) here: [https://youtube.com/live/ThM7my6KqHU?feature=share ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.91.1.455dbd8bdd1f9ba4c6fca5a3bfeb2e70) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.92.1.08c92514ef474ede37ac247ab9bbc5f1), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.93.1.6b10636ec00d39a273aae59a154b8484), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.94.1.2ddd1a5f17e803409b0640aef994d81c), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.95.1.0f2532c98df7a170037e1966118b5528), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.96.1.74ecc58e540b2de1813b84525f27156e), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.97.1.1171b88090ad771ef61346ff173ca5a3)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.98.1.80140d9a04798cc304cf75842c66daec)

---
## Why Are American Churches Struggling?
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.100.1.4d1fdd8c219a080c5934e70378d1b129)
---
**American Churches** were once _booming_ like many _boom towns_ in our nation's history.
Unfortunately, the trend now for many American Churches is not the boom town experience but more like a _ghost town_...
Did you know that twelve churches per day in America **close down**? Church attendance is at an **all time low**. In 1972 around 92%of Americans identified as Christian, whereas in 2020 that number dropped to 64%.
**Why is American Christianity struggling?**
Last Sunday, at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.101.1.df9f912b57135ac05e7d9f454ee4c721) OKC & Tulsa, I addressed that question and how a church can **BOOM**.
We have seen the **BOOM** experience at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.102.1.1b857a78e8187ba3fbbc169ac5224a4d) in all categories: reach, influence, attendance & finances.
There are **four primary reasons** that [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.103.1.8710b648653ce3294f2d08fa279d7b4e) has boomed and they are found in **Acts 2:42**.
This message will bless you and your local church!
Watch here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/YCcVTz88FMo?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=113548.104.1.e4e33926422ca1ab51c410fc6bf21899)

subject: Yet ANOTHER fake indictment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends to Elect Lavern Spicer for Congress
body:
| | | | | Copy of Copy of Copy of New message | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=51d9a30543&e=84ee529f47)
---
| | | My Fellow Conservative,
Fighting for President trump has never been more important - EVER!
Today, we just found out that he will be indicted ONCE AGAIN and this time it is connection with the January 6th Protest.
I'm running for Congress and I promise you, once I get there, I am going to do EVERYTHING in my power to EXONERATE President Trump and work with him, as President, to pass the MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN agenda that the globalists and Deep State or SO AFRAID OF!
---
[LET'S FILL CONGRESS WITH TRUMP ALLIES!](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=dd515925b8&e=84ee529f47)
| | | Imagine what the response from America would be if Russia:

Rigged an election.

Told people they can’t discuss said rigged election.

Had their intelligence agencies infiltrate a peaceful protest and turn it into a violent event.

Blame the outgoing President for the violence they created. Then, delete the video of the outgoing President calling for peace during said event.

The day after, ban anyone on social media who supports the outgoing President.

Two days later, indefinitely ban the outgoing President from all forms of social media.

Six days later, impeach the outgoing President in an unprecedented fashion for a protest that he didn’t create.

Inaugurated a new President with thousands of National Guard troops protecting him.

Lied about how many people died at the protest and claim that certain police officers died from violent attacks when they actually died from strokes.

Hunted down anyone accused of being at the Capitol, even sending FBI agents to the homes of people who were out of the country on that date but were “suspects” for being Trump supporters.

Arrested people involved in the protest and hold them indefinitely in horrible conditions pre-trial. Set up a kangaroo-court committee in Congress and subpoena anyone and everyone related to the former President.

Held show-trial hearings in prime time, complete with crying members of Congress. Lied during these show trials that the former President, who is 70+ years old, tried to steal a limousine from Secret Service and storm the Capitol himself with it.

Tried to arrest former members of the President’s staff for “contempt of Congress” for not wanting to participate in the show trial. Banned anyone from social media who says that the protest might have been infiltrated by federal agents.

Then, finally, nearly three years later, indict the former President for the protest despite having NO EVIDENCE that he was involved, just to try and bar him from holding office again.

Just imagine for a second if this was Vladimir Putin doing this stuff in Russia. America would be calling for regime change and would probably even call for an invasion to “liberate” the Russian people.

America wouldn’t tolerate it another country. But in America we’re told to shut up and accept it as Biden’s version of democracy.

This is the most dangerous time in American history.

This is what Communist dictatorship are made of. If you think we live in a Constitutional Republic anymore, it’s time to wake up.

We are living through the government our founders warned us about.

I'm running for Congress to carry on the AMERICA FIRST AGENDA. I will NEVER turn my back on President Trump in his hour of need - that is a PROMISE!

I'm not being funded by the establishment because they hate my pro-Trump stance -- but I need you to support my campaign so we can prove that MAGA is still the driving force in Republican politics!

---
[DEFEND TRUMP'S HONOR AND CHIP IN TO LAVERN'S CAMPAIGN!](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=74d29c4e22&e=84ee529f47)
| | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=a4c115e2e5&e=84ee529f47)
---
| | We are going to change this country for the better. But, we can't do that if they lock up the man who started our movement!
It's about the people. We are the people. We will take our nation back.
Fighting for you,
Lavern Spicer

Paid for by Friends to Elect Lavern Spicer for Congress

_CLICK HERE TO UNSUBSCRIBE_

body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=716c85f2040542aa9981a073002ec0ca&_e=gut_o7APu1r9Xyeo5hyQDuszJPSC-10301N_Dtkb0lAjoQh3X2Ugj_IS9baZGpjJbPlOw2UZmYGHF1rTjTFCviCt6o0aVxU05h5VXP2qBjvkzt9CzV665JNbFqIq41Gk37ARwX2SzvWNMYImfvIrc9chCfTohrEApBWgzkpyoCrnjzor3cDqcpG5ziUIhssFzA2A1A9vIutsaq6GTtLxISlr9FZDIe8rW6sJUnWuOFJiTb-d7KKun3wCGBn7wDsPJ6_cAC_oGiXr_Zbnplj-eA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=716c85f2040542aa9981a073002ec0ca&_e=gut_o7APu1r9Xyeo5hyQDuszJPSC-10301N_Dtkb0lAjoQh3X2Ugj_IS9baZGpjJbPlOw2UZmYGHF1rTjTFCviCt6o0aVxU05h5VXP2qBjvkzt9CzV665JNbFqIq41GkNmVmRsFqc_PCfgXlThcJhWQ2Hzibkbhuj_KN2r8aFXLFnaS3rdQ9i-EN73VRCftMeWhpjhAa0kSzoRWUZG86or4K0dQ9tihqBlRzJPM_mjqrnmRZzj0z-wzDZ6SzR6E6kKDMTrRlYfbUmugdtZE3xw%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=716c85f2040542aa9981a073002ec0ca&_e=gut_o7APu1r9Xyeo5hyQDuszJPSC-10301N_Dtkb0lAjoQh3X2Ugj_IS9baZGpjJbPlOw2UZmYGHF1rTjTFCviCt6o0aVxU05h5VXP2qBjvkzt9CzV665JNbFqIq41GkuwKR7JYJCtTqv1VB9pj3fSWmy0jM-4cwVOGkeHCfJdWymUFecNm_PkyDQ189AqJbm3A5oXvUXOT09d2k9_SpqYsNUxzNVCJEIBzf1LaYGChXkGt1O6wE1qKj_DXoVjovYP-X4EclssT0TRJhWrJ4OQ%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**
