clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! clean_body: Let’s defeat my opponent for a second time. | Peter, Democrats are plotting to reclaim the House majority by looking toward races like ours that will face a rematch against those that lost in 2022. After the DCCC successfully recruited my liberal opponent from 2022 to run against me again this cycle, the Democrats have set the stage for another tight race that could determine which party controls the House. After winning by less than 2 percentage points last year and our race labeled as a toss-up again, we have our work cut out for us. But with my army of grassroots conservatives fighting alongside me, I know we can secure another victory in 2024. Within days of announcing her campaign, my opponent announced a huge influx of cash – proving this race will be a hard-fought battle. But their initial fundraising is no match for us, thanks to dedicated supporters like you. Now, as we get closer and closer to the heat of the cycle, we can’t afford to lose our momentum with the liberal fundraising machine in full force against me. Every second and every dollar counts with the future of this country and the American Dream on the line. That’s why I am asking for your continued support to help me combat the Left’s attacks and my liberal opponent to continue the fight for the American Dream. Thank you, Rep. Juan Ciscomani Arizona’s 6th Congressional District PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

Donald J. Trump July 17th, 2023
**TO:** Ron DeSantis for President Donors and Other Interested Parties
**FROM:** Chris LaCivita and Susie Wiles, Donald J. Trump for President 2024
**DATE:** July 17, 2023
**RE:** State Of The Race — Questions You Should Be Raising
As Governor Ron DeSantis hits the road over the next week, seeking more funds for his campaign, we believe it is important to provide you, the donors who generously fund and raise money, with a list of relevant questions considering the current circumstances faced by his campaign.
Let's recap those circumstances:
\- Every public poll now shows Ron DeSantis trailing President Trump by a significant margin.
\- Senior campaign officials have even confirmed this disparity, acknowledging they are "way behind" and fighting an "uphill battle." The candidate himself acknowledged his polling showing him in the "twenties."
**According to NBC News, DeSantis campaign officials have said:**
\- "From my understanding, if we don't see a bump in the polls, we are basically going to shut down the idea of a national operation," a DeSantis-aligned operative said.
\- This person stated that a shift needs to happen because it is clear to activists and donors that the current operation is not working. Ron DeSantis needs to signal to them that he recognizes this fact before any future poll shows him falling from second place nationally or in an early state.
_According to American Pulse, a nationally recognized Polling firm, a New Hampshire survey released on Friday, July 14th, showed Ron DeSantis and Chris Christie essentially tied, with 10.5% and 10.0% respectively. President Trump was at 47.5%._
**According to ABC News:**
\- DeSantis' early struggles to catch President Trump have led some of the Florida governor's major donors to privately question his viability as a presidential candidate while Trump is still in the race, as multiple sources have told ABC News.
\- Sources have also indicated that some top donors who had planned to support DeSantis have started exploring other primary candidates, including meeting with individuals like Chris Christie, Senator Tim Scott, and former South Carolina Governor Nikki Haley.
As if that were not enough, the full extent of disorganization within the DeSantis campaign is now coming to light after public filings revealed that the campaign is spending unsustainably on a bloated payroll and not raising sufficient funds necessary for a long-term campaign.
**NBC News summarized it well:**
\- "The numbers suggest, for the first time, that solvency could be a threat to DeSantis' campaign, which has touted its fundraising ability as a key measure of viability. They reflect the broader reality that DeSantis stalled after his launch, polling ahead of the Republican primary pack but far behind former President Donald Trump."
**The New York Times also raised a point:**
\- "As a fuller financial picture of the 2024 presidential race emerged with Saturday's campaign filing deadline, trouble appeared to lurk below the surface for Gov. Ron DeSantis of Florida."
\- "Mr. DeSantis is spending hand over fist, and his dependence on large donors suggests a lack of grassroots support."
If the campaign has not demonstrated sufficient enthusiasm to build a national fundraising base who is motivated to contribute, how can they effectively implement what they call a "long slog strategy"?
The answer is simple: They can't.
With the DeSantis campaign arm, Never (Always) Back Down, knocking on thousands of doors in the scorching summer of Nevada and South Carolina with out-of-state and unmotivated door knockers, there are not many positives to highlight.
As investors, you undoubtedly have some questions, and here are a few that should be raised:
\- What exactly are the 93 individuals on the campaign payroll doing?
\- Can you provide assurance to SuperPAC donors that Jeff Roe is not claiming $0.68 for each dollar spent, as his private investment information suggests?
\- What is the campaign's expenditure breakdown, and can you provide the return on investment for direct mail and online fundraising operations?
\- Despite the SuperPAC and affiliated organizations like the Club for No Growth and Koch Brothers operations spending tens of millions of dollars to prop up Ron DeSantis while attacking President Trump, the numbers have not budged. In fact, they have moved in favor of President Trump. What is the campaign's plan to change this trajectory?
\- If the Corporate Media is responsible, as the Governor has stated, for the polling collapse (not Republican voters), why seek attention from Jake Tapper?
\- The SuperPAC's pollster, who is spending millions of dollars of your money, often highlights the Governor's high favorability rating. However, people are still widely supporting President Donald Trump. Isn't that a problem?
\- How much has the campaign and SuperPAC spent on unmotivated door knockers?
\- Even Governor DeSantis is now admitting his post-midterm polling numbers were a “sugar high.” Were you as donors aware that the Governor and his team thought this?
Of course, if I were you, I wouldn't hold my breath expecting any answers or accountability. Given the aforementioned points, if you still collectively pour millions of dollars into the failing Ron DeSantis campaign, you can't say you weren't warned.

Trump July 17th, 2023 TO: Ron DeSantis for President Donors and Other Interested Parties FROM: Chris LaCivita and Susie Wiles, Donald J. Trump for President 2024 DATE: July 17, 2023 RE: State Of The Race — Questions You Should Be Raising As Governor Ron DeSantis hits the road over the next week, seeking more funds for his campaign, we believe it is important to provide you, the donors who generously fund and raise money, with a list of relevant questions considering the current circumstances faced by his campaign. Let's recap those circumstances: \- Every public poll now shows Ron DeSantis trailing President Trump by a significant margin. \- Senior campaign officials have even confirmed this disparity, acknowledging they are "way behind" and fighting an "uphill battle." The candidate himself acknowledged his polling showing him in the "twenties." According to NBC News, DeSantis campaign officials have said: \- "From my understanding, if we don't see a bump in the polls, we are basically going to shut down the idea of a national operation," a DeSantis-aligned operative said. \- This person stated that a shift needs to happen because it is clear to activists and donors that the current operation is not working. Ron DeSantis needs to signal to them that he recognizes this fact before any future poll shows him falling from second place nationally or in an early state. According to American Pulse, a nationally recognized Polling firm, a New Hampshire survey released on Friday, July 14th, showed Ron DeSantis and Chris Christie essentially tied, with 10.5% and 10.0% respectively. President Trump was at 47.5%. According to ABC News: \- DeSantis' early struggles to catch President Trump have led some of the Florida governor's major donors to privately question his viability as a presidential candidate while Trump is still in the race, as multiple sources have told ABC News. \- Sources have also indicated that some top donors who had planned to support DeSantis have started exploring other primary candidates, including meeting with individuals like Chris Christie, Senator Tim Scott, and former South Carolina Governor Nikki Haley. As if that were not enough, the full extent of disorganization within the DeSantis campaign is now coming to light after public filings revealed that the campaign is spending unsustainably on a bloated payroll and not raising sufficient funds necessary for a long-term campaign. NBC News summarized it well: \- "The numbers suggest, for the first time, that solvency could be a threat to DeSantis' campaign, which has touted its fundraising ability as a key measure of viability. They reflect the broader reality that DeSantis stalled after his launch, polling ahead of the Republican primary pack but far behind former President Donald Trump." The New York Times also raised a point: \- "As a fuller financial picture of the 2024 presidential race emerged with Saturday's campaign filing deadline, trouble appeared to lurk below the surface for Gov. Ron DeSantis of Florida." \- "Mr. DeSantis is spending hand over fist, and his dependence on large donors suggests a lack of grassroots support." If the campaign has not demonstrated sufficient enthusiasm to build a national fundraising base who is motivated to contribute, how can they effectively implement what they call a "long slog strategy"? The answer is simple: They can't. With the DeSantis campaign arm, Never (Always) Back Down, knocking on thousands of doors in the scorching summer of Nevada and South Carolina with out-of-state and unmotivated door knockers, there are not many positives to highlight. As investors, you undoubtedly have some questions, and here are a few that should be raised: \- What exactly are the 93 individuals on the campaign payroll doing? \- Can you provide assurance to SuperPAC donors that Jeff Roe is not claiming $0.68 for each dollar spent, as his private investment information suggests? \- What is the campaign's expenditure breakdown, and can you provide the return on investment for direct mail and online fundraising operations? \- Despite the SuperPAC and affiliated organizations like the Club for No Growth and Koch Brothers operations spending tens of millions of dollars to prop up Ron DeSantis while attacking President Trump, the numbers have not budged. In fact, they have moved in favor of President Trump. What is the campaign's plan to change this trajectory? \- If the Corporate Media is responsible, as the Governor has stated, for the polling collapse (not Republican voters), why seek attention from Jake Tapper? \- The SuperPAC's pollster, who is spending millions of dollars of your money, often highlights the Governor's high favorability rating. However, people are still widely supporting President Donald Trump. Isn't that a problem? \- How much has the campaign and SuperPAC spent on unmotivated door knockers? \- Even Governor DeSantis is now admitting his post-midterm polling numbers were a “sugar high.” Were you as donors aware that the Governor and his team thought this? Of course, if I were you, I wouldn't hold my breath expecting any answers or accountability. Given the aforementioned points, if you still collectively pour millions of dollars into the failing Ron DeSantis campaign, you can't say you weren't warned. | ---|--- Donald J. | Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

Between now and November we’re committed to doing everything we can to help our friends at Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights win this measure and permanently protect abortion access in their state. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your support, FP Team Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . name: Ted Cruz
subject: Most partisan FBI we’ve ever seen…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative, I’ve talked about this time and again on my podcast, **[the Verdict](http://trk.tedcruz._rNPchI6KbBhkQQ)**. **Today, we live in a two-tiered justice system – where there’s one set of rules for liberal Democrats and one for everybody else.**** ** This is the most partisan DOJ and FBI we’ve ever seen. And the White House and Senate Democrats have done everything they can to keep the truth from the American people. But they can’t hide the facts forever. Two IRS whistleblowers have come forward to _**report blatant corruption**_ within the DOJ. _The whistleblowers testified that Attorney General Merrick Garland and his political appointees repeatedly interfered with the Hunter Biden investigation, even tipping off Hunter’s lawyers before they searched his property.__ _ I recently questioned Merrick Garland under oath, and he claimed that the DOJ had never interfered in the Hunter Biden investigation. Someone is LYING – and if it’s Merrick Garland, he committed perjury and obstruction of justice. Garland MUST recuse himself from this matter, and the DOJ should appoint a special counsel to determine if Garland lied under oath. **[I’m personally asking you to fuel my fight to EXPOSE the truth about Biden’s corrupt DOJ and stand up to Merrick Garland.](http://trk.tedcruz.)**
---
[**STAND UP TO GARLAND – DONATE NOW**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Anything you can give – $5, $10, $25, $50, or more – will make a difference as I work to hold Merrick Garland’s feet to the fire and reform our damaged federal justice system.
---
\- Ted Cruz

name: Team Tina
subject: News from the FDA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We have to fight tooth and nail to defend abortion and birth control access. |
#
Hey team, did you see the news last week? **“FDA approves first over-the-counter birth control pill in the U.S.”**
_— NBC News_ This is a big step forward in making access to reproductive healthcare easier and more affordable for millions of Americans. But don’t forget that a conservative judge in Texas struck down FDA approval for a commonly used abortion pill. That’s right: unelected judges, not the federal agency responsible for public health, are deciding what medication is permissible or not. **Tina is on the front lines of the fight to protect reproductive rights. She introduced the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_ so that activist judges couldn’t impose their right-wing, anti-abortion ideology on the millions of women who deserve their fundamental right to choose when and how to have a family.** We have to fight tooth and nail to defend abortion and birth control access. The attacks on reproductive rights are coming from all sides, and now is the time to join Tina in her efforts to expand abortion access. **[Please, sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of Tina’s legislation, the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_ , and demand Congress pass this bill as soon as possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66670938/417171478/47917265?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230718_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODEyMTI3OS04OTI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqdocZRX6UAby4gRWvr733FwMLUnpGeBcTJ4t8bacqM=&emci=3a32de72-8925-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a8121279-8925-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66670939/417171479/47917265?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230718_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODEyMTI3OS04OTI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqdocZRX6UAby4gRWvr733FwMLUnpGeBcTJ4t8bacqM=&emci=3a32de72-8925-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a8121279-8925-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My police officer husband is facing ten years in prison
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbcjormiejau2srd294smcbo4c8v2dkttvdja630_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti64oj4cph2bs)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs7ou1133gg7qlfris9td5kf9dl5rucctv0forlg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti64oj4cph2bs)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z06osevdprdvmabsv0i05l4n9kpvrf2hil22o3n8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti64oj4cph2bs)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3i59v1m3nkrqnfhtq176qiorq7hs0140vao3ov0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti64oj4cph2bs)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8haas21n705vm9omgsvgnjt7kpeqjp949tr92fo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti64oj4cph2bs)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8h0ktc1neeeb2ct8417vqmif34ab4t5lfgpbvl0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti64oj4cph2bs) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziu79ma70lvmdqmdmnj4jdj88qd1sfrum94fkvb8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68pj0sdim9oh1k8gn48n24hhm1p77chh64p36c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq6jccifbl3sh2025ajj56nosb7mcr0d36mcqar0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti64oj4cph2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjhuvacb2tbjgo7shugoe1aueq26uq2a2j7vjlc0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti64oj4cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Action News
subject: SICK of news that can’t even tell you what a woman is?

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Zuck’s Threads are unraveling
body:
Zuck's intent is to truly KILL Twitter, so that control is regained over political speech on the Internet - and it's why my RICO lawsuit against Facebook is even more important than ever before. | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FpZU0b8Go6E6BVKyeYArqug%2FOAKD4DnBf9lhIivAFhJqFg/1/0100018969e573fe-32974503-5ee4-44b4-a31a-461a1ae8c159-000000/jCsy6Cbk98-in7n96tRcy28kP7U=331) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FpZU0b8Go6E6BVKyeYArqug%2FOAKD4DnBf9lhIivAFhJqFg/2/0100018969e573fe-32974503-5ee4-44b4-a31a-461a1ae8c159-000000/ngu0qQmtCwxKjAXpajpOA2tavEo=331) Dear Friend,

Mark Zuckerberg doesn't have an addiction to censorship, **he has an addiction to CONTROL!**

And corporate and government establishment cronies are right there with him!

Ever since Elon Musk bought Twitter for 44 BILLLION DOLLARS, the Big Tech Mafia and the Deep State Establishment have been freaking out over how much control they have lost over social media and the flow of information.

That jury has been out who awhile now, and while Elon and Twitter both still have their own unique issues, he's proven that Twitter is FAR better that Facebook, Google, Amazon and Apple.

And that's why Mark Zuckerberg was quick to market his new "Twitter Killer" platform he's named "Threads" . . . and it's already unraveling.

Threads has been caught red-handed, incorrectly labeling Donald Trump Jr's posts as "misinformation" shortly after the app was launched. They have also been accused of plagiarism.

Zuck's intent is to truly KILL Twitter, so that control is regained over political speech on the Internet - **and it 's why my RICO lawsuit against Facebook is even more important than ever before.**

My RICO case is ongoing, **[and you can help me keep fighting by donating today](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FpZU0b8Go6E6BVKyeYArqug%2FOAKD4DnBf9lhIivAFhJqFg/3/0100018969e573fe-32974503-5ee4-44b4-a31a-461a1ae8c159-000000/gbdR01TlTsVQzknwO6J5NvE1NFo=331).**

A RICO Case (Racketeer Influenced and Corrupt Organizations Act) requires that dots be connected between organizations that habitually break the law - and we've proven that over, and over again --- between Facebook, Twitter, Democrat Campaigns, Secretaries of State, the FBI, and voting officials.

It is foul - **[and we're trying to take this to trial!](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FpZU0b8Go6E6BVKyeYArqug%2FOAKD4DnBf9lhIivAFhJqFg/4/0100018969e573fe-32974503-5ee4-44b4-a31a-461a1ae8c159-000000/BbPPEU0zv8sI0sB2jboaIEDOUFw=331)**

But to make it there, **[I have to raise AT LEAST $23,500 each and every month to keep on top of my growing legal fees. I am up against the most powerful and wealthiest tech companies in the world, and that requires me to raise more money to pay my legal team.](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FpZU0b8Go6E6BVKyeYArqug%2FOAKD4DnBf9lhIivAFhJqFg/5/0100018969e573fe-32974503-5ee4-44b4-a31a-461a1ae8c159-000000/Ymd2mmnVedwqfx025TUXlbwyRiw=331)**

**[Will you chip in and help?](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FpZU0b8Go6E6BVKyeYArqug%2FOAKD4DnBf9lhIivAFhJqFg/6/0100018969e573fe-32974503-5ee4-44b4-a31a-461a1ae8c159-000000/sZZwQoZgxF02peLRyR8tsCCe21o=331)**

Every dollar counts, and your help is ALWAYS appreciated and needed.

Thanks so much for all that you do to help me hold the Big Tech Mafia accountable!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Deadline Approaching via Allred for TX
subject: our first major deadline of this campaign is TONIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, this race is simply too important for us to come up short. Ted Cruz is beatable, but we can’t fall short in July. So please, split a donation of $25 before midnight between my campaign and Serve America to help us flip TX blue! → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
FIRST , Colin Allred launched his campaign and shattered Texas fundraising records on day one!
THEN , experts at Inside Elections and the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of flipping this seat, shifting Texas from a Solid Republican seat to a BATTLEGROUND .
NOW , a brand-new poll shows Colin is just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, and 14% of voters are still undecided!
It's crystal clear: Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator, and we've got a real chance of flipping this seat – which would all but guarantee Democrats hold onto our critical Senate majority. But it's not going to be easy, and Colin's counting on YOUR grassroots support to give him the resources to fire Ted Cruz next November.
We cannot afford to fall short, so please, before midnight, rush $25 or more between our campaign and Serve America to help Colin defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority! → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Let’s do this.
– Team Allred

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Delbert Hosemann - Vice-President of Abortion Clinic
body:
Delbert Hosemann appointed 13 Democrats to powerful committees in the Senate. Hosemann was the director and vice president of the South Jackson Woman's Clinic, a Mississippi abortion clinic. Delbert Hosemann is no conservative, and he's not pro-life. Just another Republican in name only.

body:
Stating I am the target of a GRAND JURY investigation
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUFvozAQhX-NuYHMGGxz4LCpkz1Eqnradk-RsYdkKmwQmKLur18RJb1-72n0Po0N00D9d8vUgQHcyC8MgIlfDOBcHT5e5fn9bPLfB_jIjayrbU_hhQGk7wl_qo8rBQZLw06VyXwLToNzGbal1I1smkrz7NZ2WkvOdV-WXsnGlcJ6RO4BmkrXoqwyaoGD4KrUpaxV3RS6AuAatee24Z2qWcU3ioUfox38Z5rXMBVuDNnQ3lKalvukE4PTgm6dsdgozuj3xs7sF-Y24EzO5p8jxZT3a_SzpYXiNXdjCJQSIoNTdEMHveplqWuLTnUomTitKVwCeloDE-bhK3e4jOvskAnj6GIfzNkwWbpGJszT6ZmMMWFMTJhGaslAXuJAngmz_fn7_tUfe3G8w_tHhHnb7NsLf_13zObWTxsNAy1SsYpf9wW72_8AAAD___mTjLE)
---
Friend,
On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news.
The deranged prosecutor with Biden’s Department of Justice sent a letter, stating that **I AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION.**
**They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARREST and INDICTMENT.**
Let me be perfectly clear: I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT.
This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country.
It’s quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden – and that I AM THE ONLY CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election.
This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the _AMERICAN PEOPLE_ stand by our movement.
The Special Counsel’s office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement – not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller’s Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt.
When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, “President Trump, you’re our only hope!” “President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!” – I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become.
**The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will _NEVER_ let them take it from you.**
_If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._
But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.

clean_body: Stating I am the target of a GRAND JURY investigation | | | Friend, On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news. The deranged prosecutor with Biden’s Department of Justice sent a letter, stating that I AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION. They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARREST and INDICTMENT. Let me be perfectly clear: I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT. This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country. It’s quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden – and that I AM THE ONLY CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election. This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the AMERICAN PEOPLE stand by our movement. The Special Counsel’s office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement – not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller’s Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt. When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, “President Trump, you’re our only hope!” “President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!” – I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become. The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | | Thank you, | Donald J. subject: SCOTUS is legislating from the bench.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66671691/417174393/2043242937?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJiNGE0Zi04YzI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soDvT6tVa2QN-3k3NhdP0L6ELvk9vdq40my7SFOhHJQ=)
Peter,

Now that we’ve had some time to digest the disastrous recent Supreme Court term, I wanted to share my thoughts on why a couple of their decisions will be so harmful to people in Illinois’ 17th District – and all over the country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66671692/417174394/2043242937?refcode=em-7.18.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJiNGE0Zi04YzI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soDvT6tVa2QN-3k3NhdP0L6ELvk9vdq40my7SFOhHJQ=)
**I recently said SCOTUS was “legislating from the bench” – and I meant it.** The right-wing majority on the court is creating a new landscape of laws, rather than interpreting existing ones as the Constitution requires.

Here’s what I mean:

First, _affirmative action_. The court held that colleges cannot take race into account in university admissions, asking them to turn a blind eye to hundreds of years of discrimination and injustice that inevitably touch the experiences of every Black and brown citizen. This radically changes the rules, forcing schools to upend tried-and-true admissions policies. _And make no mistake: this decision will make our universities less diverse._

Second, _LGBTQ+ rights_. The court decided that businesses can withhold service from LGBTQ+ folks if those businesses claim providing service would conflict with their religious beliefs. In this case, SCOTUS basically said they’re fine with discrimination against LGBTQ+ people – folks like myself and thousands of IL-17 residents. In other words, they changed the way businesses can operate – _that’s legislating from the bench._

**A blue Congress next cycle would go a long way toward checking the Supreme Court’s power. And the first step toward flipping the House blue is defending key swing districts like IL-17.

[Will you help me defend this district and push back against the Supreme Court legislating from the bench by chipping in just $3 today? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66671693/417174395/2043242937?refcode=em-7.18.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJiNGE0Zi04YzI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soDvT6tVa2QN-3k3NhdP0L6ELvk9vdq40my7SFOhHJQ=)**
| [Contribute $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66671694/417174396/2043242937?refcode=em-7.18.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJiNGE0Zi04YzI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soDvT6tVa2QN-3k3NhdP0L6ELvk9vdq40my7SFOhHJQ=)
---

Thank you for all that you do, Peter.

Eric

name: Team Williams
subject: if you’re looking for reasons to join our team:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

We know it’s still early in this race, and you might be looking for a reason to support Dr. Brian Williams — so we wanted to give you three good ones. **1\. He has real legislative experience in Washington.**

Dr. Brian Williams worked as a gun safety advocate and health policy advisor for Sen. Chris Murphy, helping pass the most significant piece of gun legislation in our country’s history. He’s also served as an advisor to then-Speaker Nancy Pelosi, promoting affordable healthcare, pandemic preparedness, and a bolstered healthcare workforce. He’s contributed to every step of the legislative process, from drafting bills to gathering bipartisan support. Now, he’s ready to finish the work he started in Washington.

**2\. He is dedicated to service.**

Dr. Williams was raised in a family with a history of military service dating back to the Civil War, and it was from this history of service that he learned the values of patriotism, service, and justice. Throughout his time in the Air Force, and his career as a trauma surgeon, Brian has shown over and over again his commitment to serving this country. When there’s a crisis, Dr. Williams answers the call - he’s ready to serve.

**3\. He can add a vital voice to the fight to end gun violence.**

Like so many Americans, for Dr. Williams, gun violence is personal. Working in the country’s operating rooms, he treated the never-ending flow of victims of gun violence, and he has had to tell far too many mothers that their children had died from gun violence. After a shooting in Dallas in 2016, he became the only surgeon in history to operate on multiple on-duty police officers victimized in a mass shooting. Ever since that night, he’s advocated for gun safety and an end to the epidemic of gun violence. If elected, he will provide a vital voice promoting gun safety for years to come in a safe Democratic seat [We know Dr. Williams is the best choice for TX-32, the community he is proud to call home. But we need your help to get him elected to create life-saving change for our families nationwide. name: Brandon Presley
subject: Bad news.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
It’s about our fundraising numbers. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66672015/417176081/17860314?refcode=ea.4a7b2188-8c25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4a7b2188-8c25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGE3YjIxODgtOGMyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xnva6AzKcb3voBVd7IlPveVXIhJamRHHlZZfOHLXMeU=)
---
Peter, I wish I had better news to share, but I just checked the numbers on our $20,000 mid-month goal, and I noticed we came up short.

Missing our goals at this stage means we miss out on valuable campaign resources ahead of the primary. It also means we miss our chance to reach thousands of supporters on TV, online, over the phone, and in person.

But hey, I am a glass-half-full kind of guy.

[We may have missed our mark, but if we can raise another $3,000 before midnight tonight, we can make up this shortfall and stay on track to send Tate Reeves packing. Can I count on every grassroots donor reading this email to chip in a few bucks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66672017/417176085/-1470085607?refcode=ea.4a7b2188-8c25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4a7b2188-8c25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGE3YjIxODgtOGMyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xnva6AzKcb3voBVd7IlPveVXIhJamRHHlZZfOHLXMeU=)

I’ve said it before: defeating Reeves won’t be easy. But if we work hard enough over the next four months and hit every fundraising goal, we _can_ pull this off.

Remember, the stakes are sky-high. We're talking about Medicaid expansion, good-paying jobs, our hospitals, government accountability, and so much more.

Giving up is not an option.

[So, please, Peter. clean_body: It’s about our fundraising numbers. | = Peter, I wish I had better news to share, but I just checked the numbers on our $20,000 mid-month goal, and I noticed we came up short. Missing our goals at this stage means we miss out on valuable campaign resources ahead of the primary. It also means we miss our chance to reach thousands of supporters on TV, online, over the phone, and in person. But hey, I am a glass-half-full kind of guy. = I’ve said it before: defeating Reeves won’t be easy. But if we work hard enough over the next four months and hit every fundraising goal, we can pull this off. Remember, the stakes are sky-high. We're talking about Medicaid expansion, good-paying jobs, our hospitals, government accountability, and so much more. Giving up is not an option. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks again, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to

Warning: This email discusses sexual assault --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66672362/417176806/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGQ2ODdhYi04YzI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jje8N8utgQ6qbyrmq-J9lWujplKUvhHtj4EOZzcoaSA=&emci=fdd587ab-8c25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=00d687ab-8c25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) **_Warning: This email discusses sexual assault_** Team,

On January 16, 2013, I was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s Auditor General. Over the eight years that I served, we accomplished so much to help Pennsylvanians – but there’s one thing that I’m most proud of.

3,000. That was the number of untested rape kits sitting in evidence rooms and crime labs across Pennsylvania when I was elected Auditor General.

In that number, I saw 3,000 victims of rape who had the courage to willingly subject themselves to an invasive and uncomfortable medical examination in the pursuit of justice and to protect others from their assailants. Instead, the justice system failed them.

It failed the people who loved them and watched them suffer. It compounded that failure by allowing violent predators to do it again and again, creating countless new victims.

**There is no good reason for thousands of untested rape kits to linger for years — even decades — in police evidence lockers and crime labs._So I did something about it._**

In 2016, I issued a special report describing the backlog problem in Pennsylvania. The law requires departments and labs to notify the Health Department of its backlog of untested kits – _but some law enforcement agencies just weren’t complying with the law._

Those rape kits should have been tested right away. But instead, more than 3,000 of them sat for months, even years—untouched and untested—meaning the attackers were never caught and the survivors never got justice.

**I wasn’t about to let this injustice stand – not on my watch.**

So I brought the full force and resources of my office to bear and we worked to reduce the backlog of untested rape kits. We fought for more resources and held law enforcement agencies accountable. And in three years, the backlog dropped by 90 percent.

I’m proud of the many accomplishments during my tenure as Auditor General, but getting justice for nearly 3,000 victims of sexual assault is the one I’m most proud of.

I promise that as your next Attorney General, I will take action when needed to protect the most vulnerable, to stand up for your rights, and to make sure no one has been left behind.

– Eugene DePasquale | Eugene DePasquale is running to become Pennsylvania’s next Attorney General. Pennsylvania is a critical swing state – and the right to vote, the right to marry who you love, and the right to make your own healthcare decisions are on the line in this election.

[**If you can, please donate to Eugene’s campaign today to help him defend the rights of all Pennsylvanians →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66672363/417176807/-412144306?refcode=email_071823_rapekits_t2&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGQ2ODdhYi04YzI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jje8N8utgQ6qbyrmq-J9lWujplKUvhHtj4EOZzcoaSA=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66672364/417176808/-412144306?refcode=email_071823_rapekits_t2&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGQ2ODdhYi04YzI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jje8N8utgQ6qbyrmq-J9lWujplKUvhHtj4EOZzcoaSA=)

name: Rubio, Marco
subject: Ignore if you can’t handle this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Please read this message to the end, but only if you’re prepared to handle the reality of our situation.

| |
---
| | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you’re prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you’re someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I’m going to level with you and tell you the truth.

On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out.

**Here's the truth...**

The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans receiving these messages when they can afford it.

**If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' millions raised. I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a donut.**
---
| | [I’LL CHIP IN, MARCO!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z08a3f4ve5chnb7pg5kmb7ed60aigic7kk15q77o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs "I’LL CHIP IN, MARCO!")
---
_**[The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlm0vbe0afdof93kjk9bek0buqc0p5ouc44ecgn0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs "The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.")**_
_Democrats are hoping I give up on you.

They're hoping you give up on me.

They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether._
We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to fight for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

_I hope you don't give up on me or our shared values._ A lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake if you ignore this.

**If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.**
**But if you think we need to get this country back on track and the American Dream restored, please donate whatever you can afford by midnight!**
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkn45n6na6lri9ujejsnhamon55mamht5clcq4r8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs "DONATE NOW")
---
| Thank you so much for hearing me out.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zogcno4ctjs5sc8m2lf1f04nbt8vuhqo3cb4li9g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs)
---
Marco Rubio
---
| | |

* * *

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze08kliguos8lh7u3a066uhh5o0fgatr3vpjauso_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs)
---

You can claim a signed copy of Marco Rubio’s new book, _Decades of Decadence_ , today!
| [CLAIM A SIGNED COPY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5emvd1ctr1322uha0ngvb94de1i687jhmqieg8o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs "CLAIM A SIGNED COPY")
---

These signed versions are only available to top conservatives, and you are one of them. We don’t want you to miss out on this awesome opportunity.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqk13j7560rdrtcnbtc06ke34eav232pv08nofp8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:")

We need you to stop what you’re doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America’s best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn’t between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z86qc3o3dth79rd9gt9anebgsuoiou57gp1itblo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**
| [STOP THE DEMS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7uhs9u39depjdrvjhi5p76q0uclnoiro0r16tko_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs "STOP THE DEMS")
---
| Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee

#125
Washington, DC 20007

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrqbpopql1cpjselok1jbnkt5sn45mruc6o473mo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs)
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z97ht97027jhp237v4ji35pctgsnde5mrepko3g0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn49tvq8pru230kmg3roko7nvpbgtgb83oe7uv30_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuds8irphtlk350rukjuv4rumcti8kiigpc5658g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ziupi8ku9msv6hs55gu75f6kpbmctd4pbfdlo86o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvh28omd4cm89iiela1h60sgearbahh7auskiur8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd4so8d9c9ufb1p9b8kvhr9uuphmaa0ri5o4u4s8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjclkpti9hja2icdgemdvr221v9j6tsfeabtcib0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs)**.

---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu7ohi5ebiec2vrqnqhi3jd7hssbijenvnitnvl8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p36c3hm9pb24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7dp1p2qhod8kbdiv10i3ikrttabhu8lr308pg1o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti62o34c5h2bs)_

It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle. I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership. Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. And leadership has a price.” I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded. In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me. And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up that will quickly pile up. As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that the cost will exceed $500,000. Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep. No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me. That’s where you come in. ? When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting! A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced. Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer. But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming. . And I’ll commit to you that I will NOT let you down. So please, . We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can. Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . and we cannot stop now! Respectfully, James O’Keefe P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, . Deroy Murdock 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef1961e922e14d3aa6c398e99a0ee9c7&_e=paR9i016ynBV4pBnUDGO2zMFeS0SZ0W8k0RgIWJRUpZOgcZCNhG8tX1yP8TxEzLp_pcjABxWRQk1Jtb3L78ygTF6JV69jy-mrS9LSFp13HzRdPSPcLdSiZGesc2VT1-LaMtfeuSGRopHZnSn1wjJIBGm9DZoZoEZXwHgGmUg8PqfZ8vKd4O7mXMrBQSNfGjdknMNHVesFWyhmH3n5j_Nr2qu4YyS6XB4jhZGCTc_QPctlKRmDXUBsqBKUYHcsT4iWrWDQv5vvil6bwW0NCQAXyMr1wVJVYEBLjyXYKec_lSi35bPT8SjULycDe6g9QNU)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef1961e922e14d3aa6c398e99a0ee9c7&_e=paR9i016ynBV4pBnUDGO2zMFeS0SZ0W8k0RgIWJRUpZOgcZCNhG8tX1yP8TxEzLp_pcjABxWRQk1Jtb3L78ygTF6JV69jy-mrS9LSFp13HzRdPSPcLdSiZGesc2VT1-LaMtfeuSGRopHZnSn1wjJIBGm9DZoZoEZXwHgGmUg8PoPctdEtmmcgLd_cpbwpZCWKEWZD4bJemAntXjExl7XUlVBVGUCLpVc-KthCp9L1aEDdBdBYO24FC0CII9tcaPHa2a5AwsambU5qV0TVRNh2II39CjWSWzzY-tEe-gjAOBSOcBBSU_M8wcZjJPtocel)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef1961e922e14d3aa6c398e99a0ee9c7&_e=paR9i016ynBV4pBnUDGO2zMFeS0SZ0W8k0RgIWJRUpZOgcZCNhG8tX1yP8TxEzLp_pcjABxWRQk1Jtb3L78ygTF6JV69jy-mrS9LSFp13HzRdPSPcLdSiZGesc2VT1-LaMtfeuSGRopHZnSn1wjJIBGm9DZoZoEZXwHgGmUg8PrCvQZtQO4Sgo8TEIv-DEK5JREUNeVwYcrxGvcHB9kHsJda51fo97ino3YqLExnGt3N9VSoTpgIuMUhOKC3ad8VTDJ8d3_tMdjlolmvUUCBGzGssBczveOwAUj0jl-Qnrwm-ldGZ5xEkOVFw9HfuQer)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef1961e922e14d3aa6c398e99a0ee9c7&_e=paR9i016ynBV4pBnUDGO2zMFeS0SZ0W8k0RgIWJRUpZOgcZCNhG8tX1yP8TxEzLp_pcjABxWRQk1Jtb3L78ygTF6JV69jy-mrS9LSFp13HzRdPSPcLdSiZGesc2VT1-LaMtfeuSGRopHZnSn1wjJIBGm9DZoZoEZXwHgGmUg8PrzcT45zv_489gPPh2gJOOebC6KbyYICnx2-_TYQJq_VdHmcJJy-ikjhu8RDKCUWZEIQgxtN8wdCVduEoTf4j9Won3m65sd4z7CVahivgSW10jIv3FN5v2neyGu-0DDZtPH5R7VLbPu1UdWtd8sthQw)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef1961e922e14d3aa6c398e99a0ee9c7&_e=paR9i016ynBV4pBnUDGO2zMFeS0SZ0W8k0RgIWJRUpZOgcZCNhG8tX1yP8TxEzLp_pcjABxWRQk1Jtb3L78ygTF6JV69jy-mrS9LSFp13HzRdPSPcLdSiZGesc2VT1-LaMtfeuSGRopHZnSn1wjJIBGm9DZoZoEZXwHgGmUg8PrVmzrylpnTtysNRNchQeyjevMWA5OrKSu7Nwiurn8C37uT5ZxAOdGelTJ5YLZqgMrmfeZ3DD_QQ9qU9D_44EMTAYKa4GRFaGakvYZtaobYyYLKQjOPY1DCp6BHU60eRSWnz3djeWjhQAUBQgm6CbkV)**

I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,

body:
On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That's up to us

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | |
---
| | | _"I do solemnly swear that I will faithfully execute the Office of President of the United States, and will to the best of my ability, preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States."_
Friend,

On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That’s up to us, the American people.

We need to elect a President we can be proud of, someone we can trust to do the job with integrity and lead our country in the right direction.

If you wanted a blueprint to ruin America, you'd keep doing exactly what Joe Biden has allowed the radical Left to do for the last few years.

Tim Scott wants to protect America, bring faith back to our country, and provide opportunities for every American.

**We need Tim Scott as our next president!_[If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk5LTg1NjMyY2Q1NGZkMzQ2N2U4MDBhMDE1MzllYWNkMGQ4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL3ZvdGUtdGltLXNjb3R0L3N1cHBvcnQtdGltLXNjb3R0LWoyMC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE4X0FFLUZGUDEyLjEwOTgwM190MTM2MzkwMS0xMjYwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDIzMDcxOF9BRS1GRlAxMi4xMDk4MDNfdDEzNjM5MDEtMTI2MCJ9/zLSrIiKUJvJb5QM9PbmsOw "If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?")_**

On Tim’s first day in office, he will:
* Restart the Keystone Pipeline
* Secure the Border
* Stand up to China
* Restore Parental Rights

You can count on him to **FIRE** Attorney General Merrick Garland, **FIRE** FBI Director Christopher Wray, replace the political appointees in the Department of Justice, and restore confidence and integrity in our government.

**Simply put, Tim Scott will preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk5LTg1NjMyY2Q1NGZkMzQ2N2U4MDBhMDE1MzllYWNkMGQ4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL3ZvdGUtdGltLXNjb3R0L3N1cHBvcnQtdGltLXNjb3R0LWoyMC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE4X0FFLUZGUDEyLjEwOTgwM190MTM2MzkwMS0xMjYwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDIzMDcxOF9BRS1GRlAxMi4xMDk4MDNfdDEzNjM5MDEtMTI2MCJ9/TOcS1gHu3Aay1e-CwGEzNg "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT")

He has already done a great job as a conservative U.S. Senator from South Carolina since 2013. **But to really know Tim, who he is, and what he believes, you have to see where he came from.**

Tim grew up in a single-parent household. His mom worked long days and nights to keep a roof over their heads. While Tim didn’t have much growing up, his family instilled in him a strong faith in God, faith in America, and faith in the future.

Tim believes that America is the land of opportunity. He believes that America can do for anyone what she has done for him. He’s going to fight to ensure every person has the opportunity to live the American Dream.

America’s future will be bright under President Tim Scott. But that future won’t become reality unless we help Tim win!

disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Honestly, I'm not usually superstitious. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66673208/417180169/279091928?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230718_fr_lynnandgreg_cand_nc_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzkzOWNlZC04ZDI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glvz7pGIM-LT_ii1wRiIKpl1suyz93eCRYvJojA41Uw=)
---
Honestly, I am not usually superstitious, but during a campaign, if it ain’t broken, then why fix it? Plus, who really wants to tempt fate? **It’s campaigns 101.** Last week, I kicked off our canvassing efforts and I did so at the very first door I knocked on four years ago when I launched my first campaign for the State Senate! **At that house, I met Lynne and Greg. They’re an amazing couple — passionate about change and our great state.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66673209/417180170/279091928?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230718_fr_lynnandgreg_cand_nc_180da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzkzOWNlZC04ZDI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glvz7pGIM-LT_ii1wRiIKpl1suyz93eCRYvJojA41Uw=)** I’m lucky to call Lynne and Greg supporters four years (and a few campaigns) later. And when I knocked on their door this week, I got a hard commitment — another campaign 101. **Lynne and Greg are ready to help me reach voters up and down the state. Will you join them? Here are two key ways you can support our campaign today:** **1\. Sign up now to volunteer:** Over the next few weeks and months, we need your help (yes, you!) to help spread the word by knocking doors, phone banking, and text banking. **We just announced our first two canvasses in[North Wilmington on August 12](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66673210/417180171/-982252439?ms=EM_FL_MCB_20230718_fr_lynnandgreg_cand_nc_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzkzOWNlZC04ZDI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glvz7pGIM-LT_ii1wRiIKpl1suyz93eCRYvJojA41Uw=&emci=972ce517-e724-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cc939ced-8d25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=36397936) and [Milton on August 26](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66673211/417180172/-865898455?ms=EM_FL_MCB_20230718_fr_lynnandgreg_cand_nc_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzkzOWNlZC04ZDI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glvz7pGIM-LT_ii1wRiIKpl1suyz93eCRYvJojA41Uw=&emci=972ce517-e724-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cc939ced-8d25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=36397936)!** | [Volunteer on 8/12](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66673212/417180173/-982252439?ms=EM_FL_MCB_20230718_fr_lynnandgreg_cand_nc_180da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzkzOWNlZC04ZDI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glvz7pGIM-LT_ii1wRiIKpl1suyz93eCRYvJojA41Uw=&emci=972ce517-e724-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cc939ced-8d25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=36397936)

clean_body: Honestly, I'm not usually superstitious. | = Honestly, I am not usually superstitious, but during a campaign, if it ain’t broken, then why fix it? Plus, who really wants to tempt fate? It’s campaigns 101. Last week, I kicked off our canvassing efforts and I did so at the very first door I knocked on four years ago when I launched my first campaign for the State Senate! At that house, I met Lynne and Greg. They’re an amazing couple — passionate about change and our great state. = I’m lucky to call Lynne and Greg supporters four years (and a few campaigns) later. And when I knocked on their door this week, I got a hard commitment — another campaign 101. Lynne and Greg are ready to help me reach voters up and down the state. Will you join them? Here are two key ways you can support our campaign today: 1\. Sign up now to volunteer: Over the next few weeks and months, we need your help (yes, you!) to help spread the word by knocking doors, phone banking, and text banking. We just announced our first two canvasses in and ! | 2\. Donate now: Every. Single. Dollar. goes a long way to helping our team hire a campaign manager, communicate with voters, and much, much more! = = Every little bit helps, and together we can show that small states can do big things! Thanks for your support, -Sarah | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her.
