name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: Illinois Supreme Court Upholds SAFE-T Act
body:
While Gov. JB Pritzker departs for a week-long excursion to the United Kingdom, the Illinois Supreme Court upholds SAFE-T Act's cashless bail.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/f5b0e114ee16/breaking-illinois-supreme-court-upholds-safe-t-act?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/illinois-supreme-court-rules-in-favor-of-eliminating-cash-bail-says-its-constitutional-dealing-a-blow-to-safe-t-act-opponents.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Supreme Court justices (Source: Illinois Supreme Court website)

Illinois Supreme Court Rules in Favor of Eliminating Cash Bail, Says Its Constitutional, Dealing a Blow to SAFE-T Act Opponents (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/illinois-supreme-court-rules-in-favor-of-eliminating-cash-bail-says-its-constitutional-dealing-a-blow-to-safe-t-act-opponents.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Tuesday morning, the Illinois Supreme Court (https://ilcourtsaudio.blob.core.windows.net/antilles-resources/resources/79db4d0e-4bed-4cd2-bec1-88fc1ba8b904/Rowe%20v.%20Raoul,%202023%20IL%20129248.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ruled that the cashless bail provision under the SAFE-T Act is constitutional in a 5-2 decision, after more than 65 states attorneys filed lawsuits late last year arguing that the elimination of cash bail was unconstitutional in Illinois.

In the majority opinion, Supreme Court Chief Justice Mary Ann Theis wrote that the Illinois Constitution “does not mandate that monetary bail is the only means to ensure criminal defendants appear for trials or the only means to protect the public.”

In a
statement (https://www.illinois.gov/news/press-release.26729.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) released moments after the ruling, Gov. JB Prtizker, who is in the United Kingdom this week leading a trade mission, said,

“I’m pleased that the Illinois Supreme Court has upheld the constitutionality of the SAFE-T Act and the elimination of cash bail. We can now move forward with historic reform to ensure pre-trial detainment is determined by the danger an individual poses to the community instead of by their ability to pay their way out of jail. My thanks to Attorney General Raoul’s office and the many people who worked tirelessly over the last months to defend these important reforms. I look forward to continuing to work with the General Assembly and our many other partners as we transition to a more equitable and just Illinois.”

Under the provision, judges can make a determination and keep defendants behind bars if they pose a threat, a security risk, or if they are likely to flee before their trial – but many have argued that such a provision violates the separation of powers and could return violent criminals back into their communities as they await trial.

Illinois remains the only state in the country with a provision to end cash bail.
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/pritzker-departs-for-the-united-kingdom-to-lead-7-day-trade-mission-as-crime-and-high-unemployment-rates-continue-to-dominate-local-headlines.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker (Source: Pat Nabong/Sun-Times file)

Pritzker Departs for the United Kingdom to Lead 7-Day Trade Mission as Crime and High Unemployment Rates Continue to Dominate Local Headlines (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/pritzker-departs-for-the-united-kingdom-to-lead-7-day-trade-mission-as-crime-and-high-unemployment-rates-continue-to-dominate-local-headlines.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Thursday Gov. JB Pritzker departs for a 7-day trade mission to the United Kingdom, where he’ll be accompanied by a large team of advisors, education and political and business leaders from across the state, in his latest attempt to boost Illinois’ struggling economy as the unemployment rate remains the 4th worst (https://www.bls.gov/web/laus/laumstrk.htm?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in the country.

In a
statement (https://www.illinois.gov/news/press-release.26704.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) released by the Governor’s Office, Pritzker referred to himself as the state’s “chief marketing officer.”

“When I first ran for Governor, I promised to be our state’s best Chief Marketing Officer—letting the world know that Illinois is the best place to live, work, and do business.

Over the next several days, I couldn’t be more excited to meet with UK and international leaders—sharing the many virtues of our state, from our talented workforce and world-class manufacturing industry to our booming electric vehicle ecosystem and ambitious clean energy goals.”

In addition to aides and deputy governors tagging along on the trip, Pritzker will also be joined by Illinois House Speaker Chris Welch, D; the president of the University of Illinois Tim Kileen; Nicor Gas CEO Wendell Dallas; ComEd CEO Gil Quiniones; Illinois Manufacturing Association CEO Mark Denzler; Illinois Hotel and Lodging Association CEO Michael Jacobson; Illinois Realtors Association President Michael Gobber and Chicagoland Chamber of Commerce Vice President of Government Relations Brad Tietz and United Airlines Vice President of State and Local Government Dan Lynch.

Pritzker will lead a
delegation (https://www.illinois.gov/news/press-release.26704.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) of 42 people from Illinois representing various industries and businesses who will accompany him on his 7-day trade mission to the United Kingdom.

Pritzker travels overseas with the backdrop of a state struggling economically and Chicago crime continuing to dominate national headlines.

In the last year, three major Chicago businesses have left Illinois, including Citadel, Boeing and Caterpillar, as they seek more pro-business friendly states to set up their new headquarters.

In September,
McDonald’s (https://www.foxbusiness.com/politics/mcdonalds-ceo-says-chicago-crime-hurting-recruitment-scaring-employees-companies-flee-city-in-crisis?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) CEO Chris Kempczinski gave a speech at the Economic Club in Chicago where he talked about how the crime in Chicago was hurting their recruiting efforts.

“Everywhere I go, I’m confronted by the same question: ‘What’s going on in Chicago?’ There is a general sense out there that our city is in crisis.”

Kempczinksi went on to say that, “Truth is, it’s more difficult for me to recruit a new employee to McDonald’s to join us in Chicago than it was in the past.”

The delegation is expected to return to Illinois on July 20th.
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=16eea36f06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_18_04_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-16eea36f06-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: Blue Amp Action
subject: 📢 Demand Accountability: Urge the Senate to Pass Supreme Court Ethics Standards!
body:
Take a Stand:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b34afe5-6ef5-4f41-b6c5-ceccc399fd4b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Peter, **It's time to demand accountability from the highest court of law in the United States. ** **Recent actions by Supreme Court justices have raised serious concerns about the adherence to ethical standards within the Court. ** [We must unite and urge the Senate to pass new ethics standards for the Supreme Court. Together, we can hold our justices accountable and restore trust in our judicial system. Sign the petition now to demand the Senate take action and enforce ethical standards for the Supreme Court.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34a51e6a-46c3-4442-8587-8fb5ec48186a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3dcd5a59-3c8d-4f81-bfdd-1b535097eef6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
* Justice Samuel Alito accepted a fishing trip to Alaska, funded by a top Republican donor.
* Justice Neil Gorsuch failed to disclose his sale of a vacation property to the head of a powerful law firm.
* Justice Clarence Thomas's long-standing relationship with a wealthy right-wing donor has raised eyebrows.

The decisions made by the Supreme Court have far-reaching consequences, impacting millions of lives across the country. From student loan forgiveness to voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and abortion, these cases shape our society. It is imperative that we establish a clear ethics code for the Court to ensure fairness, impartiality, and transparency. We must unite and urge the Senate to pass new ethics standards for the Supreme Court. Together, we can hold our justices accountable and restore trust in our judicial system. [Sign the petition now to demand the Senate take action and enforce ethical standards for the Supreme Court.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbcab3a24-31c6-4efa-843c-1b0a8d091fc0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbfdb3c99-a3bb-4ebc-acdc-a54543ded067/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

body:
This is Senate Democrats’ only hope
| When we reached out to you about the sky-high stakes of the Arizona Senate race, we thought a RUSH of support from Democrats like you would pour in.

So when we checked our fund balance this morning, **_we were shocked to see we MISSED our urgent goal by $6,109!!!_** | [**CLOSE THE GAP: RUSH $7 BY MIDNIGHT TO SAVE OUR SENATE MAJORITY FROM MAGA DEFEAT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49707?t=6&akid=9227%2E878179%2EyEdiqV)
---
We really don’t know what else to say to convince you. **Democrat Ruben Gallego is INCHES from beating Kyrsten Sinema — and SAVING the Senate!**

But if Sinema gets _just_ enough support, she’ll SPOIL the race and give MAGA Republicans a sweeping victory. President Biden’s agenda would be TOAST!

[**So don’t leave Democrats like Gallego in the dust when they need us most: Rush $7 or anything you can spare by MIDNIGHT to get us back on track and expand our slim Senate majority before it’s too late! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49707?t=7&akid=9227%2E878179%2EyEdiqV)

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk27qdeqp7f153msb6p26rrrjtnjtnirk1lch8j0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5eto4e1vit1dr4972uvafu3ip2l3n8dd31ooiso_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsl8mc0oahh8vrre1n7kph65qq58dl3suk0v9m8g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgnfvj8202ddmqmpghqler1f6ca0qkkvli3cal98_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4ar2haqb9le8d0s9qigijvblf3i17vlm5bvdcao_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo840estn938ve580vqkmperomrttusv44rcp270_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpp19semmfoaq38u0irrc9f86t7ku53gae2ahbp0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvp23m8v5i6o33h2l4d0lptm5v6fcbtgsm3m18h0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmem7rqqmgqlsb4ukm4eqgl1f2hooap2eil2dvd8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdi5eotjgen3gn971mckb46okpu3cisojtmstmag_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn4844riep48me39qm3vvaqrjjcogueaahai5h68_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvjfrg1uc6aphd969afsm03srqq4p7b64k46vns0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhhp03f93au0i5g1nfigt14bc93vr3g7a7righ9o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4ea9fl335amrtk222dq4g1f0cla7vg0g51fcrt8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2nnklg785e60rb85nc703atbd2rl1id2jq7uckg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlama7aeo85dpfvlpc1lgjd80rjcie5egj1mio90_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3ing1l2806u2a4rc466st004b34056mbi9gfilo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfea7ogtb5277rvlf9uakhnev9d3nqbdoe7mdg2g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

Pro Life Update

clean_body: I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Pro Life Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband is facing 10 years in prison for defending himself
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8cpo4nb8p269codd0048oasvklp4m3f0orrn9i0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj5p8vg66lru247ag6nk1tsfgb47mp5ha2r1ihlo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq9o0m5bhr3eq2mgsnk4d0vu73je7u2b2sn66rao_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z93jm33aflkt4u772u5bq3oir0qtd16gje5g2im0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhko6vage9ju7f8k6fihilgdbpm8jgl0bb40bkpg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkcjiq5becrv82287tuguklq3hd09dnfv2cfp430_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhslj55qf6uevlo6k5o725bgl1t6cjseibhcdeto_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chj61pr2cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi1t673jetqcq6abpmekm4jh604ljl6jmor1c330_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs)_

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662989%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wgL%2biP6ZHWpd3pQSer%2bihQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662989%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wgL%2biP6ZHWpd3pQSer%2bihQ&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662980%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w6JigpLq2TzV8IxP8OHlPQ&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662981%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oSbZ6J7IzpBNPe6bosSq%2bQ&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662982%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yLfVJM%2bhdcwPf7BK%2bgrDAQ&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662984%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kfrJIGd%2bYmEk84DUewpAAg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662995%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HMVpYzd4DxBdgI%2b8MfPbEw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662996%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tEAOMzsKjpu42wUYsfYebQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662997%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JWm3l3QTr%2fJ%2bGTbDwFF98A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662998%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ae0Qzm5x6wz4h%2fwVNVIwkg&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662999%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U%2bExvvNiolovyb9A8jnf3g&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662990%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1aiL3K4LJb6zR%2bcvMUJo6Q&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662991%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=88QCwXKzobesq788TRT7aA&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662992%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t%2f6Sw1pRFVi%2bM%2bc87WZ%2fLg&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no “deadly insurrection.” The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It’s time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Get this: MAGA House Republicans don’t think you should be able to file your taxes for free. And just when we’re starting to finally make some hard-won progress, they want to yank us all the way backward. You see, for years, I’ve been calling on the IRS to establish a free federal tax filing tool. Last year, Congress passed new funding to help make it happen. The IRS announced that next year, they’ll finally roll out a pilot program to test it — a great first step. But a GOP House bill would stop free filing in its tracks. You know who’d get hurt by the Republicans’ plan? American taxpayers, who spend an average of $140 to file their taxes. You know who’d get helped? Big tax prep corporations like H&R Block and TurboTax, who hoover up that $140. [**Add your name if you agree: the IRS needs to move forward with establishing free tax filing, and we can’t let MAGA House Republicans stop us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66691947/417226792/-2000525500?refcode=EMZ15L_TAX_E_20230718_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjM1YTVjYy1iMjI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PtoaiAB2WqT22tXQlSFsaWIlwIlg3v8OuT39xh5lGOM=&emci=7535a5cc-b225-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7635a5cc-b225-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66691948/417226793/-2000525500?refcode=EMZ15L_TAX_E_20230718_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjM1YTVjYy1iMjI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PtoaiAB2WqT22tXQlSFsaWIlwIlg3v8OuT39xh5lGOM=&emci=7535a5cc-b225-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7635a5cc-b225-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
You know, tax prep giants were supposed to offer free services themselves — but they hid them behind deceptive marketing, and they laid tricks and traps to steer taxpayers into costly services.
People get cornered into paying for something that should be free. But that’s not all: they also risk having their personal data shared with other giant corporations.
Last week, I released an investigation showing that **big tax prep companies have recklessly shared tens of millions of taxpayers’ sensitive personal and financial data** with Meta (a.k.a. the owner of Facebook), Google, and other big tech firms for targeted advertising. It’s a shocking breach of privacy, it may well have broken the law, and I’ll keep working to hold them accountable.
This revelation is yet another reason for the IRS to launch its own free tax filing service so taxpayers don’t have to go through untrustworthy and incompetent tax prep firms.
[**The federal tax filing process should be fast, easy, and free — and you shouldn’t have to use profiteering, personal-data-sharing middle-men. Add your name if you agree.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66691949/417226794/-2000525500?refcode=EMZ15L_TAX_E_20230718_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjM1YTVjYy1iMjI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PtoaiAB2WqT22tXQlSFsaWIlwIlg3v8OuT39xh5lGOM=&emci=7535a5cc-b225-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7635a5cc-b225-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

Peter,

I want to take a minute to talk to you about my friend, Representative Marie Gluesenkamp Perez.

In 2022, she shocked the nation when she flipped a Washington district that political experts considered _unwinnable_. Now, she's running for reelection, and she's counting on our support to beat the odds again in 2024.

**[If we plan on taking back the House Majority, we have to defend Marie's seat. Will you split a donation between our campaigns today to help Marie prepare for the tough race ahead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66674455/417184204/1097557615?ms=em23_230718_MGPT_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230718_MGPT_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230718_MGPT_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230718_MGPT_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=a5V110aRIpnlO4eUUjMkIZco5JcgglTujcmB/l65ccEWbd2BQgejB2WyCltRBZ9pQYBXjLeASP1PzulRQ2kMhWww/PdCDFgkrIAwemj2lsLffbYnUEEn7abN728zBN/+tr47+w3S5HgfKR+q90P8NitKCvdAMcvuONO70OiFX+o=&refcode2=4d49041e-9225-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQ0OTA0MWUtOTIyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4H4bWtkETKB6zvNEJ1YBts_3FTJ8VzesP4kX3Z16G-E=)**

A fifth-generation Washingtonian, Marie understands the struggles working-class families are facing because she's lived through them. As a mother and small business owner, she's felt the squeeze of rising costs in health insurance for her infant son, child care, housing, gas, and so much more.

Now, Marie is running for reelection to continue being a voice for working folks all across Washington's 3rd district. While far-right politicians are determined to elect more extremist candidates, I'm working to support for-the-people leaders like Marie who go to bat for Washington families — _not special interests._

clean_body: Marie has been a strong voice in the House for folks all across Washington State Peter, I want to take a minute to talk to you about my friend, Representative Marie Gluesenkamp Perez. In 2022, she shocked the nation when she flipped a Washington district that political experts considered unwinnable. Now, she's running for reelection, and she's counting on our support to beat the odds again in 2024. = A fifth-generation Washingtonian, Marie understands the struggles working-class families are facing because she's lived through them. As a mother and small business owner, she's felt the squeeze of rising costs in health insurance for her infant son, child care, housing, gas, and so much more. Now, Marie is running for reelection to continue being a voice for working folks all across Washington's 3rd district. While far-right politicians are determined to elect more extremist candidates, I'm working to support for-the-people leaders like Marie who go to bat for Washington families — not special interests. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | &expresslane=true&amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQ0OTA0MWUtOTIyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4H4bWtkETKB6zvNEJ1YBts3FTJ8VzesP4kX3Z16G-E= | = | = | = | = With you by our side, I know Marie and I can keep working together to make real progress in Congress on behalf of Washington families. name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0i8057vvs5fojscooq77nehcud2pghhi811k1ig_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0el5an3pdklts7a43nmtkhd2dduu2q1p5gqnjf0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlq5maq3g7q4ee0hl09peb111kadfvsloel62sjg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z204mda0f3amfer0u6b1tn51ekucl4a6hlk2v63o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z21ce7piio5il8748pk8ffktli0i1g3vanplo3so_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2lr99mt5oco9s7jpepgl9fr8mdkch8fgnvmrl00_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdabj9mf0d4gtaoegias1570nduhih4b41v7togg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrns7ubuj519p614m4rvjo56tpgtq1iba0f6k240_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7r1veadpcl9dm3ndcaf9309hre5pi3jkm7qs3p0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk8393vm1p7botjlkd970pg3me14jhh3albqbtbg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti6ao76c5h2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

# [Urge Joe Manchin not to run for President](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94c5e4a8-d415-4fee-b21e-a020d5a2cba6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Senator Joe Manchin, Democrat of West Virginia, has been hinting more and more that he will run as a third-party candidate in 2024 -- presumably a Biden-Trump rematch. If Manchin does do this, he will not only risk putting Trump back in the White House by drawing votes from Biden, he will almost certainly see his Senate seat flip to Republican. He has realistically no chance of winning, but he could cause an enormous amount of damage to our democracy and our nation. [**Add your name, and urge Senator Manchin not to run.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfba7aec6-f4d6-4ac8-8b38-208aaabd43b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Terri Sewell
subject: this news is horrific for Alabama and our district
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERRI SEWELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
Terri Sewell is the proud product of Alabama's rural Black Belt and has spent her life fighting for Alabama communities. From her time as one of the only black public finance lawyers in Alabama, when she delivered financing for new campus facilities at Alabama State University, Tuskegee University, and Stillman College, to her work as Congresswoman for Alabama's 7th District, Terri Sewell has delivered results every step of the way. If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/h2ckjQDqdgIb5G6J7xsl9RUcYNojwIK3LsXtOfIDvL8=/GsDmLC0Ff3khIu9FtMdFtmj-ypD3x6PoR4B0yVwCxuI=)
---

| |
---
**BREAKING NEWS:**
**New Alabama voting map sends Selma and Montgomery to MAGA District**

Chip in $10 or any amount right now to protect Alabama's 7th Congressional District from an extreme MAGA Republican takeover.

| [Chip in $10->](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230717_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_RR)
---

I'm outraged. Our hard-won Supreme Court case siding with the Voting Rights Act, siding with fairness and equity, and real representation in government is being ignored by the Republican super majority in the Alabama legislature.

Not only is the state legislature advancing maps that do NOT create a second minority majority voting district in Alabama as it was directed, it is trying to REDUCE the number of Black voters in our home district, leaving my seat vulnerable to an extreme MAGA challenger.

[**We can 't let that happen, **](https://act.myngp.com/el/h2ckjQDqdgIb5G6J7xsl9RUcYNojwIK3LsXtOfIDvL8=/X-T1s2T9rLS57mr7lz1yGmwtHFZKeRL8i4d54VIQK8M=?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230718_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_RR)[**friend**](https://act.myngp.com/el/h2ckjQDqdgIb5G6J7xsl9RUcYNojwIK3LsXtOfIDvL8=/X-T1s2T9rLS57mr7lz1yGmwtHFZKeRL8i4d54VIQK8M=?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230718_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_RR)[**. This new map flies in the face of everything the original lawsuit intended. I cannot waste a second if I 'm going to fight back at the polls in 2024. Chip in $10 here if you're on my side>>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/h2ckjQDqdgIb5G6J7xsl9RUcYNojwIK3LsXtOfIDvL8=/X-T1s2T9rLS57mr7lz1yGmwtHFZKeRL8i4d54VIQK8M=?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230718_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_RR)

| [DONATE $10 NOW »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=10&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230718_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_RR)

But it's not just that they are reducing the number of Black voters in our district, it's HOW they are doing it....

In one map, they've moved my hometown of Selma and Montgomery -- two beacons of the civil rights movement and the fight to pass the _Voting Right Acts of 1965_ -- to Alabama's MAGA-controlled, Trumper Second District. It's horrifying; it's intentional; and it opens up the only Black-majority district -- our district -- to a Republican takeover.

Apparently this map didn't go far enough for some GOP state senators. In another map they passed today, the Black population in the 2nd district is only 38.31%, which is far below what is needed to ensure that Black voters have a real opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice.

_We cannot let this stand. That 's why I need your help right now. _

clean_body: Terri Sewell is the proud product of Alabama's rural Black Belt and has spent her life fighting for Alabama communities. From her time as one of the only black public finance lawyers in Alabama, when she delivered financing for new campus facilities at Alabama State University, Tuskegee University, and Stillman College, to her work as Congresswoman for Alabama's 7th District, Terri Sewell has delivered results every step of the way. If you'd like to unsubscribe, = | | BREAKING NEWS: New Alabama voting map sends Selma and Montgomery to MAGA District Chip in $10 or any amount right now to protect Alabama's 7th Congressional District from an extreme MAGA Republican takeover. | I'm outraged. Our hard-won Supreme Court case siding with the Voting Rights Act, siding with fairness and equity, and real representation in government is being ignored by the Republican super majority in the Alabama legislature. Not only is the state legislature advancing maps that do NOT create a second minority majority voting district in Alabama as it was directed, it is trying to REDUCE the number of Black voters in our home district, leaving my seat vulnerable to an extreme MAGA challenger. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | | | | | | But it's not just that they are reducing the number of Black voters in our district, it's HOW they are doing it.... In one map, they've moved my hometown of Selma and Montgomery -- two beacons of the civil rights movement and the fight to pass the Voting Right Acts of 1965 -- to Alabama's MAGA-controlled, Trumper Second District. It's horrifying; it's intentional; and it opens up the only Black-majority district -- our district -- to a Republican takeover. Apparently this map didn't go far enough for some GOP state senators. In another map they passed today, the Black population in the 2nd district is only 38.31%, which is far below what is needed to ensure that Black voters have a real opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice. body:
|

I'll cut to the chase, friend.

In June, we faced the biggest test of our campaign to date – the first FEC fundraising deadline of our campaign.

Thanks to you, we sent a message to the pundits, and our opponent David Schweikert, that we’re a movement to take seriously. We raised an impressive $300,000 _in just six weeks,_ with 88% of our contributions coming in from Arizona and more than half from within AZ-01.

**Over the weekend, we learned Schweikert raised a little less than double the amount we did, thanks to big donations from special interests and his allies like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Kevin McCarthy.**

The good news is that he had the full three months to hit this number, but it means we have a bit of ground to make up. That’s why we’ve set a $10,000 end-of-week goal to catch up.

That’s where you come in:

**[We’re 3 days from our end-of-week deadline, and we are just a little short of where we need to be. clean_body: | = I'll cut to the chase, friend. In June, we faced the biggest test of our campaign to date – the first FEC fundraising deadline of our campaign. Thanks to you, we sent a message to the pundits, and our opponent David Schweikert, that we’re a movement to take seriously. We raised an impressive $300,000 in just six weeks, with 88% of our contributions coming in from Arizona and more than half from within AZ-01. Over the weekend, we learned Schweikert raised a little less than double the amount we did, thanks to big donations from special interests and his allies like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Kevin McCarthy. The good news is that he had the full three months to hit this number, but it means we have a bit of ground to make up. That’s why we’ve set a $10,000 end-of-week goal to catch up. That’s where you come in: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you. I know we can do this. name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: My story:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
_Mandela Barnes' The Long Run is proud to endorse Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo’s campaign for reelection. Dr. Yadira Caraveo is running for reelection in Colorado’s 8th district to continue fighting to combat climate change and protect reproductive freedom. Please read a message from Yadira below and support her campaign:_

I wanted to share a little bit about my story, and why I’m in this fight. [**I hope you’ll take a moment to read this message, but if you’re already with me, will you split a contribution between my reelection campaign and The Long Run and support my advocacy for working-class families in Congress?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-yadira-split.tIhyHn&refcode=em230718-1-t1&t=1&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-yadira-split.tIhyHn&refcode=em230718-1-t1&t=2&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
**Family means everything to me.** My parents came to Colorado from a small town in Mexico, looking for a better life. They knew that hard work and caring for others are the values that build strong communities and families. They raised me and my siblings with those values — on a construction worker’s pay in the Adams County home they still live in.
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-yadira-split.tIhyHn&refcode=em230718-1-t1&t=3&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
**I put myself through undergrad and medical school, becoming the first person in my family to graduate from college.** But even before I finished my medical training, advocacy became an important part of my life. I helped organize my fellow medical residents for better working conditions, and became a union representative with SEIU.
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-yadira-split.tIhyHn&refcode=em230718-1-t1&t=4&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
I chose to be a pediatrician in Adams County to give back to my community – to the folks that raised me. **But I quickly understood that truly helping children required a lot more than what I was able to do as a doctor.**
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-yadira-split.tIhyHn&refcode=em230718-1-t1&t=5&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
**That’s why I ran for the state legislature.** In that time, I worked to pass legislation to force drug companies to lower the cost of prescriptions, expand funding for preschool, ensure all Coloradans have access to paid family leave and sick days, and protect renters from eviction during the pandemic.
And that’s why I ran for Congress in 2022. The pollsters said I had a 4% shot of winning this race. Thanks to this grassroots movement, we defied the odds and elected the first Latina from Colorado to Congress.
I promise you that I will continue my commitment to the families I see every day in Colorado. I will build on my work to lower health care costs, address the high cost of living, and protect a woman’s right to choose. [**I’m ready to continue advocating for you and Coloradans in Congress, but I can’t beat the far-right or get there alone. So please, will you split a contribution between my congressional campaign and The Long Run today?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-yadira-split.tIhyHn&refcode=em230718-1-t1&t=6&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Yadira Caraveo and The Long Run immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-yadira-split.ExArxt&refcode=em230718-1-t1&t=25&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-yadira-split.vUUynz&refcode=em230718-1-t1&t=26&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-yadira-split.WDogYn&refcode=em230718-1-t1&t=27&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-yadira-split.at45XC&refcode=em230718-1-t1&t=28&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-yadira-split.BoLQGv&refcode=em230718-1-t1&t=29&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-yadira-split.tIhyHn&refcode=em230718-1-t1&t=30&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
Thank you for being a part of my story.
-Yadira

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=31&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=32&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=33&refcode2=4659_196590_nOkUBA&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=34&akid=4659%2E196590%2EnOkUBA)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

subject: Taking a stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
Politicians today are too scared to take action. I’m not.| [Unsubscribe](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_s=313076a7b3db401a959b9fabc518d660&_t=5kjH-xeVxIfbu88JycCjS0334r1IRHGz0fMRDBJvHBe8FJ5opI5L3W-DsQ37opnDSyjYJJHZXN6Gz3UqCja8U_qw0K9-uvPsQXugsOfj8l0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_s=313076a7b3db401a959b9fabc518d660&_t=5kjH-xeVxIfbu88JycCjS0334r1IRHGz0fMRDBJvHBe8FJ5opI5L3W-DsQ37opnDSyjYJJHZXN6Gz3UqCja8U_qw0K9-uvPsQXugsOfj8l0%3D)

| | [](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=313076a7b3db401a959b9fabc518d660&_e=Od-EHN-2J4FqNA2LMDL0jo6Q8fluVn7b5b-lWtMABedeoThd0jelvfE1Etc26bLWvLy-Gs2DENz_m_aedVtVzDG_VqnZfH0HJrVnte0l7OdTA5_kn3zVHfONPr92nt5kNrnnRV0bRcR6wqn7Kmy3EBfbgx076opO4re2m51dd63d_YI3Ge7YuNx9iHBu40GtPaslcyCuQinrie-VCvZ-BAF8pp5ZzPlbi_jpz8qBgM4DXudyPwD9xv3O6WtSaHos-PvY_KkSrhUMQhymhPsmmMHhhzsazNzUF8pC5623OyTLeaAGkAHX1yGWp-GHyvwiRhwvLEpWgwLuNT-2VnITIeKIMTUOTuCbfmbrhcEy-M9VYbWX90NKoTCzg5CImcbGg88dQG1U1jCbTXY4YdmZZSYEg0T2zojMCI2YBctZazjVANd8vg3lzcryBFDqOEOG)
---
| | I shouldn’t be alive, Peter. When I was serving in Afghanistan, a roadside bomb blew up under the gas tank of my vehicle. I burned alive for what felt like an eternity as I came to terms with my mortality.
---
[](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=313076a7b3db401a959b9fabc518d660&_e=Od-EHN-2J4FqNA2LMDL0jo6Q8fluVn7b5b-lWtMABedeoThd0jelvfE1Etc26bLWvLy-Gs2DENz_m_aedVtVzDG_VqnZfH0HJrVnte0l7OdTA5_kn3zVHfONPr92nt5kNrnnRV0bRcR6wqn7Kmy3EBfbgx076opO4re2m51dd63d_YI3Ge7YuNx9iHBu40GtPaslcyCuQinrie-VCvZ-BAF8pp5ZzPlbi_jpz8qBgM4DXudyPwD9xv3O6WtSaHos-PvY_KkSrhUMQhymhPsmmMHhhzsazNzUF8pC5623OyQWLM1Z4KxxyEQ4Vqc2HtkyvPCn3cp_8eSqpjEjUeH5swEz4VSfIpqdGQmyJC2qWNw2Es5Tn8_1aZM321WFDYqeSsxsF21WDz3ndXB6kCd0f4zAlEAp14PVcs2XVLTnKDfhg5L8vZCNrVBc4H-FP7Ca)
---
I thought it would be the end of me, but by the grace of God, I survived. I got a second chance at life, and there’s no way I’m going to waste it by only looking out for myself. [**That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Nevada**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=313076a7b3db401a959b9fabc518d660&_e=Od-EHN-2J4FqNA2LMDL0jo6Q8fluVn7b5b-lWtMABedeoThd0jelvfE1Etc26bLWvLy-Gs2DENz_m_aedVtVzDG_VqnZfH0HJrVnte0l7OdTA5_kn3zVHfONPr92nt5kNrnnRV0bRcR6wqn7Kmy3EBfbgx076opO4re2m51dd63d_YI3Ge7YuNx9iHBu40GtPaslcyCuQinrie-VCvZ-BAF8pp5ZzPlbi_jpz8qBgM4DXudyPwD9xv3O6WtSaHos-PvY_KkSrhUMQhymhPsmmMHhhzsazNzUF8pC5623OyRbuyIBYDiOm7VmaV8b_QZH9KNUUkoWcGQoV3HIPj9ldMlnsCRr_NfwH1OQPyMZdg7toULXEQsE2Ipp572w8SAL4TFQtnIYC8VYeCACILUzN4iQilhknMMtgKUErQ-lRJYACTojhfbfDmjh-XaHnX_9) — not because it’s easy. But because the reason I’m still alive today _is to serve_. Our nation is in crisis and our so-called “leaders” have gone AWOL. With an economy in shambles, unprecedented threats from our adversaries, a wide open border, and D.C. politicians like NV Sen. Jacky Rosen failing to tackle our challenges head on, our nation is on a collision course with total disaster. **Too often, politicians only work to serve themselves while forgetting about the people they swore to serve. They see a challenge and they run the other way.** Well, Peter, I’ve survived my fair share of challenges, and I’m willing to take this one head on — because even though I’m no longer on active duty, I haven’t given up on my commitment to service. Our country, our state, and our people deserve a Senator who’s proven that they’ll put everything on the line for America, just as I have. That’s why I want to deploy to Washington D.C. for a new mission with the same goal: [**Serving our great country.**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=313076a7b3db401a959b9fabc518d660&_e=Od-EHN-2J4FqNA2LMDL0jo6Q8fluVn7b5b-lWtMABedeoThd0jelvfE1Etc26bLWvLy-Gs2DENz_m_aedVtVzDG_VqnZfH0HJrVnte0l7OdTA5_kn3zVHfONPr92nt5kNrnnRV0bRcR6wqn7Kmy3EBfbgx076opO4re2m51dd63d_YI3Ge7YuNx9iHBu40GtPaslcyCuQinrie-VCvZ-BAF8pp5ZzPlbi_jpz8qBgM4DXudyPwD9xv3O6WtSaHos-PvY_KkSrhUMQhymhPsmmMHhhzsazNzUF8pC5623OyT2AUemd5GnXW2t7xcU0JE008mRMmRsl3iPfFaXYtDmEXfc7F2yA5PermQScHvrClYHDcWuRqt6yCd3lpGd6jXCT5L5RAEGhIPGzzFPqay8Nl20CeqJvlPCacaiZyCElXFNg5PfswV_jAhkCI9BIwCB) Peter, can I count on you to have my back on my next mission? clean_body: Politicians today are too scared to take action. I’m not.| | | | | | I shouldn’t be alive, Peter. When I was serving in Afghanistan, a roadside bomb blew up under the gas tank of my vehicle. I burned alive for what felt like an eternity as I came to terms with my mortality. I thought it would be the end of me, but by the grace of God, I survived. I got a second chance at life, and there’s no way I’m going to waste it by only looking out for myself. — not because it’s easy. But because the reason I’m still alive today is to serve. Our nation is in crisis and our so-called “leaders” have gone AWOL. With an economy in shambles, unprecedented threats from our adversaries, a wide open border, and D.C. politicians like NV Sen. Jacky Rosen failing to tackle our challenges head on, our nation is on a collision course with total disaster. Too often, politicians only work to serve themselves while forgetting about the people they swore to serve. They see a challenge and they run the other way. Well, Peter, I’ve survived my fair share of challenges, and I’m willing to take this one head on — because even though I’m no longer on active duty, I haven’t given up on my commitment to service. Our country, our state, and our people deserve a Senator who’s proven that they’ll put everything on the line for America, just as I have. That’s why I want to deploy to Washington D.C. for a new mission with the same goal: Peter, can I count on you to have my back on my next mission? This is our country and our fight. I won’t back down. Duty First, CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.) | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. | Peter,

**Hilary has been to every county in Washington during her seven years as Commissioner of Public Lands.** In every county, she has seen communities struggling with the same things - housing affordability, rising costs, the impacts of climate change, and lack of mental health care. These challenges are only worsening with climate change bringing floods, fire, and droughts.

**It’s time for a leader who understands the devastating effects of climate change to take charge.** We need a governor with a plan for every county who can deliver results on an epic scale. As Commissioner of Public Lands, Hilary has experience executing plans to protect the land we call home while also bettering the lives of the people who live there. subject: About this week

body:
I've got good news and bad news

| |
---
| | | Friend,

My team set an ambitious goal for this week: **_[100 donors from every state.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc92t5vipa09j0faqhogoua97a6i4r9ungfpa1j0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti61pb6clh2bs "100 donors from every state.")_**

We had a meeting to go over the numbers and I've got good news and bad news.

The bad news is that we still need 3 more donors from your state to knock this goal out of the park.

**_The good news? All it takes is a $1 gift to help._**

---
| | | [CHIP IN $1](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu80n5is6t0fmlcbhdv93f93qofo2983lr5a48ho_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti61pb6clh2bs "CHIP IN $1")
---

---

I know I've been able to count on your help in the past, which is why I knew you would be a good person for me to ask for help again.

**_[If you can, would you chip in just $1 to help me hit my weekly goal?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zogt74ohppmvkbci9723r55j156e96neua823v7g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti61pb6clh2bs "If you can, would you chip in just $1 to help me hit my weekly goal?")_** It's not easy to fund a campaign and I won't be able to do this without you.

Thank you for your commitment to Team Tim Scott and to our mission of restoring Faith in America.

God Bless,

Tim

---
* * *

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs4e7h40ljo8b1l8n5k3m8keul75i070blj7m40o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti61pb6clh2bs "JOIN ME NOW")

_If you 're able-bodied, you work.
If you take out a loan, you pay it back.
And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail.

America needs more victors and less victims._

These aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as President, I will defend them.

**_[If you agree, will you join my team?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znnfjdb6rbechggntasl1d4h8ld46cefnla8d9rg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti61pb6clh2bs "If you agree, will you join my team?")_**

---
