---

Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness, and victimhood over victory. **We CANNOT let them destroy our values and destroy our country.**

I believe that with faith and American values, our country's future can be brighter than ever before. But this fight isn't going to be easy.

**_[I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America's future?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znnrh60ji6dm1cds61386nuit1pj09tgmkm12nh0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sti61pb6clh2bs "I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America’s future?")_**

Thank You & God Bless
- Tim Scott

name: New Message from Courier Newsroom
subject: POLL for Peter: Which questions should CNN ask Ron DeSantis?
body:
In just a few hours CNN will be turning over their airwaves to Republican presidential candidate Ron DeSantis for a sit-down interview.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1255%2E120351%2Ezyv29Y)
Peter, in just a few hours CNN will be turning over their airwaves to Republican presidential candidate Ron DeSantis for a sit-down interview.
After their disastrous town hall with Donald Trump, this interview is a prime opportunity for the network to rebuild trust with its viewers by asking hard-hitting questions that hold DeSantis accountable for his extreme policy ideas and actions.
**Before the interview starts, we want to know: what is the top question you want CNN to ask DeSantis?** [**Our team has created a handful of questions for you to choose from, so all you have to do is vote:**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/desantis-cnn-poll/?source=em-20230718&t=2&akid=1255%2E120351%2Ezyv29Y)
**[Take the poll »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/desantis-cnn-poll/?source=em-20230718&t=3&akid=1255%2E120351%2Ezyv29Y)**
We sincerely hope CNN has learned from their experience hosting Donald Trump and will do their journalistic duty by putting the truth ahead of ratings and profits. We’ll be closely watching the interview, ready to call out any bad information that comes from it.
More soon,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=1255_120351_zyv29Y&akid=1255%2E120351%2Ezyv29Y)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1255%2E120351%2Ezyv29Y)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

clean_body: Fellow American, The only way to ensure that the America First agenda is enshrined into the history books is to have a Republican Senate. Republicans MUST take back the Senate in 2024 because I'll need a red Senate to restore the Make America Great Again movement when I'm back in the White House. You might be watching the Left destroy our great country, day after day, and wonder what you can do to stop them right now. Well Fellow American, you can step up now and ensure that Republican Senate candidates take back the Senate in 2024. Making sure that there is a red Senate is the best thing you can do for the America First agenda right now. Imagine the greatness we could achieve if we have a Republican majority in the House and Senate while I’m in the White House. Thank you, Donald J. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66677566/417195169/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230718_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM0NDNlZmEtOTkyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rmyykw9sQqUXHyc4rnevpPyvfFlVz1ip_rtKGie3QAQ=)

I’m never going to be afraid of telling you the hard truth, Peter, and here it is: It’s dangerous to be a woman in politics. A recent study from Princeton University and the Anti-Defamation League found female officials are _3.4 times more likely_ to receive online harassment than their male counterparts. And it’s not just digital threats, either. In the past few years we’ve witnessed a violent intruder show up to Nancy Pelosi’s home with rope, zip ties, and a hammer; a man with a gun stalk Pramila Jayapal outside her house; and a thwarted plot to kidnap Governor Gretchen Whitmer. **Then there’s what happened to me: A coordinated cyber-attack by far-right political operatives and media outlets meant to shame me out of office. ** After the attack on her husband, Nancy Pelosi said she was worried it would discourage other women from running for office. That’s something I worried about, too — and it’s not unfounded. When we say women running for office need extra support, we mean **every** type of support. There are so many invisible challenges and dangers that come with being a woman in politics, and that’s why I started HER Time: To help women overcome them. [_**But I can’t do it alone. So I’m counting on you, Peter, to help me support women running for office with a donation of any amount today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66677567/417195170/-605873117?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230718_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM0NDNlZmEtOTkyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rmyykw9sQqUXHyc4rnevpPyvfFlVz1ip_rtKGie3QAQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66677568/417195171/-605873117?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230718_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM0NDNlZmEtOTkyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rmyykw9sQqUXHyc4rnevpPyvfFlVz1ip_rtKGie3QAQ=)

Friend,
Tonight, I will be going live with Sean Hannity in Iowa for a voter town hall - home of the FIRST CAUCUS of the Republican primary.
Most politicians usually hide from voters...
_... Lucky for you, I'm not a politician - so this might be my favorite part of the job._
Millions of Republican primary voters will be tuning in tonight as I take questions from voters and outline our plans to SAVE AMERICA from the incompetent crook currently occupying the White House.
**But there 's one other group that will be tuning in... _the special interest "Republican" mega-donors (RINOs, as we like to call them) who've pledged to spend over $370 MILLION against us will surely be watching to see just how strong our movement is._**
Tonight is our chance to show that we are TRULY UNBREAKABLE - and that a handful of treacherous RINOs are no match for the greatest political movement in history!
With MILLIONS of eyes on us, _this_ is the moment we PROVE that the RINOs' multimillion-dollar attacks completely BACKFIRED!
**Please make a contribution before we go LIVE so that I can report that our grassroots movement is STRONGER than EVER before.**
_(But, of course, if you can 't donate right now, don't feel pressured to. My goal is to make your life great again. I would never want you to incur a cost that you can't afford. Very soon, I'll be back in the White House, and America will come ROARING BACK!)_

name: Gabrielle Fink
subject: Hi there! 👋

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=322%2E552475%2EejqIyV)
Hi Peter, this will only take a minute.
Our team is busy gearing up for the tough road ahead. Mitch McConnell and the national Republican establishment have their eyes set on flipping this seat, so we need to make sure we have a strong grassroots team by our side every step of the way.
**We’re going to be sending out important information and updates about our race in the weeks and months ahead, and we want to make sure you’re receiving these updates! Will you take a moment to confirm we have your correct contact information on file?**
**NAME:** Peter Willis
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**PHONE:** NOT ON FILE **[Yes, my info is correct!](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/344?refcode=em20230718-1&t=2&akid=322%2E552475%2EejqIyV)** **[No, I need to update my info.](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/confirm-your-information/?source=em20230718-1&t=3&akid=322%2E552475%2EejqIyV)**
---
Thanks for being on our team,
Gabrielle Fink
Digital Director, Bob Casey for Senate
P.S. I wouldn’t be doing my job if I didn’t ask you to chip in at least once -- so once you’ve confirmed your information above, will you take the next step and **[chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help re-elect Bob Casey?](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/344?refcode=em20230718-1&t=4&akid=322%2E552475%2EejqIyV)** Thank you!

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=322%2E552475%2EejqIyV)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=322%2E552475%2EejqIyV)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Team Bennet
subject: CORE Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=x_071823_CoreAct_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=x_071823_CoreAct_act]
Hi there,
The CORE Act is one of Michael’s top priorities — and we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss his email about it.
This legilsation would protect 420,000 acres as Colorado public lands. It’s a bill written by Coloradans, for Coloradans. It’s backed by our ranchers, local leaders, businesses, and conservationists.
In other words, it’s a big win.
We’re grateful Michael is championing common-sense legislation like the CORE Act to protect our public lands for generations to come.
With your grassroots support, we have the resources we need to reelect Michael so he can keep fighting for us in Congress. Since he doesn’t accept corporate PAC donations, your contribution will make a difference. Will you chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=x_071823_CoreAct_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=x_071823_CoreAct_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=x_071823_CoreAct_act]
We’ll keep you posted on any developments.
Thank you!
— Team Bennet
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Michael Bennet <info@michaelbennet.com>
Date: Wed, Jul 12, 2023 at 12:17 PM
Subject: Protecting CO’s public lands
Friend —
This weekend, Susan and I climbed Mt. Flora just outside of Denver. We were treated to vibrant wildflowers, banks of snow, and breathtaking views.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=x_071823_CoreAct_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=x_071823_CoreAct_act]
We are so lucky to live in the most beautiful state in the country. And today, I’m back in Washington DC, fighting to protect public lands in Colorado and nationwide.
I worked hard to make sure Camp Hale National Monument was designated last year. It now protects more than 53,000 acres of land for conservation and outdoor recreation — but our work isn’t done.
In May, I introduced the CORE Act to protect an additional 420,000 acres across Colorado.
Will you join our growing coalition of Coloradans fighting to protect our public lands by becoming a citizen co-sponsor of the CORE Act? Add your name to support this work now >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/mfb-em-210319-core]
Team, Colorado’s public lands are critical to our environment, our economy, and our way of life.
I will never stop fighting to preserve them for future generations.
You can help protect 420,000 acres of Colorado’s public lands by signing on here. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/mfb-em-210319-core]
Thank you for your support.
More to come,
— Michael

Bennet for Colorado
PO Box 3078
Denver, CO 80201
United States

name: Councillor Keith Potts
subject: one of my heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Friend, I'd like to introduce you to one of my biggest heroes, my grandpa.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Beyond watching baseball games and going on fishing trips, my grandpa taught me a lot of lessons that I'll be bringing with me to Washington.
He served as a member of the 82nd Airborne, and stormed the beaches of Normandy on D-Day. While that left no shortage of exciting stories for me to hear as a kid, there was always an underlying message: freedom isn't guaranteed.
But I'm running because Hoosiers deserve a senator who's going to fight for our freedoms, not strip them away from us.
And as I watch the GOP's choice, Jim Banks, lead the fight against Social Security, and then live it up in Mar-a-Lago, I worry about our future generations.
Will they have more or less freedom than when my grandpa fought on D-Day?
Will they have the right to vote? The right to choose? The right to feel safe in our neighborhoods?
That's the fight we've got ahead of us, and believe me, it won't be easy. But with folks like you in our corner, my team and I are confident we can stand up for our freedoms in Washington. Please, Friend, will you donate any amount you can spare? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Thank you,
Keith Potts
Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment.
He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to
Keith Potts for Senate
PO Box 90103
Indianapolis, IN 46260

clean_body: [] Friend, I'd like to introduce you to one of my biggest heroes, my grandpa. [] Beyond watching baseball games and going on fishing trips, my grandpa taught me a lot of lessons that I'll be bringing with me to Washington. He served as a member of the 82nd Airborne, and stormed the beaches of Normandy on D-Day. While that left no shortage of exciting stories for me to hear as a kid, there was always an underlying message: freedom isn't guaranteed. But I'm running because Hoosiers deserve a senator who's going to fight for our freedoms, not strip them away from us. And as I watch the GOP's choice, Jim Banks, lead the fight against Social Security, and then live it up in Mar-a-Lago, I worry about our future generations. Will they have more or less freedom than when my grandpa fought on D-Day? Will they have the right to vote? The right to choose? The right to feel safe in our neighborhoods? That's the fight we've got ahead of us, and believe me, it won't be easy. But with folks like you in our corner, my team and I are confident we can stand up for our freedoms in Washington. Please, Friend, will you donate any amount you can spare? [] DONATE TODAY [] Thank you, Keith Potts Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council. [] Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment. He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to Keith Potts for Senate PO Box 90103 Indianapolis, IN 46260 SUPPORT KEITH [] [] Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate Keith for Senate PO Box 90103 Indianapolis, IN 46260 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

[**Everyone should have access to healthcare. Join Derek Marshall and add your name to the petition demanding Medicare for All!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66678913/417199600/583409292?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDRjYWQ0OS05ZDI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2yjhfDQeN7gMgMsih7BoschqSkfI-mgui10ZrHJlxRg=&emci=d9b87abb-6c1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=104cad49-9d25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
Our for-profit healthcare system is dysfunctional. Millions of Americans don’t have health insurance and millions more have woefully inadequate coverage. Many are forced to decide between taking care of their health or paying their bills.

Compared to other industrialized nations, our current healthcare system is less effective, inefficient, and far more expensive. That's because the “healthcare industry” prioritizes profit over people, and profits are through the roof!

**Greedy insurance companies and drugmakers shouldn’t be getting even richer off of people seeking medical care.

[Medicare for All has been reintroduced, and we need YOU to help us put on the pressure. Sign the petition to urge Congress members to pass Medicare for All!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66678914/417199602/583409292?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDRjYWQ0OS05ZDI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2yjhfDQeN7gMgMsih7BoschqSkfI-mgui10ZrHJlxRg=&emci=d9b87abb-6c1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=104cad49-9d25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

Eighty-five million Americans can’t afford to get health care because costs are too high! Medical bills, even for those with health insurance, are the number one cause of bankruptcy in the United States.

People in the United States spend significantly more on health care, but that isn’t reflected in our health outcomes and infant mortality rates. We lag far behind nations that have universal healthcare for everyone!

**Medicare for All would provide free, comprehensive health care coverage for everyone and prevent pharmaceutical and insurance companies from gouging consumers.

[Health care is a human right. Sign the petition to urge your member of Congress to save lives and pass Medicare for All!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66678919/417199604/583409292?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDRjYWQ0OS05ZDI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2yjhfDQeN7gMgMsih7BoschqSkfI-mgui10ZrHJlxRg=&emci=d9b87abb-6c1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=104cad49-9d25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

Give us true justice in healthcare.
**-** Derek Marshall for Congress

name: Chloe Cole
subject: We're suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.

| |
---
| | Dear Friend, My name is Chloe. You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest. I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. [**Even though we don 't know each other, I'm writing you today hoping you'll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79ef2e342bbd4ee99028515d43583d12&_e=3XaJsUelLTtSJ54MEAexDE518Bh_SivtxZFGZNRVnu11ImbZ2uDweJzOblYndnvKE87xk8BhGdyXSuEtLORLD9Hk9fMV3hzcSXbRGmLA27jl92C916NyTHCawIj4r1N_bYMfRz3OT7rRI72p_ugg51ykCPgLCehEPKyKQN1vMcZtDC-HqjdC32xrLlen3_Ktc7J4XZnZc711XIzVOAS4esh_nFN7bULLalwsZOgQKZaJhx4DBTmDJM5okIaMaDkucvEH_QTuNVywqmK78WhrsjOWuiZ_QV8IKUdio79OA49bDhsTvYpd36omFznSrEqAKS4DbiOdulIpnn01d4Dd-YZ4qNIvlk0iTpJ90wAUf8I%3D) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. **The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" ** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can 't prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79ef2e342bbd4ee99028515d43583d12&_e=3XaJsUelLTtSJ54MEAexDE518Bh_SivtxZFGZNRVnu11ImbZ2uDweJzOblYndnvKE87xk8BhGdyXSuEtLORLD9Hk9fMV3hzcSXbRGmLA27jl92C916NyTHCawIj4r1N_bYMfRz3OT7rRI72p_ugg51ykCPgLCehEPKyKQN1vMcZtDC-HqjdC32xrLlen3_Ktc7J4XZnZc711XIzVOAS4emzyqtRpEVTdvw6rnjyOcJAa4MdwMNTf_U1i5RuW_jRDMKkV33HGPpVFDb_s4DHqOyHnXYh1SoZLgA2ODh-wkUQLrjPuCELG-ZWk6s1gLf_uhJ89nOC5nbLz1-WfNNT0t13_8SCTrXT6n5YzB9-k3tc%3D) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." [**And YOU can help me.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79ef2e342bbd4ee99028515d43583d12&_e=3XaJsUelLTtSJ54MEAexDE518Bh_SivtxZFGZNRVnu11ImbZ2uDweJzOblYndnvKE87xk8BhGdyXSuEtLORLD9Hk9fMV3hzcSXbRGmLA27jl92C916NyTHCawIj4r1N_bYMfRz3OT7rRI72p_ugg51ykCPgLCehEPKyKQN1vMcZtDC-HqjdC32xrLlen3_Ktc7J4XZnZc711XIzVOAS4ekw0f3V97rJLtHACy3E3iX4YfB5miooMG_0UG7V6zqzSe9y4VHtxXuSm9oMr8lbi7H-uAI_sj7lMtvkVnhKdZ7sgWUWIpcvL7YHgSazBf37ug-JjkNkAdqtOlRg-W41vZY7DHda_oTVUxkq4138n7Lc%3D) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day. **There 's even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. ** And it won't stop until someone fights back. When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I'd seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn't know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn't even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face! Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty. And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn't felt in a long time -- hope. Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn't tell me we'd never win against the giant medical industry. She didn't tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch. She told me my fight mattered. Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon's non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I've launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me... ...and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family. As I've mentioned several times -- I'm 18-years-old. On my own, I'd never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That's one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don't have the money to fight them in court. But that's exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn. Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like:
---
| |
* _Brach v. Newsom_ \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools...
* _Ngo v. Roce City Antifa_ \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING...
* _O 'Handley v. Padilla_ \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with...
* And now my case... _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_.

---
The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn't mean they have the big money that their opponents have. [**That 's why I hope you'll consider helping us by rushing back a small tax-deductible donation of $25 or more. **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79ef2e342bbd4ee99028515d43583d12&_e=3XaJsUelLTtSJ54MEAexDE518Bh_SivtxZFGZNRVnu11ImbZ2uDweJzOblYndnvKE87xk8BhGdyXSuEtLORLD9Hk9fMV3hzcSXbRGmLA27jl92C916NyTHCawIj4r1N_bYMfRz3OT7rRI72p_ugg51ykCPgLCehEPKyKQN1vMcZtDC-HqjdC32xrLlen3_Ktc7J4XZnZc711XIzVOAS4eixTejSeIOTly-MN1nFGg_IxwWuAa2gOsG2fO9y6C9YDh8ALjlzSqGcmnedxQSXu2TZNAWiX1AWkDDSDYR0TUk76kX9Fhnh8CSz2TTDfD18X0dVgjZ9O93_cTjphTClu2Vo6KVORWzNrV9CfLdoxBGM%3D) There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt. Alone we're no match for them. clean_body: You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. | | | | Dear Friend, My name is Chloe. You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest. I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." More and more children are mutilated and abused every day. There 's even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. And it won't stop until someone fights back. When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I'd seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn't know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn't even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face! Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty. And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn't felt in a long time -- hope. Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn't tell me we'd never win against the giant medical industry. She didn't tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch. She told me my fight mattered. Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon's non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I've launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me... ...and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family. As I've mentioned several times -- I'm 18-years-old. On my own, I'd never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That's one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don't have the money to fight them in court. But that's exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn. Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like: | | Brach v. Newsom \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools... Ngo v. Roce City Antifa \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING... O 'Handley v. Padilla \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... And now my case... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn't mean they have the big money that their opponents have. There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt. Alone we're no match for them. , we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I've been called a "liar." I've even been told de-transitioners like me don't exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say: " You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist." Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters. | | Thank you, Chloe Cole | | | | P.S. This is a photo of me now. It's been a long, painful road but I'm finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. Thank you so much for your help. -Chloe | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: Greta Kemp Martin
subject: Voting rights are being crushed. So I’m suing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
What AG Fitch is doing is cruel and against the spirit of American democracy

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66680165/417203913/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230718BH_B_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWYzOTViYTAtYTAyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-jM-bW_XPGTQd0vAeSicH6pepssMeCYeOZRpBEiADak=) Peter, I hope you’ve heard by now that as the litigator for Disability Rights of Mississippi, I’m suing our current Attorney General for her efforts to disenfranchise voters – especially sick, elderly, and disabled voters.

Ensuring inclusive and accessible voting is the cornerstone of a thriving democracy, Peter. It’s a no-brainer – Mississippi’s leaders should prioritize enabling universal access to the ballot box and fostering a culture of community-driven voter empowerment. Instead, AG Fitch and her allies are focusing on impeding individuals from receiving assistance with ballot delivery and unjustly criminalizing the compassionate volunteers who extend a helping hand to their fellow citizens.

**Peter, what AG Fitch is doing is cruel and against the spirit of American democracy.**

I’m running for Attorney General because Mississippi deserves better than AG Fitch and her attempts to weaken our democracy. But I need a strong team standing with me.

[Can I count on you to stand with me in this fight by contributing $25, $50, or whatever you’re able to give so I can protect voting rights statewide as Mississippi Attorney General?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66680167/417203914/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230718BH_B_l1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWYzOTViYTAtYTAyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-jM-bW_XPGTQd0vAeSicH6pepssMeCYeOZRpBEiADak=)

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: The life I live is not my own
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
Unlike many, I got a second chance at life. I'm not going to waste it.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21ff45db2e034b4894850e4af7a22211&_e=yvvPU-lNebZ0epi0UIJPYFgE-XzPgtNRPBrVoro19td8SvVJve6JrQvH1BeiEuCvIyIlGDLZGFgbncU82PjpFjRRCOCyBZgyCu2TZNuPPmGbk7eHbqMecl1mXjbWLkjOBCJP5ZL9v36Q-7GIe9mhddUOfBgkdHnYlRiP059JXZ9R2pwsHPKt1dywiWcnI2smgqZ1lqSrMP3gxfMxD5MoviVvd9c_Nc0oZQ4QWU5unj_Va8w6fYhFpcFa7QuQVGXCVGEljYF-Q-eATt3pM5uKF1zbuxirA1NaHHPiYnOp6wfWZ_PrxvV5OUKctn1lpBkaU8HqBr3ZuZAXvAsG5JNhzmOUgnPBfrQgEKzK60k142Ilv7uqRrNJ0S0S-77enqEFd3MgYqyWCS9QcrLTFuHEsEvIwthCTgaogHl6REhWTYoKkg9yLO2_7FZ4tJQMXgB8)

| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I'm a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of last week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21ff45db2e034b4894850e4af7a22211&_e=yvvPU-lNebZ0epi0UIJPYFgE-XzPgtNRPBrVoro19td8SvVJve6JrQvH1BeiEuCvIyIlGDLZGFgbncU82PjpFjRRCOCyBZgyCu2TZNuPPmGbk7eHbqMecl1mXjbWLkjOBCJP5ZL9v36Q-7GIe9mhddUOfBgkdHnYlRiP059JXZ9R2pwsHPKt1dywiWcnI2smgqZ1lqSrMP3gxfMxD5MoviVvd9c_Nc0oZQ4QWU5unj_Va8w6fYhFpcFa7QuQVGXCVGEljYF-Q-eATt3pM5uKF1zbuxirA1NaHHPiYnOp6wdLATBUeTn-eOEd9pdJcSy4lmHO-5AECRtTrhzm67uqjKb_R-FEPL0g1Tjam8dqeO5ITyYAmROuPEGhHSTJDBgkyE4RDiQJQZhtqlU2IsperDJSUnwBPJIr9RnuP840qyFiMNxrbrnZYh-t5ZxLUj_a) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21ff45db2e034b4894850e4af7a22211&_e=yvvPU-lNebZ0epi0UIJPYFgE-XzPgtNRPBrVoro19td8SvVJve6JrQvH1BeiEuCvIyIlGDLZGFgbncU82PjpFjRRCOCyBZgyCu2TZNuPPmGbk7eHbqMecl1mXjbWLkjOBCJP5ZL9v36Q-7GIe9mhddUOfBgkdHnYlRiP059JXZ9R2pwsHPKt1dywiWcnI2smgqZ1lqSrMP3gxfMxD5MoviVvd9c_Nc0oZQ4QWU5unj_Va8w6fYhFpcFa7QuQVGXCVGEljYF-Q-eATt3pM5uKF1zbuxirA1NaHHPiYnOp6wdYwi2cIYdn7zv6lcQ9DtuRdPzUkrZ69uxf3nFW6GuVjM3_nwVtoZ_Gbfc1sE92kPAZQ8bsdstwXg1ZHWDzdRULRWo2l3lgsMSJowDZIpJp_s7jOsPXp2JezTj_uxUqw-Tlmi2PlGwUE2xLOx-d1C3_)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21ff45db2e034b4894850e4af7a22211&_e=yvvPU-lNebZ0epi0UIJPYFgE-XzPgtNRPBrVoro19td8SvVJve6JrQvH1BeiEuCvIyIlGDLZGFgbncU82PjpFjRRCOCyBZgyCu2TZNuPPmGbk7eHbqMecl1mXjbWLkjOBCJP5ZL9v36Q-7GIe9mhddUOfBgkdHnYlRiP059JXZ9R2pwsHPKt1dywiWcnI2smgqZ1lqSrMP3gxfMxD5MoviVvd9c_Nc0oZQ4QWU5unj_Va8w6fYhFpcFa7QuQVGXCVGEljYF-Q-eATt3pM5uKF1zbuxirA1NaHHPiYnOp6wdAKQ1GHRZC6w--6yPrt3QTXQ-kEuaHuwRKRCd8jRY3H_sqwvGnob_dwySSSRV9U4k5wvn9uCZWm28Kh--q6WfbeB407Dn7IorLQm8_kfgo36l2udY87FWa8ayIIR8rAQKFkUd_lAyo0wSLG0PJBe2_)
---
My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking "How long will it be before I burn to death?" But despite our enemy's best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn 't be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I've ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That's why every day since I nearly lost my life, I've dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I 'm telling you all this because I'm hoping that I can count on your financial support**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21ff45db2e034b4894850e4af7a22211&_e=yvvPU-lNebZ0epi0UIJPYFgE-XzPgtNRPBrVoro19td8SvVJve6JrQvH1BeiEuCvIyIlGDLZGFgbncU82PjpFjRRCOCyBZgyCu2TZNuPPmGbk7eHbqMecl1mXjbWLkjOBCJP5ZL9v36Q-7GIe9mhddUOfBgkdHnYlRiP059JXZ9R2pwsHPKt1dywiWcnI2smgqZ1lqSrMP3gxfMxD5MoviVvd9c_Nc0oZQ4QWU5unj_Va8w6fYhFpcFa7QuQVGXCVGEljYF-Q-eATt3pM5uKF1zbuxirA1NaHHPiYnOp6wcwmXlAarnusBqNEqrcLDHaMt32Q8Bn9HKesEgQOwVMXXiYuKEWSq_TwxT3atFTV22MpAy4cREMLpJLMA1XCP_WTj18KJG_eRSPb2ABtXS-WmHY5aEay20i6t4N72TbiJrFtktt3xWe6WTlXB6r0Yjo) -- but I don't want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**

clean_body: Unlike many, I got a second chance at life. I'm not going to waste it. | | | | | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I'm a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of last week, My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking "How long will it be before I burn to death?" But despite our enemy's best efforts,I survived. By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. I truly shouldn 't be alive today. For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I've ever learned: Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable. That's why every day since I nearly lost my life, I've dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. -- but I don't want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there's NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that's worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve -- even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. Duty First, Captain Sam Brown | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Mariannette Miller-Meeks has proven herself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
We cannot afford to lose such a dedicated advocate in the halls of Congress

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=c11d96fcbb814ccc8ecf5198b089b2fd&_e=8fRo_VzqqwnNChIbG4FxoCFBPk2LFwqVXBg8t7hSfpc3tqV26Qz0kU49iJKhT_2u5Fua0c8LMTFhG0pyk4b1qpO7MMzNHN9ETKHsR2H-nXtWaOre08nWcKP3X-F0nyiWL49kXAkJTnG6lCMrxihNfC1R3EZEqp8UxovQgsCJR4A4Zqn5NExxsgZ02ZnEVuVMdcOSindGxZzUlOhtw9HjuvNz1_K9SHd6KzaD6etbXI-XOJfmYx_qg5aItg0HYZW2pS01DovqVQtSvcupFdMf4aIz64JH3AJ9hBKnVA7OwAM%3D)

Dear Friend,

It is my pleasure to bring your attention to an exceptional conservative candidate, Mariannette Miller-Meeks, who is seeking re-election to represent Iowa's first district in the House of Representatives.

[**Mariannette is a fighter. When Nancy Pelosi tried to steal her election in 2020, she fought back and won. Now, she needs YOU on her team. She is running for re-election in 2024, and she needs ALL of her supporters on board.**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=c11d96fcbb814ccc8ecf5198b089b2fd&_e=8fRo_VzqqwnNChIbG4FxoCFBPk2LFwqVXBg8t7hSfpc3tqV26Qz0kU49iJKhT_2u5Fua0c8LMTFhG0pyk4b1qpO7MMzNHN9ETKHsR2H-nXtWaOre08nWcKP3X-F0nyiW6UfYy1eSsbZZnAEIFzyy8WvZPRPstEqEkVfT9-TJOrt05kA75T4JdMp1NZdph-5CGl3dtSsngAgHqMJwlDOOLXhaXJ99fK18QKcRYeTAennupFFawI0QALpGZeFWN41EVWPb7UY42vkuUj1RTB9VhFu-odeN3_0CVX1SFeXjx46UnUFk_zvnML9s7jJ09p6O)

| [**SUPPORT REP. ---

[**I urge you to join me in supporting Mariannette Miller-Meeks' re-election campaign. Together, we can keep the House in Republican hands and work towards a brighter future for the district and our nation.**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=c11d96fcbb814ccc8ecf5198b089b2fd&_e=8fRo_VzqqwnNChIbG4FxoCFBPk2LFwqVXBg8t7hSfpc3tqV26Qz0kU49iJKhT_2u5Fua0c8LMTFhG0pyk4b1qpO7MMzNHN9ETKHsR2H-nXtWaOre08nWcKP3X-F0nyiW6UfYy1eSsbZZnAEIFzyy8WvZPRPstEqEkVfT9-TJOrszOPu-HG1SHnZoPTacgBK38oskie3N6YD2sEGlOUmmT1QKqHqV1EcmKEQRB9avtx2v18gOsYP_3RlYgJ1jvCPig_NqLpv7yhce19w2V4sVAZR9ioM_0vRuzikLZOH--EjrTqps2ComxHA72FHz6oMt)

Vivek Ramaswamy

body:

---
**"I hope you’ll join me in reminding anyone who will listen... that the free, robust exchange of ideas has always been at the heart of American democracy."
\- President Obama**

[**Please speak out _today_ and sign the card thanking incredible librarians facing _outrageous_ GOP attacks >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/15050?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230718-SignTheCard-ObamaThankLibrariansSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230718-SignTheCard-ObamaThankLibrariansSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=11409%2E9716520%2Ew_OgDd)
**[SIGN THE CARD](https://go.dscc.org/go/15050?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230718-SignTheCard-ObamaThankLibrariansSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230718-SignTheCard-ObamaThankLibrariansSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=11409%2E9716520%2Ew_OgDd)**
---

Team -- Across the country, **our local librarians have come under attack** from _ultra-conservative_ Republicans who will stop at NOTHING to ban books and push their outrageous far-right agenda.

President Obama sounded the alarm and asked supporters across the country to take a stand -- but **you still haven’t signed the card thanking librarians, and we only have until MIDNIGHT!**

**So please, before the deadline:** [**Sign the card to stand against GOP attacks and thank our local librarian heroes!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/15050?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230718-SignTheCard-ObamaThankLibrariansSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230718-SignTheCard-ObamaThankLibrariansSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=11409%2E9716520%2Ew_OgDd)

Team DSCC

name: =?utf-8?Q?Warrior=20Mom?=
subject: Warrior Mom News
body:
Noah turned 18, community events, and more... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cd7015a9a80c/warrior-mom-news?e=3a42edfdc4)
---
|
---
[](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=66eedec229&e=3a42edfdc4)
|
---
# Reflections: Noah Turned 18
My son Noah is the inspiration for my book Warrior Mom. Over the weekend, Noah turned 18! What a journey we have been on together. I am so very proud of the young man he has become. There are so many beautiful memories and I am truly thankful to God for each and every one of them... **Happy 18th birthday Noah! I love you so very much!**
_Enjoy his special birthday reel on_[ _Instagram_](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=243f2b8917&e=3a42edfdc4) _,_[_Facebook_](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=135a63a071&e=3a42edfdc4) _or_[ _Twitter_](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=17ed009112&e=3a42edfdc4) _._
|
---
# The Healthy Home Event
Register to attend The Healthy Home Event on August 3, 2023 at the Roxbury Community Center in Beverly Hills, from 6pm-9pm. Tracy will speak about how to detox and heal your home safely. Sign up [here](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=c1b7f0ff64&e=3a42edfdc4)!There will be local vendors in attendance to promote their related services. _If you would like to table at the event, send an email to ca.team@childrenshealthdefense.org._
[](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=78168390e0&e=3a42edfdc4)
| [REGISTER](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=2b8361fc55&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
|
---
# AUTISM HEALTH SUMMIT
The first annual Autism Health Summit will be February 2-3, 2024. Registration is open! I hope you will join me there. Register [here](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=8f18898712&e=3a42edfdc4). Learn more about the event and subscribe to the AHS newsletter for updates and related news at this [link](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=09302591d1&e=3a42edfdc4).
| [Register to Attend](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=a7baf39d62&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
Interested in sponsoring this event or in being a vendor? Check out the packages [here](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=0918a15c90&e=3a42edfdc4).
| [Sponsors & Vendors](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=91df912253&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
|
---
# Give the gift of Warrior Mom!
Warrior Mom: A Mother’s Journey in Healing Her Son with Autismmakes a great gift for all, and a relaxing summer read. [Purchase](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=2a96109a1e&e=3a42edfdc4) your copy today!
[](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=e0b8495a91&e=3a42edfdc4)
| [PURCHASE](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=13610e22bd&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
|
---
# Follow Warrior Mom on Social Media
Get more related content at the Warrior Mom social media accounts. Follow today!

Friend, The working class in America has lost 25 percent of wealth since 1980. Is it any wonder that so many people are angry and disillusioned, that they feel as though life was better for past generations? I’ve visited the Rust Belt numerous times over the years. Whether it was in Lordstown, Ohio, or Johnstown, Pennsylvania, I heard the same thing from workers: Plants shutting down. Thousands of jobs lost. Communities devastated. And our government sat by and let it happen. [**WATCH: Renewing the American Dream**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66680685/417205777/1032142184?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjRkMzQxZmMtYTIyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=z-YxA5T8fCklP-91GR-2Q78ez9Mrf8GCt8nDp5ew4yU=)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

And while he’s retired his uniform after 25 years of service, his fight for America is far from over.

Now, it’s time to fight back, and that starts with grassroots patriots like YOU.

clean_body: | | | | | Hi Friend,Today, we are exactly 49 days away from election day (though, don’t forget that early voting starts on August 16th!). As election day gets closer, we are going to need more and more of our supporters getting involved with #TeamGabe so that we are able to talk to as many voters as possible throughout the First District. So, I’m asking you today: | | Can you today and commit to knocking on doors with #TeamGabe? 🚪 Can you today and commit to making phone calls with #TeamGabe? 📱Can you today and commit to hosting a meet-and-greet for #TeamGabe in the First Congressional District? 👥 | | Gabe is only here today because of so many who helped him along the way. Help us get over the finish line by getting involved. If you are not able to, we hope you’ll consider chipping-in now to help us power our campaign to victory. | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | In gratitude, #TeamGabe | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | Gabe Amo for Congress P.O. Box 40457 Providence, RI 02940 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

This battle is personal to me, Casey, and millions of Americans. | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

As parents of three children under the age of six, protecting parents, children, and families is not something we are willing to compromise on. This battle is personal to me, Casey, and millions of Americans. By coming together, this movement will make a difference for the future of American children, and I am so excited to prove to Joe Biden that parents across the nation are not willing to stand idly by while he attempts to strip them of their innocence by the first grade. | | | MAMAS FOR DESANTIS During the forced lockdowns of the COVID pandemic, the ruling class: Forced masks and untested mRNA vaccinations on young kids Denied families the ability to visit loved ones in the hospital Shut down churches Destroyed communities Locked children out of their classrooms This same ruling class is now: Defending sexualized content in schools Encouraging children to change genders behind their parents' backs National Democrat leaders have adopted the notion that children belong to the government. Enough is enough. Mamas for DeSantis is a nationwide movement to fight back and ensure that I am elected president to do for America what I did for Florida: STOP the agenda of the ruling elite from harming children. | Together, Mamas for DeSantis will make a difference in the upcoming election, the lives of children across the nation, and the future of ALL Americans. Join me today in putting a permanent end to the Left 's madness: "" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Casey and I need your help in reaching as many mamas as possible across our country. In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Gordon Center
subject: Planning our budget
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
We’re halfway through the year, and you know what that means—2024 will be here before we know it!
I want to thank everyone who has already responded to our requests for campaign support. It is important because we need to be prepared to run a strong campaign—and support other important races on the ballot across Texas and the country.
One way you can help is by making a monthly contribution. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230718?refcode=folf230718&recurring=1]
I’ve seen firsthand how much it matters who we elect. From lowering the cost of prescription drugs by allowing Medicare to negotiate drug prices to working to keep our communities safe from gun violence, Lizzie has remained focused on the issues that matter, and on making good on the promises she made during her first campaign back in 2018. (And there’s so much more she’s working to get done for Texans and people across the country!)
Once again, we are approaching elections that will define the future of our country. The 2024 elections will set the course for our community and our country. And that’s why I take seriously my job to ensure we have the financial resources to run a strong campaign.
Monthly contributions are important to the work #TeamLizzie is doing. We can count on that money coming in every month and plan our budget around it. $5 or $10 a month—or any amount—really adds up, and it makes a meaningful difference for our efforts. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230718?refcode=folf230718&recurring=1]
Thank you for your support!
Gordon Center
Campaign Treasurer
P.S. If you can’t make a monthly contribution today, I understand. Contributions of all sizes support our campaign and are much appreciated. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230718?refcode=folf230718]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230718?refcode=folf230718]

Friend,
Tonight, I will be going live with Sean Hannity in Iowa for a voter town hall - home of the FIRST CAUCUS of the Republican primary.
Most politicians usually hide from voters...
_... Lucky for you, I'm not a politician - so this might be my favorite part of the job._
Millions of Republican primary voters will be tuning in tonight as I take questions from voters and outline our plans to SAVE AMERICA from the incompetent crook currently occupying the White House.
**But there 's one other group that will be tuning in... _the special interest "Republican" mega-donors (RINOs, as we like to call them) who've pledged to spend over $370 MILLION against us will surely be watching to see just how strong our movement is._**
Tonight is our chance to show that we are TRULY UNBREAKABLE - and that a handful of treacherous RINOs are no match for the greatest political movement in history!
With MILLIONS of eyes on us, _this_ is the moment we PROVE that the RINOs' multimillion-dollar attacks completely BACKFIRED!
**Please make a contribution before we go LIVE so that I can report that our grassroots movement is STRONGER than EVER before.**
_(But, of course, if you can 't donate right now, don't feel pressured to. My goal is to make your life great again. I would never want you to incur a cost that you can't afford. Very soon, I'll be back in the White House, and America will come ROARING BACK!)_

Millions of Republican primary voters will be tuning in tonight as I take questions from voters and outline our plans to SAVE AMERICA from the incompetent crook currently occupying the White House. But there 's one other group that will be tuning in... the special interest "Republican" mega-donors (RINOs, as we like to call them) who've pledged to spend over $370 MILLION against us will surely be watching to see just how strong our movement is. Tonight is our chance to show that we are TRULY UNBREAKABLE - and that a handful of treacherous RINOs are no match for the greatest political movement in history! With MILLIONS of eyes on us, this is the moment we PROVE that the RINOs' multimillion-dollar attacks completely BACKFIRED! Please make a contribution before we go LIVE so that I can report that our grassroots movement is STRONGER than EVER before. (But, of course, if you can 't donate right now, don't feel pressured to. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66682712/417212822/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFiZmMyNC1hNjI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mC9cNCwdWIZGMpCXGoNPymb0fZTgpgeWRLQ8w0IWiCw=)
Peter,

House Republicans – including my opponent Rep. Mike Garcia – have made no secret what their priorities are. To name a few: restricting reproductive rights, shilling for the fossil fuel industry, and working to gut life-saving programs like Medicare and Social Security.

**In contrast, I’m running to represent California's 27th District so I can help protect reproductive freedom, end the megafire crisis, and safeguard entitlement programs for our seniors.**

But here’s the thing, Peter: One of the goals of my campaign is to listen to supporters from all walks of life to better understand the issues impacting our daily lives so I can address those challenges in Washington. That means I need to hear from you directly:

[**To make sure your voice is heard, we’ve put together a short survey for you to tell us what issues are on your mind – and where I should fight back the hardest against the GOP if I’m elected. To name a few: restricting reproductive rights, shilling for the fossil fuel industry, and working to gut life-saving programs like Medicare and Social Security. In contrast, I’m running to represent California's 27th District so I can help protect reproductive freedom, end the megafire crisis, and safeguard entitlement programs for our seniors. But here’s the thing, Peter: One of the goals of my campaign is to listen to supporters from all walks of life to better understand the issues impacting our daily lives so I can address those challenges in Washington. That means I need to hear from you directly: | ** Thanks in advance for your time and support, George =** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States
