The future is here. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66682725/417212865/-417003563?&refcode=E3350-20230718-AIin2024-Header-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhNjBmNDJhLWE2MjUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9msfHEG0X4Kb0IFxW36KK13f7p_GG9IrUVbXODHbwAE=) Peter, Artificial intelligence (AI) is here and it could have tremendous implications on the 2024 election. There are many ways AI has the potential to change politics. Take this email, for instance. No, this wasn’t written by AI - but some campaigns have already started using artificial intelligence to write their emails. (We just don’t think they can get as creative as us!) AI is already having a major impact. The Ron DeSantis campaign recently shared an AI-generated image of Donald Trump hugging disease expert Anthony Fauci. And this technology could unleash armies of bots trained to speak like humans - much like the Russian “troll farms” that spread lies during the 2016 election. **All this to say, Democrats have to understand the risks and opportunities that come with AI if we want to win the 2024 election and protect our democracy.** Thankfully, our Future Forum members get this stuff - that’s why we’re leading the fight to increase transparency, ethics and set rules for artificial intelligence. It’s our job to make sure our members are prepared to win this fight! body:

| Peter,

Now that the Supreme Court has overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and Republican legislatures across the country have passed abortion bans, it’s never been more important to elect pro-choice candidates.

One of my Republican challengers, Kevin Dellicker, supports a nationwide abortion ban and will fight for one if elected to Congress.

**He is too extreme for Pennsylvania and too dangerous for Congress.[_Will you chip in to my re-election campaign to ensure a pro-choice majority in 2024?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66682889/417213811/-1105104057?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230718-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGFmNGE2MC1hNjI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Isiav7OhIu2QxWNBmUX2KvUTgCuIAE_16FisWjTZeDY=)**

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: What would it take?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friends, [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
What would it take for you to make a donation to our campaign to defend Pennsylvania’s Senate seat?
What if we told you that Mitch McConnell is saying PA is one of his top targets?
What if we shared that Bob’s record of standing up to corporate special interests in the Senate means they will spend millions on ads attacking us?
Or what if we told you that our Democratic Senate majority is only 51 seats, meaning that if we lose in Pennsylvania, our Senate majority would be in serious jeopardy?
Please, with our July fundraising deadline approaching fast, will you split a donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and Bob Casey to ensure we have what it takes to win? [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_bobcasey?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
There’s more. Would you show your support today if we told you that Bob’s work in Washington isn’t done yet?
Would you pitch in if you knew your donation would help Bob continue to cut through the gridlock in DC and make the lives of hardworking Pennsylvania families easier?
And would you donate knowing that if we lose, Republicans could use their Senate majority to cut programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, and undermine voting rights?
These are the stakes in our race, so we’ll ask just one more time: Will you split a donation right now to help us get over the top of our July fundraising goal? [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_bobcasey?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Bob Casey and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_bobcasey?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_bobcasey?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_bobcasey?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_bobcasey?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Thank you,

clean_body: [] Friends, [] What would it take for you to make a donation to our campaign to defend Pennsylvania’s Senate seat? What if we told you that Mitch McConnell is saying PA is one of his top targets? What if we shared that Bob’s record of standing up to corporate special interests in the Senate means they will spend millions on ads attacking us? Or what if we told you that our Democratic Senate majority is only 51 seats, meaning that if we lose in Pennsylvania, our Senate majority would be in serious jeopardy? Please, with our July fundraising deadline approaching fast, will you split a donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and Bob Casey to ensure we have what it takes to win? [] There’s more. Would you show your support today if we told you that Bob’s work in Washington isn’t done yet? Would you pitch in if you knew your donation would help Bob continue to cut through the gridlock in DC and make the lives of hardworking Pennsylvania families easier? And would you donate knowing that if we lose, Republicans could use their Senate majority to cut programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, and undermine voting rights? These are the stakes in our race, so we’ll ask just one more time: Will you split a donation right now to help us get over the top of our July fundraising goal? [] If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Bob Casey and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you, Bob Casey for Senate [] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. []

body:
I was only able to win last year because of the strong grassroots team supporting me, and I know that 2024 will be no different.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66683348/417215783/1502244568?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.18_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzk0YTI2NC1hNzI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MvfLRWMqtsm6w3cuTaUUJHtd7SKLt0uf5yJAFYtvnVg=) Hi Derek,

I’m proud to be running a grassroots campaign that puts **people over politics, working folks over corporate CEOs, and western Pennsylvania over outside interest groups.**

I was only able to win last year because of the strong grassroots team supporting me, and I know that 2024 will be no different. **If we want to send a message to the radical right targeting me that PA-17 isn’t up for grabs, then we have to work together every step of the way.[That’s why today I’m asking for just $1.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66683349/417215784/1502244568?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.18_b1_cd_all&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzk0YTI2NC1hNzI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MvfLRWMqtsm6w3cuTaUUJHtd7SKLt0uf5yJAFYtvnVg=)** | **[$1>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66683350/417215785/1502244568?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.18_b1_cd_all&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzk0YTI2NC1hNzI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MvfLRWMqtsm6w3cuTaUUJHtd7SKLt0uf5yJAFYtvnVg=)**
---
I know that on the surface $1 doesn’t seem like a lot. _But our power doesn’t come from just a dollar, Derek._ **It comes from western Pennsylvanians working together to fight for our common good.**

[**If everyone that reads this email chips in $1 today, you’ll give my campaign the momentum we need to finish July strong and you’ll help send a message that our people-powered team is here to win. So I’m asking, Derek: Can you donate just $1 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66683351/417215786/1502244568?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.18_b1_cd_all&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzk0YTI2NC1hNzI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MvfLRWMqtsm6w3cuTaUUJHtd7SKLt0uf5yJAFYtvnVg=)

Chris

name: Right Wing Watch (via the NDRC)
subject: More than 600 anti-LGBTQ bills
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
How did we get here?
|
---

Team –

Last year, public support for marriage equality reached a record high. For the first time, 71% of Americans – including a majority of Republicans – indicated their support for equal marriage rights. It was a sign that we were making important progress toward LGBTQ inclusion.

This year, we hit another record – but this one wasn’t cause for celebration. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66683571/417216275/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230718_FR_7O_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0OWQ3MmMyLWE3MjUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5W9HH9uJ6uLiYByzT8pQAqHfGG9IF85TH1u-eka1Z2g=)
---
**If you’re wondering how we got here, we have an answer:_Gerrymandering._

[_Help end GOP gerrymandering: Donate to the NDRC >>_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66683572/417216276/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230718_FR_7O_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0OWQ3MmMyLWE3MjUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5W9HH9uJ6uLiYByzT8pQAqHfGG9IF85TH1u-eka1Z2g=)**
Republicans know that their extreme anti-LGBTQ, anti-choice agenda is unpopular with voters. But gerrymandering allows Republicans to ignore what voters want and pass their far-right agenda instead. **That’s because by manipulating maps, GOP politicians can virtually guarantee that they’ll win a majority of power, even if they only earn a minority of votes.**
**If you’re wondering how you can help end this wave of GOP extremism, we have another answer:_By supporting the NDRC._

[_Help stop GOP extremism: Donate to the NDRC >>_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66683573/417216277/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230718_FR_7O_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0OWQ3MmMyLWE3MjUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5W9HH9uJ6uLiYByzT8pQAqHfGG9IF85TH1u-eka1Z2g=)**
Attorney General Eric Holder said, **“Wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win . . . Unlike Republicans, Democrats don’t need to gerrymander to win.”** That’s why the NDRC has been fighting to secure fair maps since 2017 – and our work is still going.
**According to _FiveThirtyEight_ , battles happening over redistricting right now “could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House” in 2024. The GOP is desperate to protect their manipulated maps so they can implement even more of their extreme agenda – _that means we must stay engaged._

[_The NDRC is working around the clock and across the country to stop the GOP from distorting our democracy. Will you donate today to help us keep going?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66683574/417216278/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230718_FR_7O_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0OWQ3MmMyLWE3MjUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5W9HH9uJ6uLiYByzT8pQAqHfGG9IF85TH1u-eka1Z2g=)**

clean_body: How did we get here? | Team – Last year, public support for marriage equality reached a record high. For the first time, 71% of Americans – including a majority of Republicans – indicated their support for equal marriage rights. It was a sign that we were making important progress toward LGBTQ inclusion. This year, we hit another record – but this one wasn’t cause for celebration. | = If you’re wondering how we got here, we have an answer:Gerrymandering. = Republicans know that their extreme anti-LGBTQ, anti-choice agenda is unpopular with voters. But gerrymandering allows Republicans to ignore what voters want and pass their far-right agenda instead. That’s because by manipulating maps, GOP politicians can virtually guarantee that they’ll win a majority of power, even if they only earn a minority of votes. If you’re wondering how you can help end this wave of GOP extremism, we have another answer:By supporting the NDRC. = Attorney General Eric Holder said, “Wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win . . . Unlike Republicans, Democrats don’t need to gerrymander to win.” That’s why the NDRC has been fighting to secure fair maps since 2017 – and our work is still going. According to FiveThirtyEight , battles happening over redistricting right now “could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House” in 2024. The GOP is desperate to protect their manipulated maps so they can implement even more of their extreme agenda – that means we must stay engaged. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: you need to know the context behind this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
Can I get your eyes on this, friend?

Hey Team, I’m sure that your inbox is full of emails from campaigns asking for your support. (Mine is too!) And candidly, yes, this is also one of those emails. Believe it or not, if we’re going to keep this seat blue and have a shot at retaking our House majority next year, it’s really important that we plan ahead and hit our early fundraising targets. If you already know you’re with us, I’d love to have your support. **[(Here is a link to donate!)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66684115/417216673/1017531204?refcode=email_071823_context&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OThmNDA3OC1hODI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r7Nj08OWo0RqVP8owQ_0OtCqvX5R25pQVeCRZ-5_jMo=)** | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66684116/417216674/1017531204?refcode=email_071823_context&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OThmNDA3OC1hODI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r7Nj08OWo0RqVP8owQ_0OtCqvX5R25pQVeCRZ-5_jMo=)
---
**But if you need more of an explanation, here is important context for why I need to ask for your help:**
* Multiple right-wing super PACs attacked me in the home stretch of the last election, and fighting back took almost everything we had.
* We need to be prepared to face even fiercer attacks in the next election, and we are starting nearly from scratch.
* When I was elected, I promised I’d fight for the regular families whose needs so often go overlooked in Washington. Every day, I’m working to do exactly that.
* Since taking over the majority, House Republicans have proposed plans to restrict abortion rights, hammer working families with a 30% national sales tax, gut Social Security, hike the cost of insulin, and raise health insurance premiums.
* I’m fighting back against that backwards agenda with everything I’ve got, and I’m doing everything I can to make progress on the issues we care about. But I can’t do it without a strong grassroots team behind me.

**Team, if we’re going to keep up the fight, protect this seat, and regain Democratic control of Congress in the next election, I need your help. We can’t be complacent or let Republicans catch us flatfooted — the stakes are far too high for that.**
[**Knowing all of that context, can I count on you to pitch in any amount to our campaign today? Even a $5 contribution would go a long way toward helping us reach our shared goals.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66684117/417216675/1017531204?refcode=email_071823_context&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OThmNDA3OC1hODI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r7Nj08OWo0RqVP8owQ_0OtCqvX5R25pQVeCRZ-5_jMo=)

Brittany

**FIRST:** A six-week abortion ban was passed in Ohio and is currently tied up in the courts.

**THEN:** Pro-choice advocates gathered nearly DOUBLE the number of signatures they needed to put abortion access directly on the ballot, which, if passed, would strike down the ban. (And we know that when abortion is on the ballot, **abortion wins.**)

**BUT NOW:** Republicans are trying to cheat and _change the law_ during a special election they called for Aug. 8 so that the abortion amendment would FAIL.

**So EMILYs List needs your help to send a clear message to Ohio Republicans: We WON'T back down. Please, tell us where you stand:** ****Do you support protecting reproductive rights?**** **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66686248/417218380/1747070410?sourceid=1051477&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTg1NDRhMy1hYTI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WQRMajXzAyLjamPwxqqWUfG0Q0DyzZVGrauYmJmp9bo=&emci=54ac759c-aa25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=f58544a3-aa25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **| [**NO**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66686249/417218381/1747070410?sourceid=1051477&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTg1NDRhMy1hYTI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WQRMajXzAyLjamPwxqqWUfG0Q0DyzZVGrauYmJmp9bo=&emci=54ac759c-aa25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=f58544a3-aa25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66686250/417218382/1747070410?sourceid=1051477&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTg1NDRhMy1hYTI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WQRMajXzAyLjamPwxqqWUfG0Q0DyzZVGrauYmJmp9bo=&emci=54ac759c-aa25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=f58544a3-aa25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Ohio Republicans know that when voters are asked for their stance on abortion directly, our pro-choice movement wins every single time.

**Last election cycle, voters across the country supported abortion rights in all six states where it was on the ballot, including in traditionally red states like Kentucky and Montana.**

name: Sherrod Brown HQ
subject: BREAKING: New GOP opponent enters neck-and-neck race in Ohio!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
The stakes just went up.

| **BREAKING: NEW GOP OPPONENT ENTERS OHIO SENATE RACE AGAINST SHERROD BROWN**
Sherrod needs your grassroots support now more than ever! | [DONATE »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66686862/417218635/889903058?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230718_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0MjExYzI2LWFiMjUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3RAN5_OeyMht_CeUWZWyCF8d2rqbN9s4R_LR0QnYZAI=)
---
**This news couldn’t have come at a worse time, Peter:**

After _The Cook Political Report_ called our race in Ohio a toss up, Mitch McConnell started coming after Sherrod as his top target for defeat. Now, a brand-new GOP opponent just jumped in the race to defeat Sherrod – and polls already show us in a dead heat.

| | Friend, Apparently finding cocaine just laying around the White House isn’t anything to fuss over...at least when President Biden is commander-in-chief. After a swift “investigation” that didn't amount to squat, the [Secret Service is closing the book](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ef87416924e14fcfa77710f85283c62e&_e=QdJt93ZMMW7S4gl5ULUQ3pThE2aENAaWa9NzgEc_Ght_707wAGamZ9Oz2ff6TjHKgMq7ZU-DEZ-3d2ZSv0v4cGLCU_W1Axo75qYlsTfk7nJPjE3-m_7Ry0wa7RF-A-E7Z-4HQIiGVgesVT8Xng28SgXPXH_GC2hSgqCLvF-pZiKo9oofzxBYlJcQEiJCgZyrXi2Shy1XM0w_kUu3hZ7z93OGs8F9o5k7du4lp3gxj8tvwXC9-oIOIh1968hcPFwvAGKY9NrbfmWPTcXgnus1tb4g5rPyJDOcsc11qFs828XrlqtITDPrhwD844QzQd81) and calling it a day. It's downright maddening how they expect us to believe the idea that there was a whole bag of illicit drugs right under their noses in the West Wing, and yet not a soul seems to know a lick about it. FBI lab results allegedly failed to show usable [fingerprints](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ef87416924e14fcfa77710f85283c62e&_e=QdJt93ZMMW7S4gl5ULUQ3gpbENb1SJNX1jaNUHHh9yxd3vrRvMe-CQqL0FLHhCUpmBXw9O8aViWN7cXBEoQBZA9Je7nV7d-7sufbiY7GCtt93opvoPo7qdORyh4VPu5eA7SRi39pj04vkvEqxUSceDRwYkcVkW3W2FcZaNTJYmTp_pDn1-2H0DvplNwOor_s8IO3BbzWJ44tdljTMs0tvNPo8KtZL2YrGB7TD7IClddk8-WIfn6ya_OfMxGUKKfr_oY_xQHXywW72tVf7-7twXsDSHUVMQzd55FrMJ8B1_o%3D)—and surveillance video provided “no evidence” to narrow down a list of culprits. Riddle me this: How is there “insufficient data” in the most secure building in America? Tourists entering the building for a quick loop around the premises have to undergo a background check! ** ** **We know better. This is just another Biden family cover-up of epic proportions, and the rotten-to-the-core alphabet agencies are in on it. ** Even [former agents](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ef87416924e14fcfa77710f85283c62e&_e=QdJt93ZMMW7S4gl5ULUQ3mXfjuNKdgnhnytPEQW4mvW0Lw9ytIepDDoeU2ro9WH5DBK2eD7KRku17Md9qkA3Ah-zl4IUQdtFsiV0OHAKyIxtLepu-sJZDRMaCFPKp4ubojS_-tBiSSKnHybYKy3rJVykhxel96zSYqQNczW1LxdY1oR1-TMC6l-WbRG-sq-3ZAdAzwyG0hURfbJCVJmKwPC4EAdnoBEnt77qxrubJ5U5NuVu-gjR_CKLM0onSlnvPxIaUZAOpQ_GEyo12wuoDIrWdsyHYZ0MQPr_j1mJbzM%3D) have come forward in the press to blow the whistle, pointing out that this is a restricted area with a logbook. They have to have leads. As we continue to peel back the layers of this story, investigators also revealed that [marijuana was found](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ef87416924e14fcfa77710f85283c62e&_e=QdJt93ZMMW7S4gl5ULUQ3pThE2aENAaWa9NzgEc_Ghu1D_X_6wZ0AsJvN-TKQVwkCfC2JbI3qGqJv2jyzxyLL4_ddao52f8WYrwt23k4gbol-OacsKkEZ-DWtPvuh1XQHkRJvBiS7ALQ6cqcRIVm5yRQsPloVmWiJFrjTocSE84q9O5LqgsWbCmlXR_qHYAQ_6e1ARFKu248VsI9SxRWslB3dcFE-RuXGJA4QD8l9GfGGCCjtW4SGQ0CKM3anoY4eX6Q3DVxGvKZBEJiRQDgKxxcfljmm9cTJj9mJYtngLbEGO2Y5jtQzPHeULjJxJNg2JJTPugUxIhvej2u03lVzg%3D%3D) on two separate occasions last year. I guess this is just run-of-the-mill stuff when it comes to the Biden administration. **[Will you stand with me as I fight to uncover this corruption? Let’s restore faith in our government institutions and hold the Bidens accountable.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ef87416924e14fcfa77710f85283c62e&_e=QdJt93ZMMW7S4gl5ULUQ3s2jzmcOfOiPCWnOjVKeIii75Z8-HRDDX6ErLlHYPVaoHoLudzz-41XUIPLzOE9RO_K6-eOl2D5Gk-LqCkfidnQE-O4Qa1PXR-zHfSU-6pPeUJpjT24t5lR73ub_AgYFIxX8mXVPXHb7gGdl5lA6E1djFSMzOk98ccOY-P8fnqfY2kRNy_O7uTEHku0B-XSk7mnLIMQ48KDwH4qeHjngfcxjNEhp9WKlktWKLYAiCHBOFI5Ve3jaVoSDgtxuopuVvPbnhC6XSvoUIjRwlEWQSqg56avKsTx6qACEG6rooUrYJxDn4W96jx0mge7vmpAvAUxvDDtzCH9HufM2ZFOL7zQ%3D)** The folks we’ve got in the White House are guilty as sin, and it’s time for a reality check. Congress needs to get some guts and cut funding to these agencies until they’re ready to tell the truth. Until then, I’ll continue to stand up for what’s right. Thank you for sending me here. Tim Burchett

subject: Summer is here!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter – I personally love the summer months. The weather is warm, you can be outdoors all day everyday, and you get to do fun activities you typically wouldn’t during the fall or winter. | | | [](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=a8f81e873f9a488288c94541703acd24&_e=jWZBN8vREIXy0S-wCOPLWqDtPzWG-toai-2LUHfZy45mUNILZQHOdKItpM2furFUa_JOK7GnpURYnFURzFS9QNA-AdGZ_XpvWpdU5qj-IBwz5G9hISilGI61_aAz-1AFEI2UwGx8gbTZJTfjnqIu21cFdDr6hRZrdiSLOM6DvYaNxGgn4hRsZB5ARBl5WTLC0iEUgH4JZM8s78fxnkGw28AHwFFpvMUs3AXax23fTB9l7jn7UIse85AL6so9JpFbR80ltnHOBZf1uXICR5oyD9Ix6p2yVW4m-pi4FgpyI5aMVXdRO4_IEEOS3LQAvQsuy7MyNVYPL-_mGmmM-2LnILECDVMeD_HKplFGwBEOe1oWw2icWZVM9XSWDQT_A_MGuASnveID-13VB_yYf07REczkCzEOt4oKq86c21mRaxM%3D) Hey Peter – I personally love summer! The weather is warm, and you can be outside all day in the sun! Now, what I don’t love about summer as a finance director is that it is notoriously hard to raise money from May to August. Check it out for yourself:[](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=a8f81e873f9a488288c94541703acd24&_e=jWZBN8vREIXy0S-wCOPLWqDtPzWG-toai-2LUHfZy45mUNILZQHOdKItpM2furFUa_JOK7GnpURYnFURzFS9QNA-AdGZ_XpvWpdU5qj-IBwz5G9hISilGI61_aAz-1AFEI2UwGx8gbTZJTfjnqIu21cFdDr6hRZrdiSLOM6DvYaNxGgn4hRsZB5ARBl5WTLC0iEUgH4JZM8s78fxnkGw28AHwFFpvMUs3AXax23fTB9l7jn7UIse85AL6so9JpFbR80ltnHOBZf1uXICR5oyD24_mAA99OpwKyaY9gteOvla3DS70bHdw9bJ1ybXNivfBtRQX3ZW2wA109cTZdy75oqfhDoJ-HmNXJ--dtrkuFJO_SJUsOubVYnnV0UngFpOCgccmLJoiAEmCxmKeLzG3InpNsPYjx5IHyL3xMrnfkk%3D)**[Can you chip in $10 to help give us a mid-summer boost?](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=a8f81e873f9a488288c94541703acd24&_e=jWZBN8vREIXy0S-wCOPLWqDtPzWG-toai-2LUHfZy45mUNILZQHOdKItpM2furFUa_JOK7GnpURYnFURzFS9QNA-AdGZ_XpvWpdU5qj-IBwz5G9hISilGI61_aAz-1AFEI2UwGx8gbTZJTfjnqIu21cFdDr6hRZrdiSLOM6DvYaNxGgn4hRsZB5ARBl5WTLC0iEUgH4JZM8s78fxnkGw28AHwFFpvMUs3AXax23fTB9l7jn7UIse85AL6so9JpFbYgunaDauC3xAPMy8WC3Ag8Ofo7F5DH_eah90eYZegPPKbq8LVfVIFwYEqnoxuFk-poaRyECJgcN78DIijPg7kcHeyXHwKg4RcqhJhI5FwAZ4lvUny0g4LFReqnrwjjf0AxUMo5XC69mGzK08PCjNoGBFB64rne0gR5aNgAwyK7DDr6VtryEBLTpqt2sDTlxf)** I really hate to be bothering you right now. I know you’re enjoying your summer, especially here in Michigan. Whether you are planning a trip to your cottage up north, checking out Mackinac Island, going to a Tigers game, or just hanging out in your backyard, the Mitten State is a great place to be this time of year. But this coming election is too important to rest!Let's make sure our community is represented by someone like Emily –**[help me get her to Washington.](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=a8f81e873f9a488288c94541703acd24&_e=jWZBN8vREIXy0S-wCOPLWqDtPzWG-toai-2LUHfZy45mUNILZQHOdKItpM2furFUa_JOK7GnpURYnFURzFS9QNA-AdGZ_XpvWpdU5qj-IBwz5G9hISilGI61_aAz-1AFEI2UwGx8gbTZJTfjnqIu21cFdDr6hRZrdiSLOM6DvYaNxGgn4hRsZB5ARBl5WTLC0iEUgH4JZM8s78fxnkGw28AHwFFpvMUs3AXax23fTB9l7jn7UIse85AL6so9JpFbR80ltnHOBZf1uXICR5oyDx2BsbXJ4fZl0_eo4_wdwJjixitLNnbhzPIDnM79e5Bihe61xuknVrEcqPnCmJulfXUkBEGpmTo_0O5__jp39jKDO1BOLVYfTDUew3rCBv8ce5XyoCZ-uzIl6TfrWxTyZJ9-zEs8RZMeOEstGAjA8Fo%3D)**– Ben PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS

name: Dick Durbin
subject: The GOP is aiming to flip this seat red…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
...but we can stop the Republican Senate takeover.
#
Peter,
When I go to work in Washington, the people back home in Illinois are at the front of my mind.
But I’ll tell you, any job is better with good coworkers, and that’s exactly what Tim Kaine is. Not only have we built a genuine friendship over the years, we make for a great team in the Senate. We can always count on Tim to be a hard worker, a policy expert, and a voice of reason.
**[I’m doing everything I can to keep my friend Tim Kaine in the Senate, but the Republicans aren’t wasting a minute. They’re aiming to flip this seat and turn the Senate red. Your $5 contribution will show the GOP we’re defending this seat and keeping the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66688761/417220060/1055213349?refcode=dd_em_230718_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzU4OGYxNy1hZDI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ihvn-9k1O0ad9aLBS5S3g8lPpMev9EjUCXr0RAIeo-4=)**
This race is important to me. Not only is it crucial that we hold every Democratic seat, I don’t want to lose one of my favorite coworkers in the Senate. Tim Kaine is great fun to be around. And he’s always ready to work hard and get the job done on our shared legislative priorities.
Senator Kaine was there when we passed the _First Step Act_ to begin reforming our criminal justice system. He was there for Democrats’ historic _Inflation Reduction Act_ , lowering costs for families and taking action on climate change. And just last week, Virginia’s Senator was there again, cosponsoring my bill with Rep. Ayanna Pressley to end federal use of the death penalty.
It is critical that we stop the Republican Senate takeover in 2024. I’m also asking as a personal request: _don’t let the GOP unseat my friend Tim Kaine and replace him with a MAGA buffoon_.
****[It’s simple: we need Tim Kaine in the Senate as part of our Democratic majority. Pitch in $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66688764/417220061/1055213349?refcode=dd_em_230718_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzU4OGYxNy1hZDI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ihvn-9k1O0ad9aLBS5S3g8lPpMev9EjUCXr0RAIeo-4=)****
My best,
Dick Durbin

******[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66688766/417220062/1055213349?refcode=dd_em_230718_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzU4OGYxNy1hZDI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ihvn-9k1O0ad9aLBS5S3g8lPpMev9EjUCXr0RAIeo-4=)******

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024 | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=393c71b436844301a6b890026293cb0f&_t=_nKWcSzG7KYy3nwoNYIqZqU2DyXOpgPiyI8Qju7VuJRmucKCUZ0vvs56o9hkX_dtk8c0Vz9C5EbVy3kSD9gDSI4BzBtwPBLE3vymGmrV5n4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=393c71b436844301a6b890026293cb0f&_t=_nKWcSzG7KYy3nwoNYIqZqU2DyXOpgPiyI8Qju7VuJRmucKCUZ0vvs56o9hkX_dtk8c0Vz9C5EbVy3kSD9gDSI4BzBtwPBLE3vymGmrV5n4%3D)
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=393c71b436844301a6b890026293cb0f&_e=Pomxb3X1b3lvGa-u2nGhHOusnsXvnCCg8YxYUeUiWfeW0jKGVH0272izKjq5IxRm4NEsGxZGtxkjUgJpri323lelp0woOaARHepTlIzl63DZ_q6L3mHPdFtHMknBx5Wljv9PzYQNs8WoznLgVL61R6p6-ZE0os_yzpD1Q4FThxh-3heFkQxJxfcbWIub3b8tU8Y9Ug8oxuTH_skqxM927bj61wZiXzjJ6ZC1EfSlwrWmHYuf-tQBgOMIAmXDu466DjLY0bxnbU98Vko_VRC8SaS0e2M1Pn5khRWwONV4IbzF_kyc19_ItKftzJe_U3FHc2eHTJ99VRtfnV_Gi5p3J2skaIn_DAq1I5_8mXcUPQaqNELdqZ56BCQ-QEfTY3rqTPVg-8OMITw9z4zlZqChQA%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=393c71b436844301a6b890026293cb0f&_e=Pomxb3X1b3lvGa-u2nGhHOusnsXvnCCg8YxYUeUiWfeW0jKGVH0272izKjq5IxRm4NEsGxZGtxkjUgJpri323lelp0woOaARHepTlIzl63DZ_q6L3mHPdFtHMknBx5Wljv9PzYQNs8WoznLgVL61R6p6-ZE0os_yzpD1Q4FThxh-3heFkQxJxfcbWIub3b8tU8Y9Ug8oxuTH_skqxM927bj61wZiXzjJ6ZC1EfSlwrWmHYuf-tQBgOMIAmXDu466lpFSVt_Xz-3aIcsx3UcBXdJPxeI37rMPSg8Wl9HLA_qqcT77TIoRXZVINbn_6HJ0gBzvr8pOAkLGMLd1I6Vly9n_7NX0KfrMdvn25u9nULPw43A6cOB8IdlHWBjXqo4xR_9Al6WEaaLJjCPcSPJFLw%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[**ENDORSE FMR. NAVY SEAL TIM SHEEHY FOR U.S. SENATE** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=393c71b436844301a6b890026293cb0f&_e=Pomxb3X1b3lvGa-u2nGhHOusnsXvnCCg8YxYUeUiWfeW0jKGVH0272izKjq5IxRm4NEsGxZGtxkjUgJpri323lelp0woOaARHepTlIzl63DZ_q6L3mHPdFtHMknBx5Wljv9PzYQNs8WoznLgVL61R6p6-ZE0os_yzpD1Q4FThxh-3heFkQxJxfcbWIub3b8tU8Y9Ug8oxuTH_skqxM927bj61wZiXzjJ6ZC1EfSlwrWmHYuf-tQBgOMIAmXDu466e21CFm_3RaiIh8cyZB0M7VCHYEjxvO-oCUPImSKswsj8fPOjyrBjWspQWlK-iTSVfUWdp1PqXipOUAA1tVxySlO2QGsP67GGfD-6TMplLEJVFeMVSfFa-tLefVmGAEPTopnLU7lWgV_8OYKGTqc8vw%3D%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=393c71b436844301a6b890026293cb0f&_e=Pomxb3X1b3lvGa-u2nGhHOusnsXvnCCg8YxYUeUiWfeW0jKGVH0272izKjq5IxRm4NEsGxZGtxkjUgJpri323lelp0woOaARHepTlIzl63DZ_q6L3mHPdFtHMknBx5Wljv9PzYQNs8WoznLgVL61R6p6-ZE0os_yzpD1Q4FThxh-3heFkQxJxfcbWIub3b8tU8Y9Ug8oxuTH_skqxM927bj61wZiXzjJ6ZC1EfSlwrWmHYuf-tQBgOMIAmXDu466GrUsb9wy_2xVv71vejR5ZjfLHTCpFhhd6KqtwIrb332S3UxrbD-hW_5YNnFU9Y12imAQg8qMJR8VWzzNl3gT5u0y7CTDwd9xdlcUYQFgycOkTXO7V_Y0MMZWtBupw4rSOYIrepUmW-jeBHSCu4eO1A%3D%3D)

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Endorsement Alert! Jeff Yarbro for Nashville Mayor!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
July 18, 2023
Dear Friend,
We are endorsing Jeff Yarbro for Mayor because Jeff is prepared for the
job.
Jeff has the right combination of passion for service and a unique ability to
bring people together. He’s smart and he knows how to get things done in politics and government. He’s passed important pieces of legislation, more legislative achievements than probably any other progressive in the Tennessee General Assembly. He’s served with integrity for years, each year fighting on behalf of his constituents in Nashville, but really on behalf of the entire state.
We have all had an opportunity to watch Jeff and he’s been tested. He’s the
voice of reason and moving us forward.
We couldn’t be prouder to stand with Jeff.
SUPPORT TENNESSEE VOTER PROJECT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Early voting has started in the Nashville Mayor’s race. If you’re in metro Nashville, please check out his website [https://www.jeffyarbro.com/] and then please get out to vote for Jeff Yarbro.
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

name: Jon Tester
subject: Can I share a story with you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking Americans like my grandparents a hundred years ago.

| Hi Peter.

Here’s a photo of my grandparents, Arnfred and Christine, on their wedding day in 1905. That was seven years before they picked out a flat piece of grassland just outside Big Sandy to build their homestead.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66691038/417223144/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230718-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0ZWExYzMxLWFmMjUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RBfQFu3gD7mQWpMgKmuSMaeREaiajKe-YweoTfiC574=)
That patch of loamy, alkaline clay-soil is the same one where I grew up; and where Sharla and I raised our kids and still farm the land.

Things weren’t easy for Fred and Christine. They suffered devastating windstorms, bitter cold, shooting fire, poisonous snakes—pretty much everything but locusts. And in the late teens, the drought hit, wiping out the farm entirely. My grandparents were forced to leave.

But they were determined to return to their homestead. They saved up enough to start all over again on the same little piece of land. They had a couple hundred acres to their name, a newly-built barn, a windmill, their healthy son and daughters (including newborn Helen, my mom), strong muscles, and the powerful work ethic that built rural America.

**I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking Americans like my grandparents a hundred years ago. Folks like our teachers, farmers, and construction workers deserve a government that works for them.**

But too many Washington politicians are deep in the pockets of right-wing special interests. They promise one thing when the camera is rolling, then make secret backroom deals with their wealthy megadonors.

That’s not how I operate, and it’s why we’re running this campaign differently. **I’m counting on grassroots folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can, to build a team strong enough to take on the outside groups and Republican attacks.**

[_**Can I count on you to split a contribution today between my campaign and Fight for Progress? Your donation (no matter the size) *sows the seeds* of our movement, ensuring we grow and build the resources we need to win.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66691039/417223145/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230718-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0ZWExYzMxLWFmMjUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RBfQFu3gD7mQWpMgKmuSMaeREaiajKe-YweoTfiC574=)

clean_body: I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking Americans like my grandparents a hundred years ago. | Hi Peter. Here’s a photo of my grandparents, Arnfred and Christine, on their wedding day in 1905. That was seven years before they picked out a flat piece of grassland just outside Big Sandy to build their homestead. = That patch of loamy, alkaline clay-soil is the same one where I grew up; and where Sharla and I raised our kids and still farm the land. Things weren’t easy for Fred and Christine. They suffered devastating windstorms, bitter cold, shooting fire, poisonous snakes—pretty much everything but locusts. And in the late teens, the drought hit, wiping out the farm entirely. My grandparents were forced to leave. But they were determined to return to their homestead. They saved up enough to start all over again on the same little piece of land. They had a couple hundred acres to their name, a newly-built barn, a windmill, their healthy son and daughters (including newborn Helen, my mom), strong muscles, and the powerful work ethic that built rural America. I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking Americans like my grandparents a hundred years ago. Folks like our teachers, farmers, and construction workers deserve a government that works for them. But too many Washington politicians are deep in the pockets of right-wing special interests. They promise one thing when the camera is rolling, then make secret backroom deals with their wealthy megadonors. That’s not how I operate, and it’s why we’re running this campaign differently. I’m counting on grassroots folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can, to build a team strong enough to take on the outside groups and Republican attacks. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for your support. Together, we can keep me in Washington fighting for the little guy. Jon * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. This is serious.

| |

| | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e7e1986989841afb0da88c7a21a7cc2&_e=mSlW8885omlYCxyQYXWxGH1FeFYZKn0_mN2ZLy40n2_xQ_yzOx8F3lv3dyAyFS4M9Okc-WEMyaGjg58UOQPw5NSNH4C9n_rSUO8d38C4k76MQuOCuNeumLTmqzPlzA45-rkHXnDV2qiwGaq6rME1Ju28LZeXMfB1mU_wccWmN2hrGN3TcZOErabR2pMfEqITjfJV-Br5G1F56s4P_ixjQ0lVFYvE_paYKGbj-_RYaOmoZhO2JV6O9X3uf7GXgdxwfuHmqej47A05w8fQkN7kvQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e7e1986989841afb0da88c7a21a7cc2&_e=mSlW8885omlYCxyQYXWxGH1FeFYZKn0_mN2ZLy40n2_xQ_yzOx8F3lv3dyAyFS4M9Okc-WEMyaGjg58UOQPw5NSNH4C9n_rSUO8d38C4k76MQuOCuNeumLTmqzPlzA45U23FkMR4fqSJQVVQ0HmWJHT57y4PD2kd-Crrved_T7drDpMROEyTRYGz8u82cyXNQMH6v59IBLk2X9E3xU9S4KgazH2scQcgX8icNMdSzT4NDd2LwsCLI14nDc4Uw17Yu-iCEhLLvSOJ5IvjE_cZzQ%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e7e1986989841afb0da88c7a21a7cc2&_e=mSlW8885omlYCxyQYXWxGH1FeFYZKn0_mN2ZLy40n2_xQ_yzOx8F3lv3dyAyFS4M9Okc-WEMyaGjg58UOQPw5NSNH4C9n_rSUO8d38C4k76MQuOCuNeumLTmqzPlzA454OYpFbthPzxQv81sp1AkjMS1lYUOkBwi3eOenY-9eO4d_P772HCb-sJet9-stPKazOaDQ1YFF1JOrwN2yjNjMvzaIkCB7eEisZF30rY48ERf5hcWVzEOjXdHJh-YmlEGxObE1hXgQ14Exm273XcllA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. body:

|

Fellow American,

Since John McCain’s passing in 2018, Arizona has been in political turmoil. We’ve had two high-profile Senate elections in the past 4 years with** more than $340 MILLION **spent to persuade voters to cast their ballot for a particular candidate.

**As Sheriff of Arizona’s 3rd largest county,** I can only dream of what me and my team of deputies would be able to do with $340 million. I’ll tell you this: _**there would be no illegal immigrants on the loose in the entire county I’m responsible for protecting.**
_
Unfortunately, the days of raising - and spending - massive sums of money to win a Senate seat are here to stay. I knew that when I got into the race, but it doesn’t mean I like it. But in my mind’s eye, **the endless hours we’ll spend fundraising to build my profile are worth it**. The Democrats I’m running against are as progressive as they come and completely out of touch with the average American voter.

Unfortunately for me, **campaign cash comes easier for Democrats**. In the first quarter of the year, my opponents raised more than $5 million between them. **If I’m ever going to build out the public profile I’ll need to run a competitive race against them, I’m going to have to raise some serious cash.**

I know that with all the presidential contenders asking you for cash, not to mention every congressional candidate from here to Timbuktu, you must be picky with who you choose to donate to. **[I’m humbly requesting you take a chance on me today, Fellow American.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a537c69a42d1416fb4b2837612843b69&_e=fjNOK-dCQhxthSajcC1PrOVgSKdIRQ4T6wfiV8a9Ty3ajSBtCWXFcac_dgRf2ew7ROGAiAZU-E0braBaJnr9I7QzSTyk5bEVKBkamy1c9ndBrGs0ZfO3JNvMxFvX9BTUIV52MLVN84wtlHeRNWXZ0kfV2JvDjBLkBkUqY8_w5RE8T4UpX-UCMxMslMygRYag3wV_g4QTXA3M8DomttR8PiIvyh05qX9P-Avz3Y-KbwdZ_X8O0gsRj5nDSln7dd5Uihun9VFCw7sSTnhy6NOeHaor1KgvUUPOneOdGg9Jhfl9Kh9v2rU8tynoOJNvyUMPh9fFxmHzItc9cblRcS4PBpeVNU2Mal3GirSIxuHlYWbuVJOgJstMnRnUWu59hzmUd_MbgEKXaWsccVsWLSFc_-YahrbmJMjOFRnnQ8tnJ1Q%3D)**

[**BUY US A GALLON OF GAS

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. clean_body: At more than 113,000 square miles, I have a lot of ground to cover as I work to meet every Republican that I can | | Fellow American, Since John McCain’s passing in 2018, Arizona has been in political turmoil. We’ve had two high-profile Senate elections in the past 4 years with more than $340 MILLION spent to persuade voters to cast their ballot for a particular candidate. As Sheriff of Arizona’s 3rd largest county, I can only dream of what me and my team of deputies would be able to do with $340 million. I’ll tell you this: there would be no illegal immigrants on the loose in the entire county I’m responsible for protecting. Unfortunately, the days of raising - and spending - massive sums of money to win a Senate seat are here to stay. I knew that when I got into the race, but it doesn’t mean I like it. But in my mind’s eye, the endless hours we’ll spend fundraising to build my profile are worth it. The Democrats I’m running against are as progressive as they come and completely out of touch with the average American voter. Unfortunately for me, campaign cash comes easier for Democrats. In the first quarter of the year, my opponents raised more than $5 million between them. If I’m ever going to build out the public profile I’ll need to run a competitive race against them, I’m going to have to raise some serious cash. I know that with all the presidential contenders asking you for cash, not to mention every congressional candidate from here to Timbuktu, you must be picky with who you choose to donate to. At more than 113,000 square miles, Arizona is a big state. We need to meet as many folks as we can, which means spending tons of money on gas, hotels, and renting out event spaces. If possible, With respect, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. subject: This is my most critical mission to date

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3744c5d4df5e4308ae2c1b388bb7c138&_e=F9mWoxfNwmfNgKGn6VNHcmbsdyZUEn5HEbsbrjwwkVMATalzljmTkQjOQVCYJgGrSr3TRS18NrKy6KjGu5pWVMFhq97oq0EqXy0D3qDh9VATKUbMW7TSR7K_jIgxNg0bNBQTdk2L-0FPMvSHTlEOqSEBTe8HnebZLSHPxrb77gZm90B0qSGCokZSLKUCCdT6j5QNkm-YUq1UQx1FNy5UmRTsIucdVK1U-q1UubNLomFu7Ogrqary4JwCkbGGf8Ivr4dZ3kWYz_fS0oo7k1R-LDlskDCuDqjrzglus-ofd2Ote9LylnjeggjWcVXStwiRYpKW6SZDhAJ5m1W-EqULI52V2fN3j-gVhpZ2zNg7xACSZFaSxnAPxenAWpzHVTacSPUTqe_Lr-uqilAl2ihLug%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[**ENDORSE FMR. NAVY SEAL TIM SHEEHY FOR U.S. SENATE** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3744c5d4df5e4308ae2c1b388bb7c138&_e=F9mWoxfNwmfNgKGn6VNHcmbsdyZUEn5HEbsbrjwwkVMATalzljmTkQjOQVCYJgGrSr3TRS18NrKy6KjGu5pWVMFhq97oq0EqXy0D3qDh9VATKUbMW7TSR7K_jIgxNg0bNBQTdk2L-0FPMvSHTlEOqSEBTe8HnebZLSHPxrb77gZm90B0qSGCokZSLKUCCdT6j5QNkm-YUq1UQx1FNy5UmRTsIucdVK1U-q1UubNLomFu7Ogrqary4JwCkbGGf8IvUw1bWOX6A363jJ9_PzKKhl1gv57H6lKEmR_wdH1NkUCaW9rHFiXDy-z5KP7qKW5alRdmaNHjGzyALIvxT2TY7rhh54MHjdi36ixbV9lEHaeDX8fBhzv0Z_u2Q9Tige_XDyR4vgLdhr7xPGpSZJ7s8w%3D%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3744c5d4df5e4308ae2c1b388bb7c138&_e=F9mWoxfNwmfNgKGn6VNHcmbsdyZUEn5HEbsbrjwwkVMATalzljmTkQjOQVCYJgGrSr3TRS18NrKy6KjGu5pWVMFhq97oq0EqXy0D3qDh9VATKUbMW7TSR7K_jIgxNg0bNBQTdk2L-0FPMvSHTlEOqSEBTe8HnebZLSHPxrb77gZm90B0qSGCokZSLKUCCdT6j5QNkm-YUq1UQx1FNy5UmRTsIucdVK1U-q1UubNLomFu7Ogrqary4JwCkbGGf8Iv246Z-JpJ0owaxjiN6HOjWdHqJ7L6jT5eqMTNNC30y473sQXh_hgE0VW8yOk3CJHHFEK0OFzWkR9gDfPkci78zqcUMnEXT2YxGf5LsHFOMLuTzg4x6qLmgreNdNScsz4yHZNw0vAX1sb5tXZMl02Ocg%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. clean_body: I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. | | Fellow Conservative, I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. Defeating Issue 1 is critical for restoring reproductive freedom, protecting workers’ rights, and so much more. Far-right Republicans in Columbus are all-in for Issue 1 because they care more about maximizing profits for Big Money special interests than cutting costs for our families. We must stand up and show them we won’t let our power be stripped away. Ohioans have a long history of fighting for our rights, and this time is no different. body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
NEW: House Republicans just weaponized a historically bipartisan defense bill to advance their far-right ideology.
We cannot sit quietly while extremists attack our nation’s values.
Add your name now to denounce MAGA Republicans’ efforts to roll back our progress >> [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-07-ndaa]
ADD MY NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-07-ndaa]

Team —

Every year, Jason and House Democrats have negotiated a bipartisan defense bill that protects our nation and supports our troops.

Republicans chose a different path.

Just days ago, the far-right fringe of the Republican Party used the defense bill to add outlandish, partisan amendments like restricting abortion access for our servicemembers and banning books and critical race theory.

This is extreme and misguided.

The bill was supposed to be bipartisan. Instead, Kevin McCarthy capitulated and let extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene go buck wild with their demands. We cannot let these attacks go unnoticed.

Will you add your name to denounce the far right’s efforts? [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-07-ndaa]

ADD MY NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-07-ndaa]

Thank you,

— Team Crow

| | **BREAKING NEWS:
_NRSC-picked Republican, Hung Cao, enters race to challenge Tim Kaine for U.S. Senate seat**_ Former GOP Congressional candidate Hung Cao has launched his campaign to officially challenge Tim Kaine for Virginia’s U.S. Senate seat.

Cao, who was openly recruited by the GOP’s national Senate fundraising committee, is an anti-choice extremist who said he was “thrilled” that _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned and compared abortion to the Holocaust.

He has also supported Florida Sen. Rick Scott’s plan to put Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security on the chopping block, called for gutting health care protections for 1.3 million Virginians with pre-existing conditions, and expressed sympathy for the January 6th insurrectionists while calling into question the 2020 election results.

**_Put simply, Hung Cao does not represent the interests of the people of Virginia -- and he cannot be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate.**_

**Here’s the problem:** Steve Daines, chair of the well-funded National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), has recruited Cao to run against Tim next November. And if he can access the funds, he could have a real shot at winning -- thanks to his national connections.

[**_Tim Kaine needs our help. Will you split a donation of $25 or more between the Democratic Party of Georgia and Tim’s campaign to help stand up to the NRSC’s hand-picked opponent? | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | BREAKING NEWS: NRSC-picked Republican, Hung Cao, enters race to challenge Tim Kaine for U.S. Senate seat Former GOP Congressional candidate Hung Cao has launched his campaign to officially challenge Tim Kaine for Virginia’s U.S. Senate seat. Cao, who was openly recruited by the GOP’s national Senate fundraising committee, is an anti-choice extremist who said he was “thrilled” that Roe v. Wade was overturned and compared abortion to the Holocaust. He has also supported Florida Sen. Rick Scott’s plan to put Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security on the chopping block, called for gutting health care protections for 1.3 million Virginians with pre-existing conditions, and expressed sympathy for the January 6th insurrectionists while calling into question the 2020 election results. Put simply, Hung Cao does not represent the interests of the people of Virginia -- and he cannot be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate. Here’s the problem: Steve Daines, chair of the well-funded National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), has recruited Cao to run against Tim next November. And if he can access the funds, he could have a real shot at winning -- thanks to his national connections. = = = = = Virginia deserves so much better than the extreme, right-wing candidates the NRSC is recruiting to run for Senate. Tim Kaine has fought to create good-paying jobs and expand health care protections for all Virginians, supports women’s reproductive rights, and will never back down in the face of GOP attacks on Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. =_ Thank you, Team Kaine for Virginia | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. body:
Because Janet Yellen always gets it right No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-aajrg-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aajrg-trhiujldw-r/)

[Now, discuss in the comment thread!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aajrg-trhiujldw-i/) **Sir Winston Churchill once said...** ["However beautiful the strategy, you should occasionally look at the results."](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aajrg-trhiujldw-d/) **A complete overhaul of the Federal government?** ["Our current executive branch was conceived of by liberals for the purpose of promulgating liberal policies,"](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aajrg-trhiujldw-h/) said former White House personnel chief John McEntee. Agree?

**The secret ingredient** [Dr. Peter McCullough says that the big pharma shots contain a cancer-promoting agent.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aajrg-trhiujldw-k/) Well, that seems terrible. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aajrg-trhiujldw-u/)!**

body:

Fellow American,

Since John McCain’s passing in 2018, Arizona has been in political turmoil. We’ve had two high-profile Senate elections in the past 4 years with** more than $340 MILLION **spent to persuade voters to cast their ballot for a particular candidate.

**As Sheriff of Arizona’s 3rd largest county,** I can only dream of what me and my team of deputies would be able to do with $340 million. I’ll tell you this: _**there would be no illegal immigrants on the loose in the entire county I’m responsible for protecting.**
_
Unfortunately, the days of raising - and spending - massive sums of money to win a Senate seat are here to stay. I knew that when I got into the race, but it doesn’t mean I like it. But in my mind’s eye, **the endless hours we’ll spend fundraising to build my profile are worth it**. The Democrats I’m running against are as progressive as they come and completely out of touch with the average American voter.

Unfortunately for me, **campaign cash comes easier for Democrats**. In the first quarter of the year, my opponents raised more than $5 million between them. **If I’m ever going to build out the public profile I’ll need to run a competitive race against them, I’m going to have to raise some serious cash.**

I know that with all the presidential contenders asking you for cash, not to mention every congressional candidate from here to Timbuktu, you must be picky with who you choose to donate to. **[I’m humbly requesting you take a chance on me today, Fellow American.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=01280a8641b8405484e58ec1bddb1334&_e=a3x0E8QTYIO9GswMOXXDCdAg8qJQXC5UvmcWyCPDE5TzE7r6VVBONstGBpKJClgWbYcDqtNAN8rQ04hqo7LzfqjOS_72dVrOudc0GKVTujAUelFL-5L5XfNcz0F8rfCZVhywOEx9kY0mjteng8I7IdTy7Wm1pum45PKCu95hlsIkkaxhxbyZfqq2LOqGCzPnUwArIXpHfiznqMnPzd0n8ShYRlg9gOS3T5-76J-sZZLxAHD08fukOdMzocBnZr9PA09MKCYXdtdyUb_4pX1Yq5vXhoey7bEYk3zN7Z_2SU-8UqA46LK8-aZjS4SeedURT996o0prZDSW6S5RD_Te-mYHAR0uzs1pjfjaOFDMzhxWKLXMhJ77H2f2jADaUILOvSMLCLSLxQ2yjrDOmhrhE7rUmPUvVzPkO51HMPCr9h0%3D)**

[**BUY US A GALLON OF GAS
CHIP IN $3.50 **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=01280a8641b8405484e58ec1bddb1334&_e=a3x0E8QTYIO9GswMOXXDCdAg8qJQXC5UvmcWyCPDE5TzE7r6VVBONstGBpKJClgWbYcDqtNAN8rQ04hqo7LzfqjOS_72dVrOudc0GKVTujAUelFL-5L5XfNcz0F8rfCZVhywOEx9kY0mjteng8I7IdTy7Wm1pum45PKCu95hlsIkkaxhxbyZfqq2LOqGCzPnUwArIXpHfiznqMnPzd0n8ShYRlg9gOS3T5-76J-sZZLxAHD08fukOdMzocBnZr9P7NPJHltJdY8NghfjeiKA6HHcfYKS9Fr6zEfDu0qij4z4D3AFAdSzH2lfiuNZSP2vMSNqI29TMjtfFTt87igdOjU2FJX_148KJSTUuims3NXxg-2nEr-S_DnqAxRzFbLTg0tAa59f_mKMkZUMRful0S1WvpNV2VEweqsWdyyZL7c%3D)

**At more than 113,000 square miles, Arizona is a big state.** We need to meet as many folks as we can, which means spending tons of money on gas, hotels, and renting out event spaces. If possible, **[will you please chip in a couple of dollars right now to our travel account which we’ll use to go to even more events and meet even more voters?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=01280a8641b8405484e58ec1bddb1334&_e=a3x0E8QTYIO9GswMOXXDCdAg8qJQXC5UvmcWyCPDE5TzE7r6VVBONstGBpKJClgWbYcDqtNAN8rQ04hqo7LzfqjOS_72dVrOudc0GKVTujAUelFL-5L5XfNcz0F8rfCZVhywOEx9kY0mjteng8I7IdTy7Wm1pum45PKCu95hlsIkkaxhxbyZfqq2LOqGCzPnUwArIXpHfiznqMnPzd0n8ShYRlg9gOS3T5-76J-sZZLxAHD08fukOdMzocBnZr9PTc58n4pc4iTF7xNlgdU7SWvM1iueGDNdN8UFtPzp6pmkaW15z9b51EJ5mGUs-rvKa-MWG1Ms0xcYBiVPhjr-cQxMlMnFHKXXhJyJZpj6nq4Pdkg0mub6v-00xAgME48G4FTksFwnB46Wa0ieVpUDDxNSbQwJ1LIeXDQrbaqmhSg%3D)**

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. clean_body: Arizona is consistently ranked as one of the top Senate races in the country - -and for good reason. People aren’t happy with the status quo. | | Fellow American, Since John McCain’s passing in 2018, Arizona has been in political turmoil. We’ve had two high-profile Senate elections in the past 4 years with more than $340 MILLION spent to persuade voters to cast their ballot for a particular candidate. As Sheriff of Arizona’s 3rd largest county, I can only dream of what me and my team of deputies would be able to do with $340 million. I’ll tell you this: there would be no illegal immigrants on the loose in the entire county I’m responsible for protecting. Unfortunately, the days of raising - and spending - massive sums of money to win a Senate seat are here to stay. I knew that when I got into the race, but it doesn’t mean I like it. But in my mind’s eye, the endless hours we’ll spend fundraising to build my profile are worth it. The Democrats I’m running against are as progressive as they come and completely out of touch with the average American voter. Unfortunately for me, campaign cash comes easier for Democrats. In the first quarter of the year, my opponents raised more than $5 million between them. If I’m ever going to build out the public profile I’ll need to run a competitive race against them, I’m going to have to raise some serious cash. I know that with all the presidential contenders asking you for cash, not to mention every congressional candidate from here to Timbuktu, you must be picky with who you choose to donate to. At more than 113,000 square miles, Arizona is a big state. We need to meet as many folks as we can, which means spending tons of money on gas, hotels, and renting out event spaces. If possible, With respect, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=3030%2E5257348%2ETtNX-C ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, Donald
Trump just had an exclusive sit-down interview with Fox News — and once
again, he devoted a major part of his campaign pitch to attacking me:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230718_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=3030%2E5257348%2ETtNX-C ]Donald Trump exclusive on set interview with Fox News. Chryon: SCHIFF RUNNING
FOR U.S. SENATE SEAT IN CALIFORNIA

Trump: “Adam Schiff, he’s a sick person.”
Bartiromo: “But he may become a senator.”
Trump: “He may become, isn’t that a crazy thing? Well, maybe not, he’s running
against some people that are much better than him. He’s a sick person...he ought
to be prosecuted for what he did.”

One thing is clear — Donald Trump does not want me in the Senate. I’m not
surprised — he and his enablers think I have been too effective in pushing
back against wannabe dictators like him. And his continued calls for my
prosecution and imprisonment show just how afraid he is of accountability.
As our campaign has gained more and more momentum, the attacks from him
and his followers have become more strident, and they are only going to
get worse as we get closer to Election Day.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=july2023_abs_em.luhYnl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230718_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=3030%2E5257348%2ETtNX-C ]Before Trump’s attacks on me can pick up any more steam, will you rush
a $10 contribution to my campaign for Senate so we can win this race and
continue holding Donald Trump accountable?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

It wasn’t enough for Kevin McCarthy to kick me off the Intelligence
Committee.

It wasn’t enough for MAGA Republicans to pass a sham censure vote as
retaliation against me — after Trump threatened a primary challenge
against any Republican who voted against it.

Trump is willing to say or do anything to keep me out of the Senate. But
I’m not backing down. None of us can.

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: The political stunt that puts our whole country in danger:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Tommy Tuberville’s military stunt endangers national security.
#

Peter -
Ruben reached out yesterday about Senator Tommy Tuberville and the hundreds of promotions he’s blocked.
A TON of you responded. So clearly, a lot of you are mad about this, too. For good reason.
We wanted to follow up today and send over an op-ed that Ruben wrote, which ran on MSNBC.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_tub_oped/?source=em230718-2-f&refcode2=823.734936.2cFKdw&t=1&akid=823%2E734936%2E2cFKdw)
[**You can read it here: “Ruben Gallego: Tommy Tuberville’s military stunt endangers national security.”](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_tub_oped/?source=em230718-2-f&refcode2=823.734936.2cFKdw&t=2&akid=823%2E734936%2E2cFKdw)**
[READ RUBEN’S OP-ED](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_tub_oped/?source=em230718-2-f&refcode2=823.734936.2cFKdw&t=3&akid=823%2E734936%2E2cFKdw)
Here’s an excerpt:
_This man’s closest run-in with our armed forces was losing the 2014 Military Bowl. Now he not only wants to tell women in the military what they can and cannot do with their bodies, but he’s also willing to put them, their peers and our entire country in danger because of it._
It’s a good reminder of why we’re all here: Getting the right people elected to the Senate, for the right reasons. People like Ruben.
Thank you for your support,
Ruben Gallego for Arizona
* * *

**☀️ Hi! Please don’t click away just yet. 🌵**

After our push at mid-month, we made up some of the ground we needed to hit our goals. That’s good news. But now, we have to stay on track. If beating Kyrsten Sinema and keeping Kari Lake out of the Senate sounds worth $20, please make a donation to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today. Thank you in advance. We need this. _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1393?c0=ruben-em-july23.Ygo1xS&refcode=em230718-2-f&t=4&akid=823%2E734936%2E2cFKdw)**
