name: Will Hurd
subject: Cyber, War, AI
body:
3 things that need more attention
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
| _Welcome to The Brief! Common sense takes on current events, national security, and technology and the latest campaign info. It’s designed to make you smarter in less than 5 minutes! If you were forwarded this message, you can get_[ _The Brief here_](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/K6YaOVfkk5ZK7E-7_A_Fwe2LpkJT-1-wltf-I4eJ5g-mcGEnGjibiqPCgIIbmZ4LY3_e9EWSgDxMgf1stX4heIxKglI-iR1yXxl6J_aZdhEsukBI5e7zsyp6PrlVrpVqn7LR9GoO4fSKCXrTRnJIVkxguu_Uoh26csYcAnWCxw4wJcQtDAMj5RG_sIcsfGVr4MuRu2S_7EXSarKekda_kEnLED7pH1VUOFkURi9kM0QH745nvjn8zYQ4NEz_hn6_Xs1dsRJKIkoWpfP-FVg4jHRSZU6ZUv5MOnQNPfQcs_naNWBCU9IHGpEcua905JJzyHbfABqCBG8hc4hHaXo7plwqcFwVbCg) _._
---
| Dear Friends, In the world of international politics, the game of chess continues to evolve. This time, it's not about military might or economic sanctions, but technology.
The recent NATO summit that discussed Ukraine was almost a disaster because they failed to give explicit guidance of how or when Ukraine could join, but a take I shared on socials got some people thinking.
When I was a kid, I never thought I would be involved at the cutting edge of technology, let alone speaking somewhere that 67 years ago set the stage for one of the most important technologies in human history.
Here are 3 things that haven’t gotten proper attention since we last talked.
---
| | [](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/RChix6mEKjlkKdiEuu0IUGUgbdtWO8OR8dcSGtHTUH6snnCgS7FhZzigPUrhqEHdTCFx9z3Tf_Tfk-eH68Lign1VHcuzaJPY2vv3C58ZauAdk0ZkvTAT9IkT2EPSRyJ4hiuc0gHEiUenbRX8Hyanm-lPrdT_KGIrsszMrDhQFvSTw-t_al3L7rRzMgBpc6TdH3DScr-YR1asuAhaCkmfyumeERqKJsOu2pdp7bZkGkug3k-XUHEZqOd6HqjV6has-kNZ5DHvtwjmmuyEdMjCtB2XJn5ue9B-wyUuTxdUyPDx7pL61XnIp7_QcyMKbRTJag5KNtzRIgl4Ju5y1o0G1EaQW9x5Y4Ps_0jUwhehRjmcOhbfUpvDsDlbOv2EY8C2vxoaA_kjuqzqw9ksZv7_jOMo7WnH9m4)
---
---
| | | | |
### 1\. CHINESE CYBER ESPIONAGE: ANOTHER FRONT IN DIPLOMACY
---

|
---
| U.S. Secretary of State Antony Blinken shakes hands with China's Director of the Office of the Central Foreign Affairs Commission Wang Yi at the Diaoyutai State Guesthouse in Beijing, China, June 19, 2023. **Big Picture:** A Chinese [hacking operation breached US government email systems ](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/7wMP46gdMd_tkb_nGQ5H9qqjFM7TEDEtYHx7YijBTcV_jyJI7z4SV9L-3DjUJnvbBcd0vPsFhFGw1lTccN6wdK2UNnp8wa9hb8GPSol_cHJmJ5LH7RSv2Zmt748pKtf3YChuqM2v1XheRn3C4SAuNjN5SlpmxguyG8jVM7JHsqg8IIjTLra5dU2XTPtpqB5cRzE49kCpUS8E6olPOyX05IhiOmK8vB-7e4yiXdLdudmTMGWlyarYB2WRS5EndssuqBUU1fEtjzEDQYn0Ok6XL93qALkCHqxFnsmACPidPlezBgbqRR5JpYb0q23bAttxRilYgBweaQMXtsNgTZWc5Ov0EEfrtv9hEhmNyrj8PEDS4mrBIR5yeYPJtSiLZTy1EgJYzfhK9I4j-dQL1CzvU8fNtJNAoCYsXc6l8O__FQ)giving the Chinese government insights about US thinking heading into Secretary of State Antony Blinken’s trip to Beijing in June.
**Why it Matters** : The hack, discovered by the State Department around the time of Blinken’s visit, underlines the complexities of modern diplomacy. It's a stark reminder that in this digital age, information is power, and those who control it have the upper hand.
* This is not just an espionage issue. By 2025, it’s predicted the global economy will lose $10.5 trillion because of cybercrime.

**The State of Play:** This incident is another example of how our adversaries, especially the Chinese Government, aren't concerned with any negative repercussions from their actions.
* Chinese-linked hackers deployed the most zero-day vulnerabilities in 2022. A zero-day is the most sophisticated kind of cyber attack. China is growing in sophistication and willingness to deploy cyber attacks.

**Go Deeper:** The Biden Administrations hasn’t figured out how to administer consequences to the Chinese antics. At a minimum we need our allies to join us in a collective response.
* Read more about [Why Cybersecurity is Important](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/mKi3shsqX76fW1BdhM6bVDoFnxTKAZbTivIYSGcXqmf6DOGVIsOIdG98hucq4JRQpulJEdvTPmqq2xTOQuoJ70aPr03pqH7zbczSNtRjUF4wFHlnePfu-YKDRJCwmtrG7Kf97RoOzaIMmOEgDv0WB8ZUtKL-IHy6-3V6MsdXYKnacn9WorS97S1PjuZc6poccvDjQlJPDtlK14UrQdv1pdTXAu8dgzf6C1waCJerUCdJUOGnxDbauKsU0XYICLjB2vakjwcciU9sp9h3cXMPAIDYN0V-ECtrTXQgLLRhG9OL-36znNeniZ6s_kB9021eJXsRRKEu3mNLha8vITpUkazfZqdV5qVeG-PBe-Prc1PUEo1lzkClD4WpR20bGw).

---

| | | | |
### 2\. WE WON'T START WORLD WAR III
---

|
---
| **The 1 Big Idea:** We created an international order that has benefited us – not defending it will hurt us.
**Why This Matters:** Nobody wants the Ukraine conflict to become a forever war. The way to prevent this from happening is making sure the Ukrainains have all the equipment and tools to win the war quickly.
* At the cost of merely 5% of U.S. Defense spending and without any American casualties, Ukraine is effectively dismantling the Russian army.

**Bottom-line:** If you want perspectives like this on the Republican Presidential debate stage, help me get 40,000 individual donors by Aug 23. The maximum a person can give me for the entire primary campaign is $3,300, but any amount matters.
* [Click here](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/1xNt6OgW2WfckdYkE4x2NCFHFDClOrc4YzPm1K0tBK12zD9RlPpyYvZksZCrxYZZDmclQeoauUk-KsgzvLwfZsi4xmmZmf6Gp5PtaBQRV8e0yTRlDefGLEaPsCsoNS8_cZNHBbPP-PH3IF-d4QGsKfqpOaDkk5QqTApr4STpGGnpCrSpSBLg94H-xk3-ZtFRxMmvtxY9OObeDqKUIQ8lIMx_MyoeJHxtvA0AIfElSCKY3tRQ0r1RaGoGiwaMD_edXrZQLX8vPJ95T4KuVArFwDTEV0kOiTrK1tdYRaprZNf7OKnNl7pwV8ExO7srh_JxrF9Yi2NkNY9mohcPqd1CgIdRqs4UCXKfdftDgq9Mo4WJIMu2n4hD4bBD9oj0zQpYhzglNkwMtYdwDtQd-onM2tXQKfE8-j3ofRMjuDAV5Yj1Q1PDR2oIQA8vgMmIjFVReqnjuqq9lPXRgD-BAaj8U2G-6Ms0PmxYKPN0Gr1Yx-lnDsqvax9PSk-Z24T7KzLjdWFtiHWJBNNu-SgaBCUqpz6ydLPp6w8) to help us talk to more people and qualify for the debate stage. Even donating $1 helps!

---

| | | | |
### 3\. 67 YEARS LATER
---

|
---
| Photo: Aerial image of Dartmouth College in Hanover, NH
**Big Picture:** This Thursday, July 20th I will be back in New Hampshire visiting the Rockefeller Center at Dartmouth University speaking at their "Path to the Presidency'' forum. The discussion will focus on a range of topics, but will be heavy on AI.
* Dartmouth College is important to AI because it was the site of the Dartmouth Workshop in 1956, where the term "artificial intelligence" was first used. The workshop brought together a group of researchers from different fields to discuss the possibility of creating machines that could think like humans.

**Bottom Line:** I plan on announcing some of the things I would be doing on Day One when it comes to Artificial Intelligence. You can [watch the livestream here](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/yvqJgNPpDPfM_TPQgDlcs0qR_kE50l7mkcG6cQ4i1OL3QipM7hROnHY0cCdqlsSj7IeZ05juwcHovIrzo1yqOu0XiVInXvPDE2MuEYP69f3FtsCX2spYVQK2127WhvAiKgF7wb9msKGoB_iPTHQUTnwfpO0UDzq7e2HXrS5TzrFdyYU0EVWaiuJFw6NamQWbVsJ42usGQ1iBoLwKpUZF__AH9q5PujSf0Zrpw09eRJY8DLAU4bqibZx50TJivnNbjJqeEPnMt8YuIT2mRwuCAKQlOHmaxliR-C8fIbrIY90OLn43rVDmmk95wUvHmkQjQ-LZcdtHWS2QLYMudJTJbO8KLqV8D3HnOTBlyS62p7I44A).

---

| Thanks for subscribing and reading all the way to the end, I really appreciate you.
If you have 30 seconds, I need your help to double the number of our subscribers to The Brief. Please forward this to two friends that you think would enjoy or benefit from it.
God bless America and don’t forget to donate today! Thank you!

Will Hurd

clean_body: 3 things that need more attention | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Welcome to The Brief! Common sense takes on current events, national security, and technology and the latest campaign info. It’s designed to make you smarter in less than 5 minutes! If you were forwarded this message, you can get . | Dear Friends, In the world of international politics, the game of chess continues to evolve. This time, it's not about military might or economic sanctions, but technology. The recent NATO summit that discussed Ukraine was almost a disaster because they failed to give explicit guidance of how or when Ukraine could join, but a take I shared on socials got some people thinking. When I was a kid, I never thought I would be involved at the cutting edge of technology, let alone speaking somewhere that 67 years ago set the stage for one of the most important technologies in human history. Here are 3 things that haven’t gotten proper attention since we last talked. | | | | | | | 1\. CHINESE CYBER ESPIONAGE: ANOTHER FRONT IN DIPLOMACY | | U.S. Secretary of State Antony Blinken shakes hands with China's Director of the Office of the Central Foreign Affairs Commission Wang Yi at the Diaoyutai State Guesthouse in Beijing, China, June 19, 2023. Big Picture: A Chinese the Chinese government insights about US thinking heading into Secretary of State Antony Blinken’s trip to Beijing in June. Why it Matters : The hack, discovered by the State Department around the time of Blinken’s visit, underlines the complexities of modern diplomacy. It's a stark reminder that in this digital age, information is power, and those who control it have the upper hand. This is not just an espionage issue. By 2025, it’s predicted the global economy will lose $10.5 trillion because of cybercrime. The State of Play: This incident is another example of how our adversaries, especially the Chinese Government, aren't concerned with any negative repercussions from their actions. Chinese-linked hackers deployed the most zero-day vulnerabilities in 2022. A zero-day is the most sophisticated kind of cyber attack. China is growing in sophistication and willingness to deploy cyber attacks. Go Deeper: The Biden Administrations hasn’t figured out how to administer consequences to the Chinese antics. At a minimum we need our allies to join us in a collective response. Read more about . | | | | | 2\. WE WON'T START WORLD WAR III | | The 1 Big Idea: We created an international order that has benefited us – not defending it will hurt us. Why This Matters: Nobody wants the Ukraine conflict to become a forever war. The way to prevent this from happening is making sure the Ukrainains have all the equipment and tools to win the war quickly. At the cost of merely 5% of U.S. Defense spending and without any American casualties, Ukraine is effectively dismantling the Russian army. Bottom-line: If you want perspectives like this on the Republican Presidential debate stage, help me get 40,000 individual donors by Aug 23. The maximum a person can give me for the entire primary campaign is $3,300, but any amount matters. to help us talk to more people and qualify for the debate stage. Even donating $1 helps! | | | | | 3\. 67 YEARS LATER | | Photo: Aerial image of Dartmouth College in Hanover, NH Big Picture: This Thursday, July 20th I will be back in New Hampshire visiting the Rockefeller Center at Dartmouth University speaking at their "Path to the Presidency'' forum. The discussion will focus on a range of topics, but will be heavy on AI. Dartmouth College is important to AI because it was the site of the Dartmouth Workshop in 1956, where the term "artificial intelligence" was first used. The workshop brought together a group of researchers from different fields to discuss the possibility of creating machines that could think like humans. Bottom Line: I plan on announcing some of the things I would be doing on Day One when it comes to Artificial Intelligence. You can . | Thanks for subscribing and reading all the way to the end, I really appreciate you. If you have 30 seconds, I need your help to double the number of our subscribers to The Brief. Please forward this to two friends that you think would enjoy or benefit from it. God bless America and don’t forget to donate today! Thank you! Will Hurd | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | You are receiving this email because you signed up for The Brief by Will Hurd. If you need to remove yourself from our email list . body:

Peter,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e541d8592b614a57a883aceac62ed963&_e=UP2WOlxHbnyglV7FYXvu-82txMLSr-aXGJlQ0jGKJ9ZgQFFWYst0sfEyZZzOWAhRkkkViNBBCATjdMCfN2UDVv1_bHYiHhli_cu5NyEMD1dlkTCRTiVV-Hw2QxCngX4ALyHIScERigpRmqjxS-r4PQKqwrQ_OMjzi-SilfbkJpjHtqI1JdQ17JTtaTQMICfyNnV8__TmgPbeJb-wjnJOd_biEIB252qqdbZDcynIHkGUH6ETjrb3EA6Ifw2OxhvH5GytqkirtgyCfcwK8XPRVEM_1Ht8cFT0rOrIM5NYd2XKXQmlMkY_DrbiFRf68iSnLaTzVSvF38T9clcXBhcUpJJ_T9VWqa0IPrYvqTCperT7AweLwJMHbjTH4npXJB9mueTtFGbt7Nn4fUzgVXZXIg%3D%3D)

Peter, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[**ENDORSE FMR. NAVY SEAL TIM SHEEHY FOR U.S. SENATE** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e541d8592b614a57a883aceac62ed963&_e=UP2WOlxHbnyglV7FYXvu-82txMLSr-aXGJlQ0jGKJ9ZgQFFWYst0sfEyZZzOWAhRkkkViNBBCATjdMCfN2UDVv1_bHYiHhli_cu5NyEMD1dlkTCRTiVV-Hw2QxCngX4ALyHIScERigpRmqjxS-r4PQKqwrQ_OMjzi-SilfbkJpjHtqI1JdQ17JTtaTQMICfyNnV8__TmgPbeJb-wjnJOd_biEIB252qqdbZDcynIHkGUH6ETjrb3EA6Ifw2OxhvH_xlETv2t_nfi1ACgBvZdGbboNUsfNBVb5BFmtECPStHWspF55YStSOo211WffKUn6etz4-B5M7Rdw-dxgjPJ9Zy50YDOxKF0W-IPEt5ZJRMo4UENWa2FHGupcOF-UrINmbullbJrgJpcKfp3wNo7lQ%3D%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e541d8592b614a57a883aceac62ed963&_e=UP2WOlxHbnyglV7FYXvu-82txMLSr-aXGJlQ0jGKJ9ZgQFFWYst0sfEyZZzOWAhRkkkViNBBCATjdMCfN2UDVv1_bHYiHhli_cu5NyEMD1dlkTCRTiVV-Hw2QxCngX4ALyHIScERigpRmqjxS-r4PQKqwrQ_OMjzi-SilfbkJpjHtqI1JdQ17JTtaTQMICfyNnV8__TmgPbeJb-wjnJOd_biEIB252qqdbZDcynIHkGUH6ETjrb3EA6Ifw2OxhvH5vz2z84nlxfhoMqpBV9mhWfTjHjNU0ZLGY7h22HK_8NFJK8nj86J8F905LYMvf_TvHZw-xS-yjTbvcRHQbioCoDnWNBtktcI1H4-MHHWa90ELW2VhJxxTqwKpXtPfxJ_5O-UHtAchgoCfzt5QRE-rQ%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e541d8592b614a57a883aceac62ed963&_e=UP2WOlxHbnyglV7FYXvu-82txMLSr-aXGJlQ0jGKJ9ZgQFFWYst0sfEyZZzOWAhRkkkViNBBCATjdMCfN2UDVv1_bHYiHhli_cu5NyEMD1dlkTCRTiVV-Hw2QxCngX4ALyHIScERigpRmqjxS-r4PQKqwrQ_OMjzi-SilfbkJpjHtqI1JdQ17JTtaTQMICfyNnV8__TmgPbeJb-wjnJOd_biEIB252qqdbZDcynIHkGUH6ETjrb3EA6Ifw2OxhvHuNk3Jluc1ooHmQX6DUPeB9oa-JKSYlv-hB-8MT3n6QghLtdCbEw67Zupu4b3f-ZcwEd-T7MFZNGdlCq_hDLyaA7qm2KvS4JEcaM4tQgxxW1d6730Z79zt8xaHs9kPo0lVCzVibET8v2n4o2yU7xm-g%3D%3D)

Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington, Peter. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e541d8592b614a57a883aceac62ed963&_e=UP2WOlxHbnyglV7FYXvu-82txMLSr-aXGJlQ0jGKJ9ZgQFFWYst0sfEyZZzOWAhRkkkViNBBCATjdMCfN2UDVv1_bHYiHhli_cu5NyEMD1dlkTCRTiVV-Hw2QxCngX4ALyHIScERigpRmqjxS-r4PQKqwrQ_OMjzi-SilfbkJpjHtqI1JdQ17JTtaTQMICfyNnV8__TmgPbeJb-wjnJOd_biEIB252qqdbZDcynIHkGUH6ETjrb3EA6Ifw2OxhvHyr79g2PZD0OvGt6V354HaSMx2-M9hAULyzo1xgXQNjUtTOEyjsJtkgMsOKAXtwnCVApgyQBxSb5GOkwWzkibpBRS27_PXoK3-m7sqsLMEna_ExQq8yc8lj4k40Z5HzrDM4jFng0z7g5wJwJZULp99Q%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e541d8592b614a57a883aceac62ed963&_e=UP2WOlxHbnyglV7FYXvu-82txMLSr-aXGJlQ0jGKJ9ZgQFFWYst0sfEyZZzOWAhRkkkViNBBCATjdMCfN2UDVv1_bHYiHhli_cu5NyEMD1dlkTCRTiVV-Hw2QxCngX4ALyHIScERigpRmqjxS-r4PQKqwrQ_OMjzi-SilfbkJpjHtqI1JdQ17JTtaTQMICfyNnV8__TmgPbeJb-wjnJOd_biEIB252qqdbZDcynIHkGUH6ETjrb3EA6Ifw2OxhvHLp_eo3_REL1zGlq-R4OMk5jiclQuIL9vJgxkEIuJ4rnqJVuuETXgC2N4zOfG7533Rre-v80QrlLvRdheMqaWt2Ssmsbb5rvF_Mblq3-IXenHPAlr6m1GU2ocIRjAU-0smq2fM3CriftSJChIG9KY6Q%3D%3D)

Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, **I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list.** The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election.

_***If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play.***_

This is my most critical mission to date, and [**I am counting on you to enlist in the fight, Peter.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e541d8592b614a57a883aceac62ed963&_e=UP2WOlxHbnyglV7FYXvu-82txMLSr-aXGJlQ0jGKJ9ZgQFFWYst0sfEyZZzOWAhRkkkViNBBCATjdMCfN2UDVv1_bHYiHhli_cu5NyEMD1dlkTCRTiVV-Hw2QxCngX4ALyHIScERigpRmqjxS-r4PQKqwrQ_OMjzi-SilfbkJpjHtqI1JdQ17JTtaTQMICfyNnV8__TmgPbeJb-wjnJOd_biEIB252qqdbZDcynIHkGUH6ETjrb3EA6Ifw2OxhvHWi5qv1o5hRgNj5B5c_RGDRHt8YnMml_cWwPhpkCnN7pU0CF-ytodfzBp6aOhAmJdeDCeLQSHkh2R7zZAXGFjP4nZfDeAWMVHcVnh4nQUIaiybe7bWirMCD79eM6H-Zgxh902JW4PT-k1Itvxb1sEpA%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e541d8592b614a57a883aceac62ed963&_e=UP2WOlxHbnyglV7FYXvu-82txMLSr-aXGJlQ0jGKJ9ZgQFFWYst0sfEyZZzOWAhRkkkViNBBCATjdMCfN2UDVv1_bHYiHhli_cu5NyEMD1dlkTCRTiVV-Hw2QxCngX4ALyHIScERigpRmqjxS-r4PQKqwrQ_OMjzi-SilfbkJpjHtqI1JdQ17JTtaTQMICfyNnV8__TmgPbeJb-wjnJOd_biEIB252qqdbZDcynIHkGUH6ETjrb3EA6Ifw2OxhvH5B0pxZucIlWoQuCwM9xMEDk9VGjogFxMSVKBrsbTsawFTKpmBCkw6yzAdRvHMeCQ2TNR-kRp3JbG4uE_ubAexhO2MWDB99Dywaul50F1E7vCqjU3pyz62eBo5jWyoA_xmMRUGGwgVQQCznel12m0Iw%3D%3D)

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

In the latest polling for the 2024 Michigan Senate race, Rep. **Elissa Slotkin** holds a _**very small lead**_ over her likely Republican opponent. But the most interesting — and important — finding is that **20% of voters are still undecided** in this race. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66692730/417229728/-100368209?sourceid=1051480&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTBjNzlhOS1iNjI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T8PHLj2CKyCqg_OwP9Z74zOVgPlSI7LdevEYTy6yN8U=&emci=7735a5cc-b225-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4a0c79a9-b625-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) When we hear a figure like that, our game plan is clear: we've got to spend the next 15 months reaching every single one of those undecided voters and persuading them to protect reproductive rights and support Elissa Slotkin. **Our Senate majority (not to mention our right to bodily autonomy) depends on it.**

What does that kind of outreach look like? It looks like a robust, well-staffed field program; it looks like a strong digital presence across every platform; it looks like effective and frequent TV ads in every corner of the state. | | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66692893/417230355/-1059434890?source=2023AffirmativeAction_EA&referrer=group-emerge-america-2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Femerge2023-ja%3Frefcode%3Djtk1261-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM1NDc0MzIzLWI3MjUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uYxALsUub7jSbby3AOcBRkP65OMl3XYh0ef8TIthpi0=&emci=d772e07b-d224-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=35474323-b725-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)
---
Peter, we are an increasingly diverse and multicultural nation – and that's something that should be celebrated and protected at all costs. But in a devastating blow, the conservative Supreme Court has single-handedly destroyed one of our most effective inclusivity policies: affirmative action.
Affirmative action has been instrumental in creating diverse leadership. That's why Emerge is committed to recruiting and training Democratic women who will fight to protect progressive policies and ensure our colleges and universities remain diverse and inclusive – we’ve partnered with the Daily Kos and we're calling on you to join us.
**We need 10,000 people to sign our joint petition with the Daily Kos and join the fight for affirmative action, so please:[Add your name to our petition now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66692894/417230356/-1059434890?source=2023AffirmativeAction_EA&referrer=group-emerge-america-2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Femerge2023-ja%3Frefcode%3Djtk1261-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM1NDc0MzIzLWI3MjUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uYxALsUub7jSbby3AOcBRkP65OMl3XYh0ef8TIthpi0=&emci=d772e07b-d224-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=35474323-b725-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66692895/417230357/-1059434890?source=2023AffirmativeAction_EA&referrer=group-emerge-america-2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Femerge2023-ja%3Frefcode%3Djtk1261-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM1NDc0MzIzLWI3MjUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uYxALsUub7jSbby3AOcBRkP65OMl3XYh0ef8TIthpi0=&emci=d772e07b-d224-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=35474323-b725-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)
---
**Everyone, regardless of race, gender, or national origin, should have an equal opportunity to succeed – and affirmative action got us one step closer to achieving that goal.**
But from the beginning, the far-right was eager to see this policy overturned – because they have always despised attempts to level the playing field. And now, after 60 years of attacks rooted in right-wing disinformation, conservatives finally got their way and brought about the end to affirmative action.
The loss of affirmative action is devastating to say the least – but this isn't the end. We refuse to let our nation slip back into a less inclusive and less equitable society – and that's why we're fighting to protect policies that ensure access to opportunity for ALL - not just the wealthy.
**Peter, we're counting on you to be one of the 10,000 signatures we need on our joint petition before the deadline.[So please, will you add your name now to take a stand with us and protect affirmative action?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66692896/417230358/-1059434890?source=2023AffirmativeAction_EA&referrer=group-emerge-america-2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Femerge2023-ja%3Frefcode%3Djtk1261-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM1NDc0MzIzLWI3MjUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uYxALsUub7jSbby3AOcBRkP65OMl3XYh0ef8TIthpi0=&emci=d772e07b-d224-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=35474323-b725-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**
Thank you for being part of this movement,
Team Emerge

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: Layoffs at Justice Democrats.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We’ve been emailing about how bad our financial situation is a lot. And it
has meant the world how much you all have stepped up to support us during
this difficult time.

But I need to address the elephant in the room. We keep sending these
emails because the situation is dire. Last week, we had to lay off nine of
our twenty members of staff.

Justice Democrats is at a crossroads as an organization. What we raise in
the coming weeks and months will set the trajectory of how we show up and
what we can accomplish this cycle.

I want to be clear as Executive Director that I made the most responsible
decision that honors our work, the staff, and stakeholders like you. Our
work and the mission this organization set out with is so much bigger than
any one person, and our decision-making is rooted in what is best for our
strategy and mission.

I, and our entire team, don’t want to exist as an organization just to
exist.

There are plenty of progressive groups doing great work. But we want to
keep going because we believe our work is uniquely important in the
progressive ecosystem with our laser focus on primaries and holding
federal democratic leadership accountable when they don’t deliver.

Our work since 2018 has and is actively transforming the political
landscape to make the progressive vision we all fight for possible.

And we haven’t changed to fit the political landscape, the landscape has
changed to make room for us. And with very little money over these last
five years, we couldn’t be more proud of this fact.

We talk a lot about AOC — as we should because her impact in transforming
Congress and successfully pressuring our federal government to better
fight for poor and working people has been pivotal since she has entered
office — but there is so much that has happened since.

Our work is only possible because of our grassroots supporters. I truly
mean that.

Thank you so much for being a part of our movement to challenge the entire
political establishment and elect more progressive change-makers.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136062?refcode=em20230718-29959&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=29959%2E1203867%2Ekp1v9N ]→ Will you now dig deep and make your first contribution of
$3 right now to support our critical work?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136062?refcode=em20230718-29959&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=29959%2E1203867%2Ekp1v9N ]Donate $3

Over these next few weeks — we want our story and impact to be clear: we
have punched above our weight and none of it would have been possible
without our staff and the thousands of everyday people who dared to
believe and fight back with us even though the odds have always been
stacked against us.

There is so much to be proud of despite this sad moment, and it is the
honor of my life to be a part of this work with my staff and all of you.

Thank you all again. In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=29959%2E1203867%2Ekp1v9N ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=29959%2E1203867%2Ekp1v9N ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230718-29959-footer&t=1024&refcode2=29959_1203867_kp1v9N&akid=29959%2E1203867%2Ekp1v9N

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=29959%2E1203867%2Ekp1v9N

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: Background on email revealing Hunter Biden agreement with Burisma in Ukraine [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] Burisma Exec Discussed Expectations of ‘High-Ranking US Officials in Ukraine’ with Hunter Biden [] Source: Breitbart [] One month before Vice President Joe Biden visited Ukraine in 2015, Hunter Biden received an email from Vadym Pozharskyi, a Burisma executive, about his “ultimate purpose” of working with Hunter Biden: to shut down any cases/pursuits against Mykola Zlochevsky, a former Ukrainian minister and founder of Burisma Holdings. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2023-06-28 Judicial Watch Sues for FBI Document Alleging Bidens’ Bribery Scheme with Burisma Owner [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit against the Department of Justice for a copy of the Federal Bureau of Investigation document that describes “an alleged criminal scheme involving then-Vice President Biden and a foreign national relating to the exchange of money for policy decisions.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] 2023-06-20 The Sweetheart Plea Deal with Hunter Biden [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: "This is a miscarriage of justice whose chief beneficiary is President Biden. For far too long, Biden has avoided any serious investigation of his involvement in Hunter’s corrupt foreign business dealings. The plea deal, which doesn’t address the strong evidence of Biden family racketeering, is a sham." [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] 2020-12-10 Judicial Watch Obtains Emails Showing Impeachment Star Witness Yovanovitch Warning about Burisma Corruption [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch received 210 pages of records from the State Department showing that former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie “Masha” Yovanovitch had specifically warned in 2017 about corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings. Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. name: John Fetterman
subject: Hot labor summer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I'm in the Senate to support workers in PA + everywhere.
#
Derek, I've said it before and I'll say it again: My commitment to the union way of life is absolute.
**I will always stand with all of the union workers in Pennsylvania, even when others turn their backs on them.**
**[I'm in the Senate to support workers in PA + everywhere. If you're with me, chip in any amount to power that important work today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230718-1?refcode=em20230718-1-8467&refcode2=8467_434096_gnSoW_&akid=8467%2E434096%2EgnSoW_)**
We are in an exciting time for workers' rights, from the unionization of coffee shops across the country (including a number of Starbucks stores across PA), to the highly visible SAG-AFTRA, WGA, and potential Teamsters strikes for fair contracts, to increased support for a much-needed minimum wage increase.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49713?refcode=em20230718-8467&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8467%2E434096%2EgnSoW_)
_Me + some union members in Philly last weekend!_
But we are also facing unprecedented attacks on workers + the right to form a union. The Supreme Court keeps finding new ways to curtail workers' rights to organize and unions' rights to assert their power, including in last month's _Glacier Northwest v. Teamsters_ decision.
**We must support our unions and pass the PRO Act -- a crucial piece of legislation to put power back into the hands of workers, strengthen our unions, and expand the union way of life for all workers across America. **
**[If you can today, please consider chipping in to support our work so I can keep advocating for the union way of life and fighting for working families in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230718-1?refcode=em20230718-1-8467&refcode2=8467_434096_gnSoW_&akid=8467%2E434096%2EgnSoW_)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230718-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230718-8467&refcode2=8467_434096_gnSoW_&akid=8467%2E434096%2EgnSoW_)**
Solidarity forever, Derek. ✊
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230718-8467-footer&t=2&refcode2=8467_434096_gnSoW_&akid=8467%2E434096%2EgnSoW_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=3&akid=8467%2E434096%2EgnSoW_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=8467%2E434096%2EgnSoW_)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: three-part plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
In these upcoming months, we need your help more than ever.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66693301/417231723/1237824078?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230718-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjYwODY0MS1iODI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvECmN3Woomlk56_GUH9xyEKd4rn39qdtqUJbLi8W1o=)

| Hi there,

Data has shown that year-round, early organizing is what makes the difference between winning and losing campaigns. The proof is in MI-03.

When I started organizing during my first campaign, NO ONE thought we could flip this seat. Now, here I am as the first woman in history, and the first Democrat in 50 years to represent West Michigan in Congress. We delivered a majority Democratic Michigan Congressional delegation, and held Republicans to a narrow, 5 seat majority.

Want more? Then it’s time to organize, to spread the message of our people-powered movement and ensure we have the necessary resources to win big in 2024. We’ve got a three-part plan to make it happen.

**Part one of our plan is to communicate our message.** We have devised a comprehensive strategy to reach every corner of our district, ensuring that our message of progress, unity, and opportunity resonates with voters far and wide.

**Part two is organizing.** Our campaign has assembled a dedicated team of volunteers and staff passionate about our mission. We are investing in data-driven strategies that will allow us to identify potential supporters, mobilize our grassroots network, and turn out voters on election day.

**Part three is ensuring we have all the necessary supplies to win.** Our campaign is stocking up on supplies to ensure we have the resources needed to succeed. Whether it's campaign materials, literature, or the tools required to equip our volunteers, we are meticulously preparing for the election year. [_**In these upcoming months, we need your help more than ever. Can we count on your continued support to ensure our campaign has the necessary resources to execute our 3 part plan? No matter the size, every contribution makes a significant difference and brings us one step closer to victory.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66693302/417231725/1237824078?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230718-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjYwODY0MS1iODI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvECmN3Woomlk56_GUH9xyEKd4rn39qdtqUJbLi8W1o=)

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Will you chip in $3 to help me reach a voter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
At more than 113,000 square miles, I have a lot of ground to cover as I work to meet every Republican that I can
[Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=8e690177cf9249308ce21edd56d236e7&_t=kY5fwYyFWMMTFvfwW7jKrWfUo_5mZ_cmvgdlNMWmyWcSvGiKRTLDOlYm5kPWx3G7K8fukgmZZ1mODMz77DUF8Ou54eCF2Hi4FOBKaT71Xt8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=8e690177cf9249308ce21edd56d236e7&_t=kY5fwYyFWMMTFvfwW7jKrWfUo_5mZ_cmvgdlNMWmyWcSvGiKRTLDOlYm5kPWx3G7K8fukgmZZ1mODMz77DUF8Ou54eCF2Hi4FOBKaT71Xt8%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e690177cf9249308ce21edd56d236e7&_e=LugxmIoHuDMdIFny3ex23uR5xhk1DO69pEtYkENsOKBIXCJn3ScgpvmL1Yvi0A5UWBv67lod58j-HHOOsXRdMSsu_F9-zvascAPRIJDlkLVlhpWHbc_Aw1jiDqq0mFJuRtB9s6t4w4wuzB-MK1ksAN_2jb3IdudzxsAZpSztvUtVZ6WeKBzJ4dxFJpY0kAjXe5_oQLjNidWZeTQBH4g5hV-Bcew9oj437UyxNDuji-mGU3sj5mFJryvjPTnSEqck69qvvIdt6QXfBEQOu2g1r8MpHygeqYizwZMNJHvz6bSrQuLf-yYIav-dLOVj-tU3mMcIuyMuWHTPop9-5t2pZX1m4Ju8Z08v0KCOGddkGh-q27uQ97L0Uk_fmu3yYNnnE2yp_BmyBr9b3osPAHNOl_eEn5bI-CaSvJ95rtd06A8%3D)
|

Fellow American,

Since John McCain’s passing in 2018, Arizona has been in political turmoil. We’ve had two high-profile Senate elections in the past 4 years with** more than $340 MILLION **spent to persuade voters to cast their ballot for a particular candidate.

**As Sheriff of Arizona’s 3rd largest county,** I can only dream of what me and my team of deputies would be able to do with $340 million. I’ll tell you this: _**there would be no illegal immigrants on the loose in the entire county I’m responsible for protecting.**
_
Unfortunately, the days of raising - and spending - massive sums of money to win a Senate seat are here to stay. I knew that when I got into the race, but it doesn’t mean I like it. But in my mind’s eye, **the endless hours we’ll spend fundraising to build my profile are worth it**. The Democrats I’m running against are as progressive as they come and completely out of touch with the average American voter.

Unfortunately for me, **campaign cash comes easier for Democrats**. In the first quarter of the year, my opponents raised more than $5 million between them. **If I’m ever going to build out the public profile I’ll need to run a competitive race against them, I’m going to have to raise some serious cash.**

I know that with all the presidential contenders asking you for cash, not to mention every congressional candidate from here to Timbuktu, you must be picky with who you choose to donate to. **[I’m humbly requesting you take a chance on me today, Fellow American.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e690177cf9249308ce21edd56d236e7&_e=LugxmIoHuDMdIFny3ex23uR5xhk1DO69pEtYkENsOKBIXCJn3ScgpvmL1Yvi0A5UWBv67lod58j-HHOOsXRdMSsu_F9-zvascAPRIJDlkLVlhpWHbc_Aw1jiDqq0mFJuRtB9s6t4w4wuzB-MK1ksAN_2jb3IdudzxsAZpSztvUtVZ6WeKBzJ4dxFJpY0kAjXe5_oQLjNidWZeTQBH4g5hV-Bcew9oj437UyxNDuji-mGU3sj5mFJryvjPTnSEqck69qvvIdt6QXfBEQOu2g1rxEGGkDUC6GORCSBfLm-uEifbeWJ2NmUCqJfrmf07DQc9P3EnWl0RHnBCoktPwfe28qe51JT78vHnCKlyUld_OEz0ain9GizFoxKBx0MNyCdNZefbtKKWhJBfPshauYVSrBug_OATcQ9ky9EJLTd_5c%3D)**

[**BUY US A GALLON OF GAS
CHIP IN $3.50 **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e690177cf9249308ce21edd56d236e7&_e=LugxmIoHuDMdIFny3ex23uR5xhk1DO69pEtYkENsOKBIXCJn3ScgpvmL1Yvi0A5UWBv67lod58j-HHOOsXRdMSsu_F9-zvascAPRIJDlkLVlhpWHbc_Aw1jiDqq0mFJuRtB9s6t4w4wuzB-MK1ksAN_2jb3IdudzxsAZpSztvUtVZ6WeKBzJ4dxFJpY0kAjXe5_oQLjNidWZeTQBH4g5hV-Bcew9oj437UyxNDuji-mGU3sj5mFJryvjPTnSEqck69qvvIdt6QXfBEQOu2g1r1g1C3RwqzM-UKW7Nb-dpuP5XIAsOHxb79eQQoi-rc1Pa4ij11FVvtZG6_K-RAq8STJZLmOeshfiIpgO7I52iqP0bbNnsFKwYttUjtPfZpD_8dXwaddjYzzteWVWYMftZJawSBDx8_Hvl85KQW6o5tw%3D)

**At more than 113,000 square miles, Arizona is a big state.** We need to meet as many folks as we can, which means spending tons of money on gas, hotels, and renting out event spaces. clean_body: At more than 113,000 square miles, I have a lot of ground to cover as I work to meet every Republican that I can | | Fellow American, Since John McCain’s passing in 2018, Arizona has been in political turmoil. We’ve had two high-profile Senate elections in the past 4 years with more than $340 MILLION spent to persuade voters to cast their ballot for a particular candidate. As Sheriff of Arizona’s 3rd largest county, I can only dream of what me and my team of deputies would be able to do with $340 million. I’ll tell you this: there would be no illegal immigrants on the loose in the entire county I’m responsible for protecting. Unfortunately, the days of raising - and spending - massive sums of money to win a Senate seat are here to stay. I knew that when I got into the race, but it doesn’t mean I like it. But in my mind’s eye, the endless hours we’ll spend fundraising to build my profile are worth it. The Democrats I’m running against are as progressive as they come and completely out of touch with the average American voter. Unfortunately for me, campaign cash comes easier for Democrats. In the first quarter of the year, my opponents raised more than $5 million between them. If I’m ever going to build out the public profile I’ll need to run a competitive race against them, I’m going to have to raise some serious cash. I know that with all the presidential contenders asking you for cash, not to mention every congressional candidate from here to Timbuktu, you must be picky with who you choose to donate to. At more than 113,000 square miles, Arizona is a big state. We need to meet as many folks as we can, which means spending tons of money on gas, hotels, and renting out event spaces. If possible, With respect, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. clean_body: | Friend - Democrats are coming for Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas once again. This time not only calling for Thomas 's impeachment but also comparing him to a "House Slave". | Democrats HATE seeing a successful black man think for himself. If we don't stop them, they will continue to attack Justice Thomas until they expand the court and have an open lane to push their radical left agenda. These racially charged rants are becoming commonplace for the Radical Left. This is a new low, with the Minnesota Attorney General comparing Justice Clarence Thomas to the house slave in "Django Unchained" and calling for his impeachment following the Court's affirmative action ruling. The news of attacks on Justice Thomas did not stop there. Over the weekend, we learned that House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries wrote a college op-ed slamming Clarence Thomas. We must show Justice Thomas that America First Conservatives stand with him and will never stop fighting to defeat the Radical Left. These attacks are out of control. Thanks for joining us. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Jim Hightower, Our Revolution Board Member
subject: Don’t miss this message!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| Peter Willis,

You don’t stay a progressive in Texas long without getting a little cynical about our chances and I’m telling you–we have a real shot in 2024.

But we won’t get far if we can’t sock away a little money now to spend next year. We’re going up against serious dark money and corporate interests willing to do whatever it takes to keep the status quo intact.

It’s our job to make sure they lose, and we need your help. **[Aaron’s note below lays out all the important work Our Revolution is doing. Can you kick in a few bucks today, and each month, to help us?](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8929?t=8&akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV)** Some days, I can’t believe how far we’ve come. Nowadays, we hear everyone from the President to my local dogcatcher talking about a living wage, the climate crisis, and student debt. We’ve altered the political landscape and our progressive army is growing, but we have real work to do.

"Change" isn’t just a noun, it's an action verb, and Our Revolution helps make it happen! We need to be so big that we can’t be ignored. That’s where you come in. **[Click here to become a movement builder and help us make 2024 a turning point in our revolution.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8929?t=9&akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV)**

Onward and upward,

Jim Hightower
Our Revolution Board Member _\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Aaron Chappell, Our Revolution Political Director _
_Date: Wed, Jul 12, 2023_
_Subject: what’s in store for 2024_ _[](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8929?t=10&akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV)_ Peter Willis,

**ONE THOUSAND.**

That’s how many progressives Our Revolution has helped elect to public office since Bernie Sanders gave us our mission in 2016.

Our voter mobilization strategy has been **battle-tested against billionaire SuperPACs** , and as political director here at Our Revolution, I’m proud to say we have a **proven record of winning** 2 out of 3 races where we’ve endorsed.

While the 2024 presidential race is taking center stage in the media, we’re getting a jumpstart on making sure progressives pick up more House and Senate seats by replacing corporatists like Kyrsten Sinema.

**[Seat by seat, we’re in the fight to build progressive power over the long haul. We know how to win tough races, but we need your support to go up against Big Money. Help us gear up for 2024 right now with a recurring donation of just $5 or $10 a month.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8929?t=11&akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV)** Our goals for 2024:
* **Grow the Congressional Progressive Caucus -** This is key to our strategy. Having a bigger, more disciplined voting bloc in the House means the difference between advancing our progressive priorities and blocking pro-corporate legislation. Last year, we added 9 new progressives - like Greg Casar - to the CPC, and we’re already getting a head start on 2024 by endorsing climate activist Aaron Regunberg for an open Congressional seat from Rhode Island.

* **Grow progressive power in the Senate -** Last year we helped elect John Fetterman and Raphael Warnock to join Bernie in the Senate, and in 2024 we’re planning to put more progressives on deck to fill seats vacated by Diane Feinstein and others.

* **Hold the Democratic establishment accountable -** By fielding as many progressives as possible in primaries for Congress, we can counter the Democrats who are already moving to the middle and abandoning popular progressive policies.

[**Grow our war chest and help us run the grassroots-powered political campaigns that progressive candidates need to win. An effective phone bank operation can cost more than $1000 a day, and we want to be ready and resourced for the Big Money battles ahead.**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8929?t=12&akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV)

In addition to federal races, we’re also going to continue expanding progressive power at the local level. In 2023, we elected former teacher and union leader Brandon Johnson as mayor of Chicago, and we helped Our Revolution board member Megan Green build a progressive governing majority in St. Louis to advance her agenda as president of the Board of Aldermen.

[**We’re building progressive voting blocs at every level of government so we can win on the issues that matter most. We hope you’ll give a recurring donation so we can start organizing right now for ALL the races we must win in 2024.**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8929?t=13&akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV)

Bernie’s unprecedented presidential runs inspired a new generation of progressives to run for office, and Our Revolution has a proven track record of helping good candidates win. We’re now strategically positioned to dramatically expand this work in 2024, and we appreciate your solidarity.

When we organize, we win!

Aaron Chappell
Our Revolution Political Director

---
* * *

[Support Our Revolution →](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230718_FR_recurring_0_3MO_hightower_na_na_recurring&t=1&akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV)
[](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=2&akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV) [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=3&akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV) [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=4&akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV)
---
Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. From city halls to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party and get big money out of politics. **[Help us achieve these goals by donating today.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230718_FR_recurring_0_3MO_hightower_na_na_recurring&t=5&akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV)**

Join our movement by **[following us on Facebook](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=6&akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV)** and **[signing up here.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/738?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230718_FR_recurring_0_3MO_hightower_na_na_recurring&t=7&akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV)**
---

[Click here to unsubscribe from Our Revolution's email list.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4470%2E5885482%2Ed7ndZV)
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
---

From city halls to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party and get big money out of politics. Join our movement by and PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: The GOP wants to force their far-right views onto active-duty service members.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
They’re trying to block funds for those who need to travel to seek abortion care.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66693770/417233747/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230718CH_N_JW_FULL_12_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWZiNjUzMC1iYjI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oF_Ly_vF0rYbMht0EM9Cl1SSitX4LT9TcyRCevIalFg=)

Friend,

On Friday, House Republicans pushed through a defense spending bill that contained outrageous provisions restricting people’s rights — **including an amendment blocking funds for active-duty service members seeking abortion care.**

I stand firmly against Republican efforts to force their far-right views onto our military, and I’ll continue to fight against _any_ anti-choice measures the GOP tries to pass through the budget process.

[**Will you join me and show Republicans that their outrageous political games aren’t going to succeed? Please add your name today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66693771/417233748/1048250687?ms=EM_PET_230718CH_N_JW_FULL_12_NG_N_L3&refcode=EM_PET_230718CH_N_JW_FULL_12_NG_N_L3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWZiNjUzMC1iYjI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oF_Ly_vF0rYbMht0EM9Cl1SSitX4LT9TcyRCevIalFg=&emci=0eb955cf-9025-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cefb6530-bb25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Jennifer

_**— Begin Forwarded Message —**_
> Friend,
>
> You might recall that a few months ago, anti-choice extremists tried to use the judicial system to ban mifepristone (a widely-used abortion drug that’s been available for over _two decades_) across the country — including in states like Virginia where abortion is legal.
>
> They have not let up their efforts. In fact, right now, they are leaning on their allies in Congress to insert bans on mifepristone into budget bills. **Republicans are hoping to game the standard legislative process and sneak through restrictions on the reproductive freedom that millions of Americans still have.**
>
> Jennifer and pro-choice Democrats in Congress want to make it crystal clear: _any budget bill containing abortion restrictions will be met with strong opposition._ But they need your help to do that.
>
> [**So please, will you add your name right now to stand firmly against Republican efforts to pass anti-choice budget bills? We need at least 7,500 signatures this week to make our voices heard.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66693772/417233749/1048250687?ms=EM_PET_230718CH_N_JW_FULL_12_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230718CH_N_JW_FULL_12_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWZiNjUzMC1iYjI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oF_Ly_vF0rYbMht0EM9Cl1SSitX4LT9TcyRCevIalFg=&emci=0eb955cf-9025-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cefb6530-bb25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66693773/417233750/1048250687?ms=EM_PET_230718CH_N_JW_FULL_12_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230718CH_N_JW_FULL_12_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWZiNjUzMC1iYjI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oF_Ly_vF0rYbMht0EM9Cl1SSitX4LT9TcyRCevIalFg=&emci=0eb955cf-9025-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cefb6530-bb25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) For years, Republicans cloaked their opposition to _Roe v. Wade_ as a "state's rights" issue. **They were lying.**
>
> Since _Roe_ was overturned, they've proposed a 15-week national abortion ban in the U.S. Senate. They've encouraged states with abortion bans to restrict people from traveling to states where the right to choose remains legal.
>
> And now, they're inserting anti-choice provisions into unrelated budget bills to try and hold hostage the government funding process.
>
> Together, we’re going to expose their disgusting tactics to the American people – and make it clear that Democrats will hold firm against _any_ legislative effort to restrict reproductive rights.
>
> [**Please join us and add your name today. Every signature sends a message that those in Congress trying to ban mifepristone will face the wrath of voters at the ballot box next year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66693774/417233751/1048250687?ms=EM_PET_230718CH_N_JW_FULL_12_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230718CH_N_JW_FULL_12_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWZiNjUzMC1iYjI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oF_Ly_vF0rYbMht0EM9Cl1SSitX4LT9TcyRCevIalFg=&emci=0eb955cf-9025-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cefb6530-bb25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)
>
> Thanks so much,
>
> Team Wexton
| **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66693775/417233752/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230718CH_N_JW_FULL_12_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWZiNjUzMC1iYjI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oF_Ly_vF0rYbMht0EM9Cl1SSitX4LT9TcyRCevIalFg=)****

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Why don’t Democrats run against incumbents more often?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Moving politics in the direction of the working class requires the working class.
#
One big reason why the Left doesn’t bring primary challenges as frequently as Republicans do is because conservative primary challenges have billionaires behind them — and progressive primary challenges do not.
Moving politics in the direction of the working class requires the working class.
[Will you support our movement for transformative change — from Medicare for All to democratizing fundraising power in politics — and help fight back against status quo politics with a $5 contribution today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230718.c7cc0u&refcode=em20230718-4655-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4655%2E2526796%2EGaxavv)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230718.c7cc0u&refcode=em20230718-4655-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4655%2E2526796%2EGaxavv)**
Alexandria campaigned on expanding Medicare in order to make prescriptions more affordable. Now, Medicare has the power to negotiate prescription drugs — and insulin is capped at $35/ month. She believes in tackling the climate crisis head on, even when members of her own party have called her ‘extreme’ for authoring the Green New Deal.
It was clear from the start that Status Quo Politicians never wanted Alexandria in Congress. In fact, they called her election win a “fluke.” It’s why a Moderate Democrat mounted a $3 million primary challenge, and why Republicans spent over $10 million trying to unseat her in 2020.
But Alexandria continues to do what she was elected to do: **demand better.**
[Will you make a $5 contribution today to show you stand with Alexandria and support pushing the Democratic Party forward?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230718.c7cc0u&refcode=em20230718-4655-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4655%2E2526796%2EGaxavv)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230718.c7cc0u&refcode=em20230718-4655-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&akid=4655%2E2526796%2EGaxavv)**
Our sincerest thanks,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230718?refcode=em20230718-4655-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=41&refcode2=4655_2526796_Gaxavv&akid=4655%2E2526796%2EGaxavv)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230718-4655-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=42&akid=4655%2E2526796%2EGaxavv)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=43&akid=4655%2E2526796%2EGaxavv) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=44&akid=4655%2E2526796%2EGaxavv) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=45&akid=4655%2E2526796%2EGaxavv)
---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Working Families Power
subject: What’s at stake if Cop City is built
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Power (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter,
**Residents of Atlanta, Georgia have 27 days left** to put a referendum on the ballot this November that would let the public vote on whether their tax dollars should be used to fund the construction of a massive police training facility dubbed "Cop City.” By August 14, organizers need to collect at least 70k signatures from eligible voters across Atlanta and it’s going to take all of us, _wherever we're from_ , to help them pull off this feat. Over the next few weeks, Working Families Power will be reaching out to thousands of Atlanta residents through door-to-door canvasses, phone banks, text parties, and emails like this to discuss what’s at stake for community safety, environmental health, and more if we don’t stop Cop City. [**Can you pitch in to ensure we have the resources we need to get as many signatures as possible, and put a referendum on the ballot this November to let the people of Atlanta decide the fate of Cop City**?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xntrmU4Lb-4yP0VLdtz0bTWh3n5KQb2Drhdz9DQoxbVCfjoLWfWV5956BZzL-4mzF9JE2d8ZOkg9N5Q0LHSmZtlqxOSOFEzZOuWUjV3GF8lU172Ju2WjIfGj6NYW1A0bmvYO8u_R1SnaDS3s07vftL5HzKbj5pwMJ45CuOwPyS3ac6WV3EEnwtOYqI9LcxihRXZTsvz-Ueok5fEgdGHOe-xgXEQ-VgKIlZu1GvKrzuZN3GE7pXw1jYKGWDe_x6JHfiGbkUHKfbFt0_OMHi4z31iS6zEmtpQ2AkmKHL3jkNwQ9vmQzP0_ZfTWRR0IzxZfcv7pgjTe1Tyq190H3aXVEjwJE5J_L4QG0jcZzT7ttNFGPDrwo1lYMOAtZZ2QLeD3g/3xz/vaSj18pST2aQGMbMkzI9KA/h0/WH22hN1Ct8TrYvAdkZaSe7HJhdFoR4vA0Jvoyxm4_X0) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xntrmU4Lb-4yP0VLdtz0bTWh3n5KQb2Drhdz9DQoxbVCfjoLWfWV5956BZzL-4mzF9JE2d8ZOkg9N5Q0LHSmZtKOR8HXW4HpAJKdApImCEhtyBq6_3XFukBQO4XEAYSTLhxy4UeogWkvh0JC8Nf399P_AVcveFfzGnetdZKqv_j5UP0QRUKlC3AmlHQLD41czT1O_Opvs3uMHmcUh2mOT7jUPxH3myI8oPLRtf3JeHp3a-ET59y3w_PqYXPZgxopFmKJER-_w5sszi0mdZggjjevpJ1_ytyeP7hqRhDM5Nr3K1mOjT_p2bWM-PKXc9rNjEiFxrJB1Yci3iiFSC9uel6tXpjOY82QIXv5rqlFuZy5OLMI6zVlcHXswdjPicBbc/3xz/vaSj18pST2aQGMbMkzI9KA/h1/awJJuA-DYvUlgKRBMeK6kjZm3G0fZJA0eTsaqjou0Cc) **[Contribute now »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xntrmU4Lb-4yP0VLdtz0bTWh3n5KQb2Drhdz9DQoxbVCfjoLWfWV5956BZzL-4mzF9JE2d8ZOkg9N5Q0LHSmZtRI587Pr6hsVGJ6cwvBv_CZd59MaCdBkxphZa7mzULS9z0pqE2X4QBj4RALsin1R4dk_ZUW1Sdcx1PX9y7Za2cZYoyPJpp-aYkB9fE_g7FQT2gue7U9VsB9nqB0Rw5UMhdV-ujghsxCcDfu394gDBHTw_UDuzpCwgq_LCuIemfXfBz-RKAEe-QQI-elae9qSf2TUhHpO2ub8OaVv6InMmXTQgWzvg_kj2P-elORxJfKV5fsViUyPHkysMYM_LrfIVEVmi-qkMUj52QNJ4GMk4TbftGKrOUE7RCFgahPgYSac/3xz/vaSj18pST2aQGMbMkzI9KA/h2/Ix4pATXqzFlu4J800wUNjCqlOM3DXFjV9CufN1Bz-7g)** If built, the ramifications of Cop City would stretch far beyond Atlanta, Peter. Atlanta would become the blueprint for every major city in the U.S. — **over-policed, heavily surveilled, and under-protected.** We risk corporations and organizations following Atlanta’s lead in other cities like New York, Los Angeles, and Chicago — proposing to destroy _more_ acres of forest land, erect _more_ domestic versions of military bases, and train _more_ cops to deploy urban warfare tactics against communities. In this unprecedented moment of popular resistance, when Hollywood writers and actors are joining teachers, nurses, doctors, railway workers, Amazon, UPS, Starbucks, and other unions on the picket line — authorities want nothing more than to break this spirit. **And they’ll build more Cop Cities to do it.** But right now, we have a chance to stop this from happening, and bring Atlanta’s Cop City to a direct vote that would let the public decide their own future. **Any amount you donate, whether big or small, will make a real difference in helping us reach as many voters as possible, collect as many signatures as we can, and put this referendum on the November ballot.** [**Contribute to join our movement against corporate greed and police terror, and defeat Cop City for good.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xntrmU4Lb-4yP0VLdtz0bTWh3n5KQb2Drhdz9DQoxbVCfjoLWfWV5956BZzL-4mzF9JE2d8ZOkg9N5Q0LHSmZtMrYlZsLVM6s9rxhvrVKLNI16Ns7A3pO4Ke92MyOHr9wSrnboTurCgGXIYd91M61UZ7lKZMNH_Kmy2GB2wHUlEyNvXOdnkc2ABjrP292kvbhqlvKTTDqTeYovuhNbEFvXt6OmxlCyCaa6rqEKidxUW04mHRL1yuavYGu4uazXzUZ56be8VfId4F2pcn43GCYmBhMxFlCAKnmSJ103mkOJEgmSj9gRprySskfg1_LaySlvyi0uFKztcCjcadDiAlS6R1-B9Pj66lDfl0fLHfY_Bv4xSW8YmfvZSoIhkJeIScw/3xz/vaSj18pST2aQGMbMkzI9KA/h3/CAbSH3ep30I9LmL7m3KBra13dFYMZwM4fjgWWLQDwF0) **[Contribute now »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xntrmU4Lb-4yP0VLdtz0bTWh3n5KQb2Drhdz9DQoxbVCfjoLWfWV5956BZzL-4mzF9JE2d8ZOkg9N5Q0LHSmZt61MlGsHhYuzgLAhrlsuu0HR-K9d5ruApNXer34z_9uSXneJA98i2cQIL3o2doHEVFyxQzi8sdWjqxBekiEztjU13MYbccmXMIIM_22UcSIjx_5sSgDtsO34pCC2qpR9d2c_x4PFryZEvpYaJouPiA5CfVUq7n_LNns_PnVPizPtnAz15M9blIUU46OoyHpfHuKDIYaWQQCNIOpkV57Lbccyh7McuQX_Mg-v3VjdA3thn3RESZ860AnfsxWAtfmWMW0wBRq_d16_j4zZ4UJXJFRV26c833CXRTzw9PIbjJ3s/3xz/vaSj18pST2aQGMbMkzI9KA/h4/BsQq6-RR5gU8QegJE8szOQcOKJPwziYqNJUXHszCf5o)** In solidarity, always, Working Families Power Thoughts? clean_body: | | | Peter, Residents of Atlanta, Georgia have 27 days left to put a referendum on the ballot this November that would let the public vote on whether their tax dollars should be used to fund the construction of a massive police training facility dubbed "Cop City.” By August 14, organizers need to collect at least 70k signatures from eligible voters across Atlanta and it’s going to take all of us, wherever we're from , to help them pull off this feat. Over the next few weeks, Working Families Power will be reaching out to thousands of Atlanta residents through door-to-door canvasses, phone banks, text parties, and emails like this to discuss what’s at stake for community safety, environmental health, and more if we don’t stop Cop City. If built, the ramifications of Cop City would stretch far beyond Atlanta, Peter. Atlanta would become the blueprint for every major city in the U.S. — over-policed, heavily surveilled, and under-protected. We risk corporations and organizations following Atlanta’s lead in other cities like New York, Los Angeles, and Chicago — proposing to destroy more acres of forest land, erect more domestic versions of military bases, and train more cops to deploy urban warfare tactics against communities. In this unprecedented moment of popular resistance, when Hollywood writers and actors are joining teachers, nurses, doctors, railway workers, Amazon, UPS, Starbucks, and other unions on the picket line — authorities want nothing more than to break this spirit. And they’ll build more Cop Cities to do it. But right now, we have a chance to stop this from happening, and bring Atlanta’s Cop City to a direct vote that would let the public decide their own future. Any amount you donate, whether big or small, will make a real difference in helping us reach as many voters as possible, collect as many signatures as we can, and put this referendum on the November ballot. In solidarity, always, Working Families Power Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. Want to learn more about Working Families Power? Help us build the movement power to win a democracy for the many — not the wealthy and powerful few. Paid for by Working Families Power (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

| | | Peter,
---
| | This year, Mitch McConnell removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It’s the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won’t stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I’ll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they’ll take away my parking spot, next? name: Wesley Bell
subject: I wanna know what brings us together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
This survey is one of the best ways for me to hear directly from you. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66693924/417234701/-1824387518?refcode=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0482f587-bd25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ4MmY1ODctYmQyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nC1HuHYuSigcl17NXI-TsPP1UXsgRN2Che93Qpf8mO0=) Hey Peter — it's Wesley. I've been traveling throughout the state speaking with hard-working Missouri families from all walks of life. **It's clear, Peter, Missourians want to send Senator Josh Hawley packing.** He'll say whatever folks want to hear and then go to D.C. and do the exact opposite. I plan to be a different kind of leader. That's why it's important I hear the issues at the TOP of people's minds. I wish I could sit down with each and every one of you, but that's just not realistic. Instead, my team put together an online survey. **[The voices of the people matter. Will you share your top priorities with me? Tell me what's on your mind by taking our short survey →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66693925/417234702/-87427518?ms=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&refcode=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&source=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=cbnvypSPbRvCyaJtacDYi3Mj/7yTBPxniGf4Q+4S8pd50AjQzu1I2j8vz5U2DW/y2U+WI4iyMEbDBKLiDyAxVYFEr2XeMQn/cgvNZFLitIdrdRq0+4aoMAv+AMbYUGT+HwfJvPZJwo43+OUYFysnqJgVDxbx46D+VtBjDxN8y2U=&refcode2=0482f587-bd25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ4MmY1ODctYmQyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nC1HuHYuSigcl17NXI-TsPP1UXsgRN2Che93Qpf8mO0=&emci=a1ec377b-bd25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0482f587-bd25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1020964)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66693926/417234703/-87427518?ms=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&refcode=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&source=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=cbnvypSPbRvCyaJtacDYi3Mj/7yTBPxniGf4Q+4S8pd50AjQzu1I2j8vz5U2DW/y2U+WI4iyMEbDBKLiDyAxVYFEr2XeMQn/cgvNZFLitIdrdRq0+4aoMAv+AMbYUGT+HwfJvPZJwo43+OUYFysnqJgVDxbx46D+VtBjDxN8y2U=&refcode2=0482f587-bd25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ4MmY1ODctYmQyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nC1HuHYuSigcl17NXI-TsPP1UXsgRN2Che93Qpf8mO0=&emci=a1ec377b-bd25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0482f587-bd25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1020964)
---
Peter, Josh Hawley doesn't listen, he won't change, and he won't govern. He's proven this time and again every time he posts another outright lie on Twitter and votes against our best interests in the Senate.
I'm ready to listen, make tough decisions, and follow through. But I need to hear from you first. **[Will you take two minutes to tell me what's on your mind? It's crucial that I hear from you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66693927/417234704/-87427518?ms=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&refcode=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&source=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230718_survey_esrv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=cbnvypSPbRvCyaJtacDYi3Mj/7yTBPxniGf4Q+4S8pd50AjQzu1I2j8vz5U2DW/y2U+WI4iyMEbDBKLiDyAxVYFEr2XeMQn/cgvNZFLitIdrdRq0+4aoMAv+AMbYUGT+HwfJvPZJwo43+OUYFysnqJgVDxbx46D+VtBjDxN8y2U=&refcode2=0482f587-bd25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ4MmY1ODctYmQyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nC1HuHYuSigcl17NXI-TsPP1UXsgRN2Che93Qpf8mO0=&emci=a1ec377b-bd25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0482f587-bd25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1020964)**

clean_body: This survey is one of the best ways for me to hear directly from you. = Hey Peter — it's Wesley. I've been traveling throughout the state speaking with hard-working Missouri families from all walks of life. It's clear, Peter, Missourians want to send Senator Josh Hawley packing. He'll say whatever folks want to hear and then go to D.C. and do the exact opposite. I plan to be a different kind of leader. That's why it's important I hear the issues at the TOP of people's minds. I wish I could sit down with each and every one of you, but that's just not realistic. Instead, my team put together an online survey. | Peter, Josh Hawley doesn't listen, he won't change, and he won't govern. He's proven this time and again every time he posts another outright lie on Twitter and votes against our best interests in the Senate. I'm ready to listen, make tough decisions, and follow through. But I need to hear from you first. Thank you, Wesley Bell = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
