I have to ask....

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7268091a09e14fe482919692eeadecd4&_e=Kd0zD_09Zndy0nBYIzu6p__L2r7-P_Ca8AScrYOQoRnEaB-Qz8mHufir9vg5zt6cR2jb7dJnEosL1PEIsuXPyT9ZfcQ_IFLsEb3hy7GaxHRmEaYdH4Om7FMryNtSggPPx-qBmdZYhuryKgUS1j2CBu5w3j0mBKAerOwikirxXAYWHbPH1Z5066T-4vq0mx7gT6Zx9DYkXW2Li0kt0cb3cZDAQUoNXQlJtddwmdj53jyIA9K2IdTnWg018qy8Y3ATXf1ZCySu8X7bWBrtZ85H8QO6U1D5WxcLN6EXJtG8QRQZWsxFu0excCKWvD1h7dzYTzCuW14qllphZ0y_kEfRMibnR-WdCOnNKwdahyF3wqnqNnGRL6uQ7Eq1rx-GM_2f0gjZp2GRzWShAamLgTZivQ%3D%3D)
---
Hi there.

**I quickly wanted to check in.**

Now that we're officially in the second half of 2023, the election is just around the corner. This upcoming election will determine not just who will sit in the White House but whether our children and grandchildren will grow up in the United States of America or the Woke States of the (Liberal) Agenda.

I don't know about you, but I don't want to set my children up for guaranteed indoctrination. I want them to experience the American Dream, freedom, and opportunities they wouldn't get anywhere else.

So that leads me to my question: **[Are you Pro-Freedom?](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7268091a09e14fe482919692eeadecd4&_e=Kd0zD_09Zndy0nBYIzu6p__L2r7-P_Ca8AScrYOQoRnEaB-Qz8mHufir9vg5zt6cR2jb7dJnEosL1PEIsuXPyT9ZfcQ_IFLsEb3hy7GaxHRmEaYdH4Om7FMryNtSggPPx-qBmdZYhuryKgUS1j2CBu5w3j0mBKAerOwikirxXAYWHbPH1Z5066T-4vq0mx7gT6Zx9DYkXW2Li0kt0cb3cZDAQUoNXQlJtddwmdj53jy3pTJaQnb-erUNPZPcAHtbUz-yZ_M0RrsKKpabbSnw6IEW-IPzvw6_ImXxPxjNqOAjwFdkWoukILBeVpEfB8CksOwmMF0r7YlC7C89reOTKrsPvW_9V0zgLPuz6Dty4Tqa9k37gA9l1CcOPekFqr2W-aHomfSrIMKtDJ7-lal08Q%3D%3D)**

Let me know at the link below what you think & my next question will be there for you to answer.

**[See my next question here>>](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7268091a09e14fe482919692eeadecd4&_e=Kd0zD_09Zndy0nBYIzu6p__L2r7-P_Ca8AScrYOQoRnEaB-Qz8mHufir9vg5zt6cR2jb7dJnEosL1PEIsuXPyT9ZfcQ_IFLsEb3hy7GaxHRmEaYdH4Om7FMryNtSggPPx-qBmdZYhuryKgUS1j2CBu5w3j0mBKAerOwikirxXAYWHbPH1Z5066T-4vq0mx7gT6Zx9DYkXW2Li0kt0cb3cZDAQUoNXQlJtddwmdj53jy3pTJaQnb-erUNPZPcAHtbPNw-hIniYp6SLbOWbeg_u2OG0xAgCs6ttXOgD_DHn-NDQKuR7OajvwG98KeFog_nmbo5_0q5EmXXriQGxDX1JkCGO_5qDxLOovP-BxV45F_DvTaqdeeQ4uR-QY6yHNRcToNwlV5SAMQOOgr8nMXqAw%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

JD Vance

clean_body: [] I wanted to give you a quick fundraising update for the first quarter of our campaign. Long story short, we had a strong start, and we need to keep the momentum up. Can you rush a $10 donation to help out? [] We raised $206,000 during this quarter, with over 80% of contributions coming in amounts below $100! And our campaign raised almost DOUBLE the amount from grassroots donors as our next closest competitor! I’m so grateful for the successful start to our grassroots campaign. In no small part, your support and belief in our campaign has helped get us this far. And now that we have entered a new quarter, I’d love it if we could have a strong start. Can you top us off by donating $10 today? [] I promise you that your support won’t be wasted. We will put every dollar we raise to help lift the voices in our community, and center the stories we have to tell about health care, climate change, housing, immigration, and DEMOCRACY! TOP OFF $10 [] Sí se puede, Raquel Terán [] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona. For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children. name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: 🚨the BIGGEST spender just dropped out 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Peter,
🚨The BIGGEST spender in our Nashville mayoral race just dropped out. 🚨
After spending nearly $2 million on the race, Jim Gingrich suspended his Nashville mayoral campaign. I thank Jim for his insightful and passionate perspective on how our next mayor should face Music City’s biggest challenges.
With Jim stepping down, the race for Nashville’s next mayor is truly blown wide open.
And with the top spender out of the picture, your grassroots donations **will carry us that much further** Peter.
Can we count on you to chip in any amount to support our people-powered campaign to put Nashville first today? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Here’s the deal, Peter:
Jim is out of the race, but he’s still on the ballot.
We need all hands on deck if our campaign is going to let folks across Nashville know that a vote for Jim is actually a non-vote.
For the next couple of weeks, our Get Out The Vote Program is our top priority and biggest expense.
Peter, with Election Day just over two weeks away, can you donate today to help us keep pushing to elect a candidate who is on the ballot and will fight tirelessly for Music City? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
KEEP PUSHING >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230718_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
www.voteheidicampbell.com [http://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

Friend,
Tucker Carlson made a big prediction - and I completely agree with it!
_**" I think we're going to see Trump's emergence as the most significant thing that happened in American politics in 100 years, because he reoriented the Republican Party against the wishes of Republican leaders."**_
But I'm humble enough to know that the TRUE significance of our movement is YOU.
The reason our movement has such historic significance is because it took power away from the corrupt ruling class and returned it to **YOU** , the American people.
As I said at my Inauguration,_ "What truly matters is not which party controls our government, but whether our government is controlled by the people."_
**And that 's exactly why the disloyal Republicans known as RINOs are pledging to spend $370 MILLION to try and sabotage us in the GOP primary.**
These RINOs hate the idea of YOU being in control of your own government so much that they'd rather see Joe Biden win in 2024 than watch me return to the White House and put America First again.
But in 2024, we're going to prove Tucker Carlson right and ensure that the MAGA movement goes down in history books as the most significant thing in American politics in 100 YEARS.

" I think we're going to see Trump's emergence as the most significant thing that happened in American politics in 100 years, because he reoriented the Republican Party against the wishes of Republican leaders." But I'm humble enough to know that the TRUE significance of our movement is YOU. The reason our movement has such historic significance is because it took power away from the corrupt ruling class and returned it to YOU , the American people. As I said at my Inauguration, "What truly matters is not which party controls our government, but whether our government is controlled by the people." And that 's exactly why the disloyal Republicans known as RINOs are pledging to spend $370 MILLION to try and sabotage us in the GOP primary. These RINOs hate the idea of YOU being in control of your own government so much that they'd rather see Joe Biden win in 2024 than watch me return to the White House and put America First again. But in 2024, we're going to prove Tucker Carlson right and ensure that the MAGA movement goes down in history books as the most significant thing in American politics in 100 YEARS. | Thank you, | Donald J. | | I shouldn’t be alive, Fellow Conservative. When I was serving in Afghanistan, a roadside bomb blew up under the gas tank of my vehicle. I burned alive for what felt like an eternity as I came to terms with my mortality.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c40ed9f0eb5841ce8c0ef9e60fdcb352&_e=rZugHAA2SZQBJhmyT8zakHLpx4ld1qthZNwLnVvwhrBNGRC9gjWLEqKV2juSLEbhOCZeYdGIHVI6bcjnAKkC7GUpyAW7-Z9SeK5uBfsf14xyqAreBNPUIjICHiTMl4t0fcCUZSdTHY0fnQpzniEKG28bJateg3kZD5cxqkFlDYkYzLDAPeuIhoJ0jtUb4pvSn6c3tEFHS8E3jPYa9QqaCfehc7_75jWXsEn7F5No-coyW_8d3_2ejQDOisO6HKEvqFj8gVVmtd8zTpXr9qKnA0j2-176BW2omhRoQicps5n7cSypHzJMRrjlGLl5-M0h_LhgEvjt9FCk2r9hUcUEnbXAM_FsQYBScb5wi3v5HnWa2dM79_oh6ZoIa4L5NdbP43KbkPm6is512qdfC45vJhCrhKAg14jELsWmK85FTCvIiyiG8a1NE7YgMt66gEN4)
---
I thought it would be the end of me, but by the grace of God, I survived. I got a second chance at life, and there’s no way I’m going to waste it by only looking out for myself. [**That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Nevada**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c40ed9f0eb5841ce8c0ef9e60fdcb352&_e=rZugHAA2SZQBJhmyT8zakHLpx4ld1qthZNwLnVvwhrBNGRC9gjWLEqKV2juSLEbhOCZeYdGIHVI6bcjnAKkC7GUpyAW7-Z9SeK5uBfsf14xyqAreBNPUIjICHiTMl4t0fcCUZSdTHY0fnQpzniEKG28bJateg3kZD5cxqkFlDYkYzLDAPeuIhoJ0jtUb4pvSn6c3tEFHS8E3jPYa9QqaCfehc7_75jWXsEn7F5No-coyW_8d3_2ejQDOisO6HKEvqFj8gVVmtd8zTpXr9qKnA0j2-176BW2omhRoQicps5lOzE67s-Ga65U_wKJzqqh6rfkgejopbxX2p05EvVa_fy9_V6cx3k6Wd3hHV9fOGp7VviHMW6SgQzM8LMFyimShfM6P-IcGAYRMIAKQiE_f6nQPPr_mrvjdVfttJ-op61kj9aiqEja7TteyRMJrCMNf) — not because it’s easy. But because the reason I’m still alive today _is to serve_. Our nation is in crisis and our so-called “leaders” have gone AWOL. With an economy in shambles, unprecedented threats from our adversaries, a wide open border, and D.C. politicians like NV Sen. Jacky Rosen failing to tackle our challenges head on, our nation is on a collision course with total disaster. **Too often, politicians only work to serve themselves while forgetting about the people they swore to serve. They see a challenge and they run the other way.** Well, Fellow Conservative, I’ve survived my fair share of challenges, and I’m willing to take this one head on — because even though I’m no longer on active duty, I haven’t given up on my commitment to service. Our country, our state, and our people deserve a Senator who’s proven that they’ll put everything on the line for America, just as I have. That’s why I want to deploy to Washington D.C. for a new mission with the same goal: [**Serving our great country.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c40ed9f0eb5841ce8c0ef9e60fdcb352&_e=rZugHAA2SZQBJhmyT8zakHLpx4ld1qthZNwLnVvwhrBNGRC9gjWLEqKV2juSLEbhOCZeYdGIHVI6bcjnAKkC7GUpyAW7-Z9SeK5uBfsf14xyqAreBNPUIjICHiTMl4t0fcCUZSdTHY0fnQpzniEKG28bJateg3kZD5cxqkFlDYkYzLDAPeuIhoJ0jtUb4pvSn6c3tEFHS8E3jPYa9QqaCfehc7_75jWXsEn7F5No-coyW_8d3_2ejQDOisO6HKEvqFj8gVVmtd8zTpXr9qKnA0j2-176BW2omhRoQicps5nxPIgutbBQhVAD5gm7YYxyDk3T9VABbRPTNjKSJ6RSQRvYC8Tvn0YDo6c9xrFhxo28m6xpxPM-uUYG0q3Q7-FNwCRZIw0b8iLn6wfJBFZ9KdMenmZF-NSHbeGEWzCaHeeFINbAxrk9ahpUuAWLXXaH) Fellow Conservative, can I count on you to have my back on my next mission? [**Chip in ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c40ed9f0eb5841ce8c0ef9e60fdcb352&_e=rZugHAA2SZQBJhmyT8zakHLpx4ld1qthZNwLnVvwhrBNGRC9gjWLEqKV2juSLEbhOCZeYdGIHVI6bcjnAKkC7GUpyAW7-Z9SeK5uBfsf14xyqAreBNPUIjICHiTMl4t0fcCUZSdTHY0fnQpzniEKG28bJateg3kZD5cxqkFlDYkYzLDAPeuIhoJ0jtUb4pvSn6c3tEFHS8E3jPYa9QqaCfehc7_75jWXsEn7F5No-coyW_8d3_2ejQDOisO6HKEvqFj8gVVmtd8zTpXr9qKnA0j2-176BW2omhRoQicps5nya_PSjbYtfG_JUpud3PhVe2Vz_dPALmM91JTPkZAlbE0RRm_myAbVEFRGLmtahms3TONUJCO8jlZNVH16SDPucqVnxfN4ixI0oKmHUgrLtcocq1XQFybHnWujPSSr2U5h366tGpjW0uAFTaCblJU1) This is our country and our fight. I won’t back down. Duty First,
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c40ed9f0eb5841ce8c0ef9e60fdcb352&_e=rZugHAA2SZQBJhmyT8zakHLpx4ld1qthZNwLnVvwhrBNGRC9gjWLEqKV2juSLEbhOCZeYdGIHVI6bcjnAKkC7GUpyAW7-Z9SeK5uBfsf14xyqAreBNPUIjICHiTMl4t0fcCUZSdTHY0fnQpzniEKG28bJateg3kZD5cxqkFlDYkYzLDAPeuIhoJ0jtUb4pvSn6c3tEFHS8E3jPYa9QqaCfehc7_75jWXsEn7F5No-coyW_8d3_2ejQDOisO6HKEvqFj8gVVmtd8zTpXr9qKnA0j2-176BW2omhRoQicps5kBCrH-9Cu9Ql7IH1MAv1Uuvzfsj-DXXy-5JG8xUVqLd2FORnrMSJNMi6toaIQtmEdzsJacvZZIXTa8PyifRFdDBrSbYKIl5CCJQgpMvYmZZGFuFuUBmNUJixZqbPd1X5kXmFQibynWZ73pToVvjaxI)

name: Zak for Congress
subject: This will be George Santos’ first punishment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
George Santos should resign — but he won't. Here’s what we’re going to do about it:
#
**Did you hear?**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230718?refcode=em20230718&amount=5&refcode2=324_8507_2_rZ9M&akid=324%2E8507%2E2_rZ9M)
A censure is one of the most serious punishments House members can receive. Between this, the House Ethics Committee’s investigation, AND the federal charges against him:
**Santos should resign — but he will not.**
[**That means we will have to defeat him the old-fashioned way: at the ballot box. Zak Malamed is the Democrat running to unseat George Santos, but he cannot do it alone. Will you chip in $5 to join our fight to defeat George Santos?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230718?refcode=em20230718&amount=5&refcode2=324_8507_2_rZ9M&akid=324%2E8507%2E2_rZ9M)
The lies that Santos is being censured for telling are the very reason he’s unfit to represent us in Congress:
* **He lied about being Jewish.** By the way, Zak actually is Jewish and proud of his heritage.
* **He lied about his family being victims of the Holocaust.** Zak’s family members were.
* **He pretended to start a nonprofit.** Zak actually did start one called Student Voice.

Despite Santos’ outrageous lies, defeating him will not be easy. If Republicans want to keep their House Majority, then it is critical for them to hold onto this seat. Because of that, we expect them to pour **_millions of dollars_** into defending the MAGA madness.
**Still, we know this race is winnable** so long as we can out-organize the radical right wing. But to do that, we need resources — that is why we have set a goal to raise $6,500 today.
[**Hitting this goal will allow us to grow our campaign so we can go toe-to-toe with Santos and his right-wing cronies — and defeat him once and for all. So we’re asking: will you chip in $5 to defeat George Santos and the MAGA madness?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230718?refcode=em20230718&amount=5&refcode2=324_8507_2_rZ9M&akid=324%2E8507%2E2_rZ9M)

Thank you,
Team Zak for Congress

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio. | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

Peter,

To say that I am living the American Dream is an understatement.

I'm Kevin Lincoln – a conservative Republican, the current Mayor of Stockton, California, a Marine Corps veteran, the grandson of immigrants, **and I'm proud to announce to you today that I am running to represent California’s 9th District in the United States Congress.**

This seat is currently held by out-of-touch liberal Josh Harder, and **it’s one of our BEST opportunities in the whole country to defeat a Democrat incumbent, flip a seat, and expand our House majority.**

Republicans’ thin majority simply is not large enough to ensure we can stand strong against Biden’s destructive agenda and deliver results for the American people. I need your help to flip this top-target seat so we can.

[**Will you help me defeat Josh Harder, flip CA-9, and get our country back on track by joining my team as a week one donor?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4e54142758b4b4588224e8decc76362&_e=Bm-dM12My-sQIBRomh_UL1Y1R1N5AiZauh89Wl7suFTkZtCElrDbWxQw1wmC7Tf0L9yR430G6bMjqfwZUF0nVwP4XE_2BRVs63Sl8W9EYdybK6B7Swao9GwGYCOBkjmdWh-r5Nqt_7DfeRJpd_u2LU1V7Yb3zOynFwLAUOfJvHPALbj8MezYI8SW-EiZv7NfUDoqoRe1JQ2XvkIHfDXHOV1zF-Hf9dcr6IJn1meKuBf3auXaer8UU1kVm8Xn7zq9WumrANZCJjaFI4eMPDjU1zKriZDVYpmucB0luTgmnx2U_H4vUsgFIXDSklr5fR4btCQGILCIiOwCiAqRKfJKn5SJRlT_zs_ut0hj-Wh48SV7a4U8-Ju10edSexs-KBl6)

[ ** SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4e54142758b4b4588224e8decc76362&_e=Bm-dM12My-sQIBRomh_UL1Y1R1N5AiZauh89Wl7suFTkZtCElrDbWxQw1wmC7Tf0L9yR430G6bMjqfwZUF0nVwP4XE_2BRVs63Sl8W9EYdybK6B7Swao9GwGYCOBkjmdWh-r5Nqt_7DfeRJpd_u2LU1V7Yb3zOynFwLAUOfJvHPALbj8MezYI8SW-EiZv7NfUDoqoRe1JQ2XvkIHfDXHOV1zF-Hf9dcr6IJn1meKuBdgHPijOfvQeOPrcTZ4-1FOqifM5Nq96Z9czhaHbZ-6T-n_zBg9z_GGHakLGh3Va_FQVhAZfUQL132z-wjaLRVC3YoT3mu_xtPPRUx-OezWW4_8SCEhv4y0trXw58UwbL6Bl-D8CsrJ0KwlXhT0BTsK)
Service and faith have always played a major role in my life.

My Mexican grandfather came to California in search of opportunity. He settled here in Stockton, raised a family, and became a United States citizen. **He instilled in me a sense of pride in my community, my heritage, and my country.**

That pride still lives in me today, and that's what's called me to serve.

I joined the United States Marine Corps in 2001. I became a military police officer and was recruited by the White House Military Office to serve the President of the United States on Marine One. **I was proud to serve my nation in such an important role.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4e54142758b4b4588224e8decc76362&_e=Bm-dM12My-sQIBRomh_UL1Y1R1N5AiZauh89Wl7suFTkZtCElrDbWxQw1wmC7Tf0L9yR430G6bMjqfwZUF0nVwP4XE_2BRVs63Sl8W9EYdybK6B7Swao9GwGYCOBkjmdWh-r5Nqt_7DfeRJpd_u2LU1V7Yb3zOynFwLAUOfJvHPALbj8MezYI8SW-EiZv7NfUDoqoRe1JQ2XvkIHfDXHOV1zF-Hf9dcr6IJn1meKuBdCfPBkBOgd4FaJniZcgdy4zLpUg1vPdOec1xpJLna1GzOFl2Oz14KS8F7rjRycg5mf4SvvcaSxCqfnLF7ClnMcDkdC9YvqwMwA8Gi35MoylqobsJXi6No_bpTG6IDrWV0y4MQQHxO5oswBe177_bUI)
**Now, I'm proud to serve as the Mayor of my hometown of Stockton.** I got to work on day one in office, and we've put our city back on track. Let me tell you, Peter, Stockton's making a comeback. The heart of our community is beating again.

**I'm proud of my record of service, and I’m running for Congress to continue that service.** My district and our nation need a servant leader, not a left-wing politician whose votes for out of control spending and job killing policies are making it harder for families just to get by.

[**Will you send a local Mayor and Marine to fight for your country in Congress by becoming a week one donor to my campaign?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4e54142758b4b4588224e8decc76362&_e=Bm-dM12My-sQIBRomh_UL1Y1R1N5AiZauh89Wl7suFTkZtCElrDbWxQw1wmC7Tf0L9yR430G6bMjqfwZUF0nVwP4XE_2BRVs63Sl8W9EYdybK6B7Swao9GwGYCOBkjmdWh-r5Nqt_7DfeRJpd_u2LU1V7Yb3zOynFwLAUOfJvHPALbj8MezYI8SW-EiZv7NfUDoqoRe1JQ2XvkIHfDXHOV1zF-Hf9dcr6IJn1meKuBd5xuiOPAANqQ9ykMGkQzw2KG8B_7d5esWShVst_ixCUEot_i2rnatsyC3V7lzdBItFLubhW7o-W5wTVsihrYCtXZhe0cRNo6YB19cr9V2Yzs-32TSWcuGvIJn7fCak3px_wXxX0M4m3Czv8Wcrw_eD)

[ ** SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4e54142758b4b4588224e8decc76362&_e=Bm-dM12My-sQIBRomh_UL1Y1R1N5AiZauh89Wl7suFTkZtCElrDbWxQw1wmC7Tf0L9yR430G6bMjqfwZUF0nVwP4XE_2BRVs63Sl8W9EYdybK6B7Swao9GwGYCOBkjmdWh-r5Nqt_7DfeRJpd_u2LU1V7Yb3zOynFwLAUOfJvHPALbj8MezYI8SW-EiZv7NfUDoqoRe1JQ2XvkIHfDXHOV1zF-Hf9dcr6IJn1meKuBeBwRRDwNkkwwqxouHnp99h57W-uMGEXtvPbeEMV47kA1CdxloTzUfqgurNsCP5bljBjmxmOY3Pe24zI9jX3SCtqb7mDicVF2mSjXBJ7Q-heR0lXM6iskaVqvZB9wwQWNc8ExTr-O92RU0aXov1drE8)
**Washington is broken.** Petty partisan politics are making it harder for Americans to get ahead. Our communities are working hard to make things better, but they are still struggling because of Washington's neglect.

My opponent, Josh Harder, votes lockstep with the Democrats and against the values of our district. A whopping 95% of the time he’s put Joe Biden ahead of our community.

We need representatives that will address our country's challenges as we’ve done in Stockton. We’re going to fight inflation and lower costs, support economic policies that create jobs not joblessness, strengthen our schools by empowering parents, defend our farms and our farmers, protect seniors, honor our veterans, and support our law enforcement.

I say “we” not “me” because this is bigger than just one man, Peter. Now that I've shared my story and my plan with you, [**I'm asking you to help me launch my campaign for Congress with a week one contribution of $5 or $10 today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4e54142758b4b4588224e8decc76362&_e=Bm-dM12My-sQIBRomh_UL1Y1R1N5AiZauh89Wl7suFTkZtCElrDbWxQw1wmC7Tf0L9yR430G6bMjqfwZUF0nVwP4XE_2BRVs63Sl8W9EYdybK6B7Swao9GwGYCOBkjmdWh-r5Nqt_7DfeRJpd_u2LU1V7Yb3zOynFwLAUOfJvHPALbj8MezYI8SW-EiZv7NfUDoqoRe1JQ2XvkIHfDXHOV1zF-Hf9dcr6IJn1meKuBd58cn1G6hb1A39dVi1oU6Z6mAQW1sAIUpEMgRObS6uXuYA7pZpO-7KAelPRu994EaB-J82cOk5OK19VmhjEflLFixwbuDF62wVH9SJwL-TmfFZ67byQ4FWADf0D8zRASFOAcz4DXCVIvhG3Hs765xk)

This campaign is about my district and about all Americans, and I need your help to see it through to election day. [**A launch week contribution of even just a couple bucks can make that happen.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4e54142758b4b4588224e8decc76362&_e=Bm-dM12My-sQIBRomh_UL1Y1R1N5AiZauh89Wl7suFTkZtCElrDbWxQw1wmC7Tf0L9yR430G6bMjqfwZUF0nVwP4XE_2BRVs63Sl8W9EYdybK6B7Swao9GwGYCOBkjmdWh-r5Nqt_7DfeRJpd_u2LU1V7Yb3zOynFwLAUOfJvHPALbj8MezYI8SW-EiZv7NfUDoqoRe1JQ2XvkIHfDXHOV1zF-Hf9dcr6IJn1meKuBccWT4oLVPEmJhpH3VPO1ZGV1LLl3aFbhG8tzE3LvZziYqJqar5J9UaU9rNdw50ixBENm7IrjRUTjsmalFW2cUkvj0iq2zjYJY1gwP7S4Aq7Qi3AZJnqwwd-5F_3elKVb9NOmn5gJN_mGttXM6Veo-O)

[ ** SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4e54142758b4b4588224e8decc76362&_e=Bm-dM12My-sQIBRomh_UL1Y1R1N5AiZauh89Wl7suFTkZtCElrDbWxQw1wmC7Tf0L9yR430G6bMjqfwZUF0nVwP4XE_2BRVs63Sl8W9EYdybK6B7Swao9GwGYCOBkjmdWh-r5Nqt_7DfeRJpd_u2LU1V7Yb3zOynFwLAUOfJvHPALbj8MezYI8SW-EiZv7NfUDoqoRe1JQ2XvkIHfDXHOV1zF-Hf9dcr6IJn1meKuBchyKIeQQFWfqe9_iGQEBAC_cwKQUTixm4ndI1uwkdXyoABkt_PyaTbS5xqXHsyJnwaW7_05gM-3giZI_r5DnL6n1GcwNepBRbsRhYlNKDCpSmtZqk2xBdz5tew3xrYd1UnESqVzTLObGDsvQDtugDe)
I'm ready to take my service to my country and my community to the next level, and I'm hoping you will be part of our fight.

Thank you,

Kevin Lincoln
Veteran, USMC
Republican for Congress

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

body:
stand up to their extremism >>
| **NEW: National Democrats Stand up For Public Librarians as Republicans Escalate Extremist Book Bans**

Public libraries and our very democracy are under ATTACK by MAGA Republicans as they ramp up their dangerous book bans.

While the GOP plots to silence anyone who disagrees with their extremist agenda, librarians remain committed to our freedom to read and learn.

[So we’re sending a HUGE thank you card to our public librarians to show our support and stand with them against MAGA attacks! You’ve been hand-selected as one of 100 local Democrats: SIGN NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49713?t=6&akid=9229%2E878179%2EmW2Ven) | [**DONATE $3 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49713?t=7&akid=9229%2E878179%2EmW2Ven)
---
**To: Our Librarians
From: A Proud Democrat** To our public librarians,

The freedom to read and share ideas has always been one of the core tenets of American democracy.

**Now, far-right Republicans are hell-bent on silencing _anything_ that goes against their agenda, from LGBTQ representation to the Civil Rights Movement to the Holocaust.**

It is absolutely HORRIFYING that the GOP is investigating and even attempting to ARREST librarians who defend our right to read.

**But let me be clear: Democrats will never stop fighting alongside you to defend our democracy and save these crucial freedoms.**

[So today, I’m signing this letter to thank you for your commitment to freedom even in the face of the most brutal attacks, and to elect more Democrats who will stand against MAGA extremism »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49713?t=8&akid=9229%2E878179%2EmW2Ven) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49713?t=9&akid=9229%2E878179%2EmW2Ven)
---
Sincerely,

A Thankful Democrat
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. | | Idaho libraries are in bed with someone...

A group run by a lesbian Marxist, the American Library Association.

_We give them money for "training"..._

_They give us money for grants..._

And they're deeply embedded in the Idaho library system.

It's all pushing Idaho toward a sexually deviant Marxist utopia.

So, me and my fellow Idaho Freedom Caucus members did... _**[this](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=15e14225cd&e=dea908e0fe "Our call to action")**. _

Because the Montana Freedom Caucus members recently made the right choice by untying their state from the radically progressive ALA.

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Putting service members first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress **[marcykaptur
body:
Extreme Republicans are holding our democracy hostage. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66694580/417237266/197685099?refcode=EM_FR_230718NDAA_N_MK_90DO_4_NG_TESTB_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjZkMTYzMy1jMDI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XJl-3ReYrEP5MZqWwtxoFN_y8Z0QmpA-RPBYixppFhk=)
---
Team,

I was born into a family steeped in patriotism and military service. Taking care of our servicemen and women should be a bipartisan process, as those wearing the uniform deserve our unwavering support. Unfortunately, the GOP is playing politics with our military and those that have chosen to serve.

We’ve seen that extreme Republicans are holding our democracy hostage and stalling any progress in what matters most. Just last week, **_Kevin McCarthy and his allies hijacked a bipartisan process at the expense of our armed services._**

We know we tell you over and over again how important these elections are – but this could be the most consequential elections of our lifetimes. Our democracy, personal rights, and everything in between could be on the chopping block.

**[I’m asking you to help continue fighting for our service members and our rights. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help us keep fighting for clean_body: Extreme Republicans are holding our democracy hostage. | | = Team, I was born into a family steeped in patriotism and military service. Taking care of our servicemen and women should be a bipartisan process, as those wearing the uniform deserve our unwavering support. Unfortunately, the GOP is playing politics with our military and those that have chosen to serve. We’ve seen that extreme Republicans are holding our democracy hostage and stalling any progress in what matters most. Just last week, Kevin McCarthy and his allies hijacked a bipartisan process at the expense of our armed services. | While some of my colleagues in Congress are distracted by petty politics, I go to work every day trying to lower the temperature of our political discourse and to get _results._

**_Michiganders need results, not extremist rhetoric and more partisan gridlock._**

**At the end of April, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) announced their top targets for 2024,_and I’m on the list._**

**That’s proof that our 2024 race is going to be just as tough as it was in 2022, if not tougher.**

And since then, they’ve wasted no time spreading misleading attacks about my record and funneling millions of dollars into blanketing mid-Michigan with dark money funded attack ads against me.

I fight every day in Congress to advocate for the people of mid-Michigan. I’m working to lower costs and to create good-paying jobs. I’m working to improve infrastructure, make prescription drugs and health care more affordable, and protect Social Security and Medicare.

**[Can you chip in $15 or any amount before our deadline so we can prove our grassroots strength by having a strong digital membership base?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66694802/417237894/-630682683?amount=15&source=_NBI_DK_20230719_FR_1.1_0_6MO_T_candidate_NA_NA_mom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTI2ODgxYS1jMTI1LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G-qJX6agjmQ34OofqEUt1pKbPViN0d-SrXZ1rRaN8rk=)**

Thank you for standing with me,

Dan

clean_body: | While some of my colleagues in Congress are distracted by petty politics, I go to work every day trying to lower the temperature of our political discourse and to get results. Michiganders need results, not extremist rhetoric and more partisan gridlock. But I need your help to show Michigan families are sticking by me. Having strength in numbers early on in the election is critical for 2024. Because of redistricting, we’re going to continue as a “top target” for National Republicans this election cycle. = = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly. | | = | = | = | = | = | = At the end of April, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) announced their top targets for 2024,and I’m on the list. That’s proof that our 2024 race is going to be just as tough as it was in 2022, if not tougher. And since then, they’ve wasted no time spreading misleading attacks about my record and funneling millions of dollars into blanketing mid-Michigan with dark money funded attack ads against me. I fight every day in Congress to advocate for the people of mid-Michigan. I’m working to lower costs and to create good-paying jobs. I’m working to improve infrastructure, make prescription drugs and health care more affordable, and protect Social Security and Medicare. = Thank you for standing with me, Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

name: JD Vance
subject: This is ALL I have to say about sex changes for kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
if you're providing these surgeries, you WILL face the consequences

|

****THIS IS ALL I HAVE TO SAY:

Under no circumstances should doctors be allowed to perform these gruesome, irreversible operations on underage children.**

**[CLICK HERE IF YOU AGREE.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=b2cf1c7e88054265a94c8837629812fb&_e=l7XvUM8Lsoozg13PJwshaWhkB-0nUnPc6EAtgHNfZbMew6S5YZwkCEkFIjTW1LQCtuySkMKbDZIvFK_z0TQctqLh3rYMnuMMUy0g26RPwkfMn6n0j1DaVd6FKR4p8DZaBAcubblzQP2ZoAE0sq_Pofxil-WsJIa-00kQyBiQhNt0ebDdxJJaKK8UNKUlM5lGoia_swE8B1fxGrIbUsCK8Mg3k0wvhF8Fmzc_5nlHY5DiHLHVJvh1bUhQvA80HZxhG4gtO-iMMoGqpgLRuXcYAPF8v8TB6s_RY3I3znKFVMFaaJquUiLqXMyHzjpXAKxp)**

_I 'm introducing legislation to charge any person who knowingly provides sex change surgeries, cross-sex hormones or puberty blockers to a minor with a Class C Felony, which could lead to a prison sentence of 10 to 25 years or a maximum fine of $250,000._**
**This is an urgent matter. I 'm so tired of hearing from "adults" who are steering our children and grandchildren in the WRONG direction. **

**[IT'S TIME TO TAKE ACTION AND PROTECT OUR KIDS.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=b2cf1c7e88054265a94c8837629812fb&_e=l7XvUM8Lsoozg13PJwshaWhkB-0nUnPc6EAtgHNfZbMew6S5YZwkCEkFIjTW1LQCtuySkMKbDZIvFK_z0TQctqLh3rYMnuMMUy0g26RPwkfMn6n0j1DaVd6FKR4p8DZaBAcubblzQP2ZoAE0sq_Pofxil-WsJIa-00kQyBiQhNtpj08ZXbXA8Gjz9KYtSzmvk3dHy4Iug4NOkOamgC-sDMfDvr-vWyStLRhFoyUT5yvwFrvB1HNJ1Z3nPBTckjzQ4UOSnBNe7jnywYKJ9KYeA_z-QWINEXYQ06a5qsQuIaK-ZluarWxNnJeSsQuSujns)**

**THAT 'S IT. End of conversation. **

\-- JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance. I 'm introducing legislation to charge any person who knowingly provides sex change surgeries, cross-sex hormones or puberty blockers to a minor with a Class C Felony, which could lead to a prison sentence of 10 to 25 years or a maximum fine of $250,000. This is an urgent matter. I 'm so tired of hearing from "adults" who are steering our children and grandchildren in the WRONG direction. THAT 'S IT. End of conversation. \-- JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. body:
| | | Friend, I’ve got some important news that I had to share right away: **A new GOP opponent just entered the race in Ohio to defeat me and turn the Senate red.**

With polls already showing us neck and neck, I need your grassroots support to help me pull ahead and win. [**So please, will you split $5 between my campaign and the DSCC right now to win this race and keep the Senate blue?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/14452?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230718-SherrodBrown-BrownChallenger-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230718-SherrodBrown-BrownChallenger-Pros-sl1&akid=11408%2E9716520%2EMdmkhA)

I’ll be honest: This is going to be my toughest reelection yet. Experts are saying this could be one of the most competitive – and expensive – races of next year. If I’m going to win in a state that voted for Trump twice, I need to build the strongest grassroots team possible, starting today.

[**So please, will you split $5 or more now – everything you can spare before tonight’s rapid-response deadline – between my campaign and the DSCC to help us win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/14452?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230718-SherrodBrown-BrownChallenger-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230718-SherrodBrown-BrownChallenger-Pros-sl1&akid=11408%2E9716520%2EMdmkhA)

Folks — thanks to the grassroots support of people like you, we ended the first quarter since I announced my re-election campaign in a strong place. Now, we need to keep up this momentum as we get closer to Election Day. subject: The next step in our fight to keep birth control accessible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66695029/417238811/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230718_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWI5N2M0ZDktYzMyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-7uyYZWxg0hWcNJRf7aHl3YwIm_cRUto9T0_a62rNmE=)
---
Peter, Last week, the FDA approved a birth control pill for over-the-counter sale. That means that anyone, of any age, will soon be able to purchase oral contraception without a prescription from a doctor. That removes a huge hurdle to birth control access for many folks, who might not have the time or resources to go see a doctor for a birth control pill prescription. Now, though, the next question we have to ask is: _How much is this going to cost?_ Currently, insurance companies are not required to cover over-the-counter medicines. The pill’s manufacturer hasn’t yet announced the price of the drug. [_**Before they name a price, we want to team up with reproductive rights advocates like you and demand this over-the-counter birth control be priced fairly — to keep it accessible and affordable for the tons of folks who stand to benefit. Will you add your name now to apply pressure?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66695030/417238812/317618776?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230718_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWI5N2M0ZDktYzMyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-7uyYZWxg0hWcNJRf7aHl3YwIm_cRUto9T0_a62rNmE=&emci=1797c4d9-c325-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1b97c4d9-c325-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66695031/417238813/317618776?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230718_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWI5N2M0ZDktYzMyNS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-7uyYZWxg0hWcNJRf7aHl3YwIm_cRUto9T0_a62rNmE=&emci=1797c4d9-c325-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1b97c4d9-c325-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400)

Berkeley, CA 94704
